1001407474.english: Did you ask if it is possible to be a magical girl when you are not a girl…? ...Hehe, what are you talking about? I am 17 years old, you see.
1001407474.korean: 소녀가 아닌데 마법소녀가 가능한 것이냐…&n고 하셨사옵니까?&n...후후, 무슨 소리이시옵니까.&n소첩은 17세이옵니다만?

1001407475.english: I asked Sumire and Hatsuna if they would like to be magical girls with me, but... they freaked out and ran away. ...Is it because being a magical girl is really hard?
1001407475.korean: 스미레와 하츠나에게도 같이 마법소녀로&n활동하지 않겠냐고 물었는데…&n기겁을 하며 도망가더군요.&n…마법소녀 활동이 많이 힘들기 때문일까요?

1001407476.english: The hardest thing about being a magical girl? It is, indeed… having to be away from the Lord’s, no… Magical Gentleman’s side.
1001407476.korean: 마법소녀 일을 하면서 가장 힘든 것?&n그것은, 역시… 주공의, 아니…&n매지컬 젠틀맨의 곁을 떠나 있어야 한다는&n것이옵니다.

1001407477.english: My magic is for everyone, but... as always, I feel happiest when I use it for the Magical Gentleman. It must surely be due to the power of love.
1001407477.korean: 소첩의 마법은 모두를 위한 것이지만…&n역시나 소첩은 매지컬 젠틀맨을 위해&n마법을 쓸 때가 가장 기분이 좋사옵니다.&n필시 사랑의 힘 때문이겠지요.

1001407478.english: M-M-This is troublesome for a magical girl...

1001407479.english: Yes, if the Magical Gentleman wishes...&nOh, did you say it was a misunderstanding?&nNo, I've read your true intentions with my magical mind-reading.&nPlease don't refuse.
1001407479.korean: 네, 매지컬 젠틀맨께서 원하신다면…&n어머, 오해라고 하셨사옵니까?&n아뇨, 매지컬 독심술로 본심을 읽었사오니,&n사양하지 마시옵소서.

1001407480.english: Until now, I refrained because I was a magical girl, but&nIf you keep provoking this concubine like this...&nI shall show you the night skills of the magical young bride.
1001407480.korean: 그 동안은 마법소녀이기에 자제했으나,&n자꾸 이렇게 소첩을 자극하신다면..&n마법새댁의 밤기술을 보여드리겠사옵니다.

1001407481.english: Talon has been running around secretly lately, and before I knew it, he had prepared these clothes. Captain Khan wasn't keen on it, but after Talon said a few words, he obediently put them on.
1001407481.korean: 탈론이 최근에 몰래 무슨 짓을 하고 다니더니&n어느새 이런 옷을 준비했더라고.&n칸 대장은 내켜 하지 않았지만&n탈론이 몇 마디 하니까 순순히 입더라니까.

1001407482.english: Commander! Do something about Varg! He butts in and nags when we're enjoying wholesome entertainment with the others! Keshik alone is enough nagging...
1001407482.korean: 사령관! 바르그 좀 어떻게 해줘!&n다른 애들이랑 건전한 유흥 문화 즐길 때&n난입해서 잔소리 하잖아!&n잔소리는 케시크만으로도 충분한데...

1001407483.english: Huh? You ask what I'm looking at? The Horde chat room. From private conversations to military life tips, meal plans, and Talon's— Oh wait, nothing.
1001407483.korean: 응? 뭘 보고 있냐고?&n호드 대화방.&n사적인 대화부터 군생활 팁, 식단표&n그리고 탈론의- 아차, 아무것도 아냐.

1001407484.english: Can't I get a textbook with actual errors? Since all classes these days are conducted on panels, it's hard to find actual errors... It's hard to play panel slash, you know.
1001407484.korean: 실책으로 된 교과서 구할 수 없을까?&n요즘 수업은 전부 패널로 하니까&n실책은 구하기 힘들어서…&n패널로 판치기 하기는 힘들잖아.

1001407485.english: How are the preparations? Got it. I'll leave the rest to you. Ah. Commander. That communication just now? The Werewolf is coming back from school. It's a welcome party. Do you want to come, Commander?
1001407485.korean: 준비는 어때? 알겠어. 나머지는 부탁할게. &n아. 사령관. 방금 통신? &n워울프가 학교 갔다 오잖아. 그거 환영 파티.&n사령관도 올래?

1001407486.english: Commander, which suits your taste better: seniors, juniors, or classmates? Since I’ve already taken on this appearance, I’m trying to accommodate you as much as possible.
1001407486.korean: 사령관은 선배, 후배, 동급생 중&n뭐가 더 취향에 맞아?&n이왕 이런 모습을 했으니 사령관에게&n최대한 맞춰주려고 그러지.

1001407487.english: I wonder if this is against the law...
1001407487.korean: 이거 법에 걸리는 거 아닌가 모르겠네…

1001407488.english: Hahaha! Is this sight thrilling for the commander?&nThen, in return... I want you to make me feel thrilled too?"
1001407488.korean: 캬하핫! 이 모습이 사령관에게 짜릿한가봐?&n그러면 보답으로… 나도 짜릿하게 해달라고?

1001407489.english: Captain Khan said we did a great job on the last mission.&nThey're saying to meet at Cafe Horizon.&nBut... you said you couldn't go.&nI have a date with the commander right now, so...
1001407489.korean: 칸 대장이 지난 작전 수고 많았다고&n카페 호라이즌으로 모이라고 하네.&n하지만… 못 간다고 했지.&n지금은 사령관이랑 데이트 해야하니까.

1001407490.english: Even without an eye patch, a prosthetic leg, or a hook hand...&nStill, I'm a pirate. Because there's an infinite amount of&nBecause you're greedy!
1001407490.korean: 안대도, 의족도, 갈고리 손도 없지만…&n그래도 난 해적이야. 왜냐면 가슴 속에 무한한&n탐욕을 품고 있으니까!

1001407491.english: Have you seen the movie "The Buccaneers of the Caribbean," Commander?&nThey say the werewolf from the past was the main character of that movie.&nIf you haven't seen it, do you want to watch it together?
1001407491.korean: 카리브의 버카니어라는 영화 봤어, 사령관?&n과거의 워울프가 그 영화의 주인공이었대.&n안 봤으면 같이 한 번 볼래?

1001407492.english: Pirate crew... I want to work with Captain Khan, you know?&nOkay, should we try making a Horde pirate crew next time?
1001407492.korean: 해적단... 칸 대장이랑 같이 하고 싶은걸?&n좋아, 다음에는 호드 해적단을 만들어 볼까?

1001407493.english: The Bikini Pirates haven't disappeared.&nIt's just temporarily inactive.&nOne day, I'll find a huge treasure!"
1001407493.korean: 비키니 해적단은 사라진 게 아니야.&n잠시 활동을 멈추고 있을 뿐이지.&n언젠가 엄청난 보물을 찾아낼 거라고!

1001407494.english: Putting a skull on a pirate flag is cliché, isn't it?&nSo I decided to draw the commander's face.&nThey say a good-looking pirate flag is also good to hang.
1001407494.korean: 해적기에 해골 마크를 넣는 건 식상하잖아? &n그래서 사령관 얼굴을 그려넣기로 했어.&n보기 좋은 해적기가 달기도 좋다잖아.

1001407495.english: Hey, Commander. We ran into pirates while sailing?&nHand over all your treasures, or...&nYou're going to have to go on a date with me all day.
1001407495.korean: 여, 사령관. 항해 중에 해적을 만나버렸네?&n가진 보물을 전부 내놓던가, 아니면…&n나랑 하루 종일 데이트를 해 줘야겠어.

1001407496.english: Why? Shall we go over there and have a rum?
1001407496.korean: 왜? 저기 가서 럼주나 한 잔 할까?

1001407497.english: The commander's cannon seems to need a bit of cleaning...&nShall I clean it for you?
1001407497.korean: 사령관의 대포, 청소가 좀 필요할 것 같은데... &n내가 깨끗하게 닦아줄까?

1001407498.english: The commander, rum, and gold coins.&nThese are the three things that make me smile.&nOf course, the commander is the best, but...
1001407498.korean: 사령관이랑 럼주 그리고 금화.&n날 미소 짓게 만드는 세 가지야.&n물론 사령관이 제일 좋지만.

1001407499.english: How about this outfit? Kirke got it for me. She said it’s for the Santa role. Does it suit me? Hehehe. Kirke complimented me, saying it’s pretty.
1001407499.korean: 이 옷 어때? 키르케가 준비해줬어.&n산타 역할이라고.&n어울려? 후후후.&n키르케도 예쁘다고 칭찬해줬어.

1001407500.english: Christmas is really nice. Eating delicious food together, laughing and chatting, exchanging gifts... I guess that is what ordinary happiness is.
1001407500.korean: 크리스마스는 참 좋아. 다 같이 맛있는 것도&n먹고, 웃고 떠들고, 선물도 교환하고… &n이게 평범한 행복이란 거겠지.

1001407501.english: When I first met the Commander, I never imagined I would be able to enjoy Christmas every year. What did I think when we first met? Hmm... ... It's a secret.
1001407501.korean: 사령관을 처음 만났을 때만 해도&n매년 크리스마스를 즐길 수 있을 거라고는 &n생각하지 못했어.&n처음 만났을 때 어떻게 생각했냐고?&n음…... 비밀.

1001407502.english: LRL, Alvis. The cake and the present aren't running away, so calm down. Ah, Commander. Ahaha, it's fine. I'm used to it. And I like times like this, too.
1001407502.korean: LRL, 알비스. 케이크도 선물도&n안 도망가니까, 진정해.&n아, 사령관. 아하하, 괜찮아. 익숙하니까.&n그리고 이런 시간도 좋아 하니까.

1001407503.english: Ah, Commander. I want to give Kirke a gift... but the atmosphere is right now and people are drinking heavily, so I'm a bit hesitant to go in... Um... Commander. Could you come in with me?
1001407503.korean: 아, 사령관. 키르케한테 선물을 주고 싶은데…&n지금 한창 술을 마시는 분위기라&n들어가기가 조금 그래서…&n저… 사령관. 같이 들어가줄래?

1001407504.english: Here's a gift. I've been receiving so much from the Commander that this isn't enough... but will you accept it? Hehehe. Merry Christmas! Please stay with me forever and ever!
1001407504.korean: 여기 선물. 사령관한테 이런 거로는 부족할&n정도로 많은 걸 받고 있지만… 받아줄래?&n에헤헤. 메리 크리스마스!&n앞으로도 계속, 계속 함께 해줘!

1001407505.english: Ah, ahaha... My hat, is it weird...?

1001407506.english: I really like the commander petting me these days.&nI didn't like it much before...&nRight now, I can feel the commander's touch.&nI feel relieved. It's warm...
1001407506.korean: 요즘 사령관이 쓰다듬어주는 게 너무 좋아. &n예전에는 별로 안 좋아했는데…&n지금은 사령관의 손길을 느끼고 있으면&n안심이 돼. 따뜻해…

1001407507.english: Santa gives gifts to the children who worked hard this year.&nBecause praising is my job. I want to praise you.&nThank you. Thank you for working so hard for us...&nI'll always be by your side. Commander.
1001407507.korean: 산타는 올해 열심히 노력한 아이들을&n칭찬해 주는 게 일이니까. 칭찬해주고 싶어.&n고마워. 우리를 위해 열심히 해줘서...&n나는 항상 곁에 있을게. 사령관.

1001407508.english: Ta-da! It's a Santa Bunny Girl~ Adding something good to something good—isn't this the icing on the cake? Judging by the Commander's reaction, it definitely works.
1001407508.korean: 짜잔! 산타 바니걸이랍니다~&n좋은 것에 좋은 것을 더했으니&n이게 바로 금상첨화인가요?&n사령관님의 반응을 보니 효과 확실하네요.

1001407509.english: A person wearing a rabbit costume held a carrot up to me and asked, "Are you a bunny? Or a reverse bunny?" I told them that it depends on the observer. So they obediently backed away.
1001407509.korean: 토끼옷을 입은 분이 저에게 당근을 들이대며&n바니냐? 역바니냐? 라고 묻더라고요.&n저는 관측자에 따라 달라진다고 말했죠.&n그러니 순순히 물러나더군요.

1001407510.english: Is it strange for a witch to celebrate a day like this? … …Even back when I was at the theme park, I used to change clothes for anniversaries. Enough with the heavy talk! Let's have a drink!
1001407510.korean: 마녀가 이런 날을 축하하는 게 이상한가요?&n…...옛날에 테마파크에 있을 때에도&n기념일에 맞춰서 옷을 갈아입었죠.&n무거운 이야기는 여기까지! 한 잔 하시죠!

1001407511.english: Dutch Girl, have you seen this? If you haven't seen it yet, watch it right away! Even though I gave you a Santa outfit as a gift, you were so cute that I ended up hugging you without even realizing it.
1001407511.korean: 더치걸 님 보셨나요?&n아직 안 보셨다면 빨리 보세요!&n제가 산타복을 선물했는데도 정말 귀여워서&n저도 모르게 끌어안고 말았다니까요.

1001407512.english: Aww, Commander. Would you like a drink too? Dutch Girl! No, no, I'm not drunk. Even if I were, it would be the atmosphere. Come on, come in. Let's enjoy the party together.
1001407512.korean: 어롸아~ 사령관님. 사령관님도 한잔 하쉴?&n더치걸 님! 아뇨아뇨, 안 취했어요.&n취했어도 분위기에 취한 거예요.&n자, 들어오세요. 같이 파티를 즐기죠.

1001407513.english: Since it is the day, I shall read your fortune, Commander. Ahem. Hmm... No. I can't believe it! Commander... you will have a Merry Christmas every year. Hehe. This isn't so much a fortune as it is a certainty.
1001407513.korean: 날도 날이니 사령관님의 점을 봐드리죠.&n흠흠. 음… 아니. 이럴수가!&n사령관님은… 매년 즐거운 크리스마스를&n보내실 거예요.&n후후. 이건 점이라기보다는 확정이랍니다.

1001407515.english: Hmph, the commander has the potion of courage...&nYou must have had a lot to drink.&nEven without that... with the Commander, it's okay..."
1001407515.korean: 후훗, 사령관님께서 용기의 물약을&n많이 마시셨나보네요.&n그런 거 없어도… 사령관님이라면 괜찮은데…

1001407516.english: Although it varies by region, in the old days, it was in September.&nThey say there were many babies being born.&nWould you like to find out why together?&nWhile drinking a love potion together, hehe.
1001407516.korean: 지역마다 다르지만 옛시대에는 9월에&n태어나는 아이들이 많았다고 해요.&n왜 그런지 같이 알아보시지 않겠어요?&n사랑의 묘약을 같이 마시면서요, 후후.

1001407517.english: There are plenty of times when I can't trust Talon, but he's reliable in moments like this. Hehehe, how is it? Cute? Pretty? I guess I should thank Talon this time.
1001407517.korean: 탈론이 못 미더울 때도 많지만&n이럴 때는 믿음직하다니까.&n에헤헤, 어때? 귀여워? 예뻐?&n이번에는 탈론한테 감사해야겠네.

1001407518.english: For the Horde, things like makeup are a low priority. The Captain is like that, for starters. And Werewolf really teases me whenever I wear makeup. Hmph! Doesn't he do it?
1001407518.korean: 호드 애들이 화장 같은 건 우선순위가 낮잖아.&n일단 대장님부터 그렇고.&n워울프는 내가 화장 같은 것을 하면&n열심히 놀린다니까. 치! 자기는 안하나?

1001407519.english: My grades? Believe it or not, they're top-tier. What, are you skeptical? Want me to show you my report card? … … though within the Horde…
1001407519.korean: 내 성적? 이래봬도 최상위권이라고.&n뭐야, 의심스러워? 성적표 보여줘?&n……호드 안에서… 이지만.

1001407520.english: The Horde went to karaoke as a group a while ago, you know? Surprisingly, Keshik sang really well. And Captain Khan kept holding back, but he sang at the very end and was amazing. … … even though it was a military song.
1001407520.korean: 얼마 전에 호드에서 단체로 노래방갔거든?&n의외로 케시크가 노래 잘 부르더라?&n그리고 칸 대장도 계속 빼다가&n마지막에 불렀는데 엄청 잘 불렀어.&n……군가이긴 하지만.

1001407521.english: Stop it! You're going to die, seriously! Commander. The kids keep teasing us about our date! It's such a precious memory to me…
1001407521.korean: 그만하라고! 너 죽는다, 진짜!&n사령관. 우리가 데이트한 거&n애들이 계속 놀리잖아!&n나한텐 정말 소중한 추억인데…

1001407522.english: Commander, don't you have a school uniform? If not, let's go get one fitted right now. It would be a bit awkward if I were the only one wearing one. Hehe, and I wanted to go on a school uniform date.
1001407522.korean: 사령관은 교복 없어?&n없으면 지금이라도 맞추러 가자.&n나만 교복 입고 있으면 조금 그렇잖아.&n헤헤, 그리고 교복 데이트하고 싶어서.

1001407523.english: No! You shouldn't touch a girl's body carelessly.
1001407523.korean: 안 돼! 여자애 몸 함부로 터치하는 거 아니야.

1001407524.english: This is unhealthy dating.&nSo... without the other kids... finding out...&nLet's finish it.
1001407524.korean: 이거 불건전 이성교제인데.&n그러니까… 다른 애들한테… 들키지 않게…&n마저하자.

1001407525.english: Commander. Don't I look any different? Huh? Look closely.&nDon't you know? Hmm... I guess there's no other choice.&nSince you're the commander, I'll tell you something special.&nYou like the commander even more than yesterday. Hehe. "
1001407525.korean: 사령관. 나 바뀐 거 없어? 응? 자세히 봐.&n모르겠어? 흐음… 어쩔 수 없지.&n사령관이니까 특별히 알려줄게.&n어제보다 더 사령관을 좋아하잖아. 헤헤.

1001407526.english: I have already mastered the movements of Goltarion VIII, and having fought for decades, I am confident in battle!
1001407526.korean: 골타리온 VIII세로서의 움직임은&n이미 몸에 익혔고,&n수십 년 동안 싸워왔기 때문에&n전투에는 자신이 있습니다!

1001407527.english: Before I met the director, I thought only about surviving. But I was afraid I might forget that I was an actor... so I kept reading the script in my spare time.
1001407527.korean: 감독님을 만나기 전에는&n오직 살아남는 것만 생각했어요.&n그러다 혹시 제가 배우라는 걸 잊을까 봐… &n남는 시간에는 계속 대본을 읽었어요.

1001407528.english: I suppose I could find out who I really was if I asked Mr. Armand. But I want to figure it out on my own. Now that I’ve finally found what I want to do, I want to enjoy it. Hehehe.
1001407528.korean: 원래의 제가 누구였는지 아르망 씨에게&n물어보면 알 수 있겠죠.&n하지만 스스로 알아보고 싶어요.&n저 스스로 하고 싶은 일을 드디어&n찾았으니 그것을 즐기고 싶어요. 에헤헤.

1001407529.english: Didn't I question the fact that dying in smoke leads to real death? Because it was Densetsu... But... no one wanted to die, and no one would have wanted to kill.
1001407529.korean: 연기에서 죽는 것이 진짜 죽음으로&n이어지는 것에 의문을 갖지 않았냐고요?&n덴세츠였으니까… 하지만... 그 누구도 죽고 &n싶지 않았고, 죽이고 싶지 않았을 거예요.

1001407530.english: I've been really into watching old movies lately. The works from before the apocalypse are all amazing. Personally, Bismarck's… Oh wait, this is a secret from Mr. Hresvelgr.
1001407530.korean: 요즘 옛날 영화를 보는 것에 푹 빠졌어요.&n멸망하기 전의 작품들은 모두 대단하네요. &n개인적으로 비스마르크의…&n아차, 이건 흐레스벨그 씨에게 비밀이에요.

1001407531.english: Having made a movie and achieved my long-awaited revenge, I am a happy person. So, from now on, I want to live for you, who helped me. That is what I want to do right now!
1001407531.korean: 영화를 찍고, 오랜 복수를 이룬 저는&n행복한 사람이에요.&n그래서 앞으로는 저를 도와준 당신을&n위해 살고 싶어요.&n그게 지금의 제가 하고 싶은 일이에요!

1001407532.english: Haaah! This! Here, it's a shoot, right!?

1001407533.english: Today's filming is... Right?&nBecause... the me right now...&nBecause I don't have time to act...&nPlease continue...
1001407533.korean: 오늘은 촬영이...아니죠?&n왜냐면… 지금의 저... &n연기할 여유가 없으니까…&n계속… 해주세요.

1001407534.english: The scar on my chest? I'm not going to delete it.&nThis wound symbolizes my death.&nBut because of this, I have a precious friend and...&nI was able to meet my beloved you.&nSo I'm going to leave it.
1001407534.korean: 가슴의 흉터요? 안 지울 거예요.&n이 상처는 저의 죽음을 상징하죠.&n하지만 이것이 있었기에 소중한 친구와…&n사랑하는 당신을 만날 수 있었어요.&n그래서 남겨둘 거예요.

1001407535.english: Thanks to becoming Sarena, I was able to meet you and love you like this. But… even if I hadn't been Sarena, I would have loved you.
1001407535.korean: 제가 사레나가 된 덕분에 이렇게&n당신을 만나 사랑할 수 있었어요.&n하지만… 만약 제가 사레나가 아니었어도&n당신을 사랑했을 거예요.

1001407536.english: Actually, my fighting style was dangerous because the impact of my charge was transmitted directly to my body. But now I'm fine! I told Mr. Azaz about it, and it was resolved right away.
1001407536.korean: 사실 제 전투 스타일은 돌진의 충격이&n직접적으로 몸에 전달되는 위험한&n스타일이었어요. 하지만 이제 괜찮아요!&n아자즈 씨에게 말했더니 금방 해결됐어요.

1001407537.english: Honey~♡ I love you! Hehehe. You say I've changed a lot since we first met? I guess I've become a little more possessive. I'm sorry. My heart just overflows when it's just the two of us.
1001407537.korean: 자기야~♡ 좋아해요! 에헤헤.&n처음 만났을 때랑 많이 달라졌다고요?&n저, 조금 독점욕이 강해졌나 봐요.&n미안해요. 둘만 있으면 마음이 넘쳐서.

1001407538.english: The wound on my chest… please… touch it more. Usually I can’t feel anything, but when you touch it… it… feels good.
1001407538.korean: 가슴의 상처… 더… 만져주세요.&n평소에는 아무것도 느끼지 못하는데,&n당신이 만지면... 그… 기분이 좋아요.

1001407539.english: The moon shines brightest when it is full. That is why I, too, am filled with magical power right now. Or… am I filled with other emotions?
1001407539.korean: 달은 보름일때 가장 밝게 빛나죠.&n그렇기 때문에, 지금의 저 또한&n마력으로 가득 차 있어요.&n아니면… 다른 감정으로 가득찬 걸까요?

1001407540.english: From a magical girl's perspective, I would look like a fallen person right now. However, if harboring feelings for someone is wrong... I would gladly become corrupted.
1001407540.korean: 마법소녀의 관점에서 본다면,&n지금의 저는 타락해버린 모습이겠죠.&n하지만, 누군가에 대한 마음을 품는 것이&n잘못이라면… 얼마든지 타락하겠어요.

1001407541.english: We have been through so much together. In the process, I... learned so much. Pain, happiness, guilt, shame, inferiority... and... even love.
1001407541.korean: 우린 그 동안 함께 많은 걸 겪어 왔죠.&n그 과정에서 저는... 많은 걸 배웠어요.&n고통,행복,죄책감,부끄러움,열등감…&n그리고… 사랑까지.

1001407542.english: This outfit was made by Audrey. She is a magical designer with the magic to breathe life into fabric. She said it expresses my feelings for the gentleman.
1001407542.korean: 이 옷은 오드리 씨가 만들어 준 옷이에요.&n옷감에 생명을 불어넣는 마법을 가진&n매지컬 디자이너지요.&n젠틀맨에 대한 제 마음을 표현했다네요.

1001407543.english: Momo, Pokkuru, and… um… even Goltarion, though I don’t really like him. Everyone helped make this outfit. I should probably thank them separately later.
1001407543.korean: 모모와 뽀끄루, 그리고… 으음…&n마음에는 들지 않지만, 골타리온까지.&n모두가 이 옷을 만드는 걸 도와줬어요.&n나중에 따로 감사인사를 해야겠죠.

1001407544.english: Do you see that full moon, beautifully dyed in the purple color of love, Gentleman? That... signifies me, who has been completely filled with love for you.
1001407544.korean: 보랏빛 사랑의 색으로 아름답게 물든&n저 보름달이 보이시나요, 젠틀맨?&n그건... 당신을 사랑하는 마음으로&n가득 차버린 저를 뜻한답니다.

1001407545.english: I understand how you feel, but... somewhere with a bit more atmosphere...
1001407545.korean: 당신의 마음은 알겠지만,&n조금 더… 분위기 있는 곳에서...

1001407546.english: Evening primroses bloom most beautifully at night.&nI'll show you my most beautiful side, so...&nPlease stay with me tonight.
1001407546.korean: 달맞이꽃은 밤일 때 가장 아름답게 꽃피죠.&n제가 가장 아름다운 모습을 보여드릴테니…&n오늘 밤은 저와 함께 해주세요.

1001407547.english: Now that I've become this way...&nI guess I can't be called a magical girl anymore.&nBut it's okay. Now, not a magical girl anymore...&nBecause she's your girl.
1001407547.korean: 이 모습이 되어버린 저는…&n더 이상 마법소녀라고 불릴 수 없겠죠.&n하지만 괜찮아요. 이젠 마법소녀가 아니라…&n당신만의 소녀니까.

1001407548.english: Hehe, now that I've become a magical girl, I'm strong. Maybe I can even go to the Submarine now. … No, come to think of it again… I think the Submarine is still too much for me.
1001407548.korean: 후후, 마법소녀가 된 나는 강하다.&n이제는 서브마린도 갈 수 있을지도 모른다.&n…아니, 다시 생각해보니…&n아직 서브마린은 무리인 것 같다.

1001407549.english: P-Phantom Black! And Lace White! The two of us are AL… AL Cute! … Ugh, sorry. This is a little embarrassing after all.
1001407549.korean: 패, 팬텀 블랙! 그리고 레이스 화이트!&n둘이서 AL… AL 큐트!&n…으으, 미안하다. 역시 이건 조금 부끄럽다.

1001407550.english: You ask why I'm a Commander instead of a Magical Gentleman? Th-that... ah, I'm still a little... embarrassed... but... if the Commander wants it, I'll give it a try.
1001407550.korean: 왜 매지컬 젠틀맨이 아니라 사령관이냐고?&n그, 그게… 아, 아직은 조금… 부끄럽다…&n그래도... 사령관이 원한다면 노력해 보겠다.

1001407551.english: Ugh, this kind of thing really only suits a cool person like Phantom-senpai. I'm just tall and not even cute... ...So you're saying that makes it even better?
1001407551.korean: 으으, 이런 건 역시 팬텀 선배처럼&n멋진 사람에게나 어울리는 일이다.&n난 키만 크고 귀엽지도 않은데…&n…그래서 더 좋은 거라고?

1001407552.english: A-Magical Gentleman. Here is today's activity report. Hehe, I've been practicing hard... so now I can be called a Magical Gentleman. Feel free to praise me as much as you want, Commander... Oh wait.
1001407552.korean: 매, 매지컬 젠틀맨. 오늘 활동 보고서다.&n후후, 그 동안 열심히 연습해서…&n이제 매지컬 젠틀맨이라고 부를 수 있다.&n잔뜩 칭찬해줘도 좋다, 사령관… 아차.

1001407553.english: You ask why I keep being a magical girl even though I'm so embarrassed... Well... it's because Magical Gentleman planned this event for me and Phantom-senpai.
1001407553.korean: 이렇게 부끄러워 하면서도…&n왜 계속 마법소녀를 하고 있냐고?&n그야… 매지컬 젠틀맨이 나와 팬텀 선배를&n위해서 기획해 준 이벤트니까.

1001407554.english: Ma, you shouldn't do this to a magical girl, Commander...
1001407554.korean: 마, 마법소녀한테 이러면 안 된다, 사령관...

1001407555.english: ...Well, magical girls aren't supposed to be like this, but...&nI'm still a trainee magical girl. So...&nEven if I do all sorts of things with the Magical Gentleman...&nIt'll be okay.
1001407555.korean: …마, 마법소녀는 원래 이러면 안 되지만…&n나는 아직 견습 마법소녀다. 그러니까…&n매지컬 젠틀맨과 이런저런 일을 해도…&n괜찮을 거다.

1001407556.english: Magical Gentleman, I've heard that magical girls are...&nThey say you can become stronger thru the power of love.&nWon't you help me become stronger?
1001407556.korean: 매지컬 젠틀맨, 내가 듣기로 마법소녀는&n사랑의 힘으로 더욱 강해질 수 있다고 한다.&n내가 더욱 강해질 수 있게 도와주지 않겠나?

1001407557.english: I was assigned the mission to cause a blackout in key facilities or specific areas on Auntie Empress's orders. Seriously, after all that hard work, they didn't give me a single piece of gold! Does that even make sense!?
1001407557.korean: 여제 아줌마 명령에 따라 주요 시설이나&n일정 구역을 정전시키는 임무를 맡았지.&n아니, 그런데 그렇게 고생했는데&n금 한 쪼가리도 안 주더라니까! 이게 말이 돼!?

1001407558.english: I've met other hunting dogs... why are they all so ill-tempered? Is having a flawed personality a prerequisite for being a hunting dog? Me? Don't I have a pretty good personality?
1001407558.korean: 다른 사냥개 애들 만난 적이 있는데…&n하나같이 성격들이 왜 그래?&n성격에 하자 있는 게 사냥개의 조건이야?&n나? 나 정도면 성격 좋은 편 아냐?

1001407559.english: The reason I like gold? Hmm..................... How could there be a reason for liking something! I just like it because I like it!
1001407559.korean: 황금을 좋아하는 이유? 음.....................&n좋아하는데 이유가 어딨어!&n그냥 좋아하니까 좋아하는 거지!

1001407560.english: The lighting in the dorm is bad, so the others told me to fix it. No way! Why are you making me do that?! Leave that to an electrician!
1001407560.korean: 숙소 조명 상태가 안 좋으니까&n다른 애들이 나보고 고치라고 했거든?&n아니! 왜 그걸 나한테 시키냐고!&n그런 건 전기 전문가한테 맡기라고!

1001407561.english: Was it Boryeon? She and I were asked about our ideal types, so I said something substantial, sparkling, and yellow. Then she said she wanted to be friends. I was talking about gold... what was she thinking?
1001407561.korean: 보련인가? 걔나 나한테 이상형을 묻길래&n묵직하고, 반짝반짝하고, 노란 거라고 했거든?&n그러니까 친하게 지내자고 하더라.&n난 황금을 말한 건데… 걘 뭘 생각한 거지?

1001407562.english: How can I make you mine? What should I give you from what I have? Among my treasures, there is something worth giving... Ah! There is one! How about me? Huh?
1001407562.korean: 어떻게 하면 내 것이 될래?&n내가 가진 것 중에 뭘 주면 될까?&n내가 가진 보물 중에 줄만한 것이…&n아! 하나 있구나! 나는 어때? 응?

1001407563.english: Which will you pay with, an arm or gold?
1001407563.korean: 팔 한쪽이랑 황금 중에 어떤 걸로 지불할래?

1001407564.english: If you touched it, you have to pay the price.&nWhere would you like to pay? Here? My treasure chest?&nOr... the bedroom?
1001407564.korean: 만졌으면 대가를 치뤄야지.&n어디서 지불할래? 여기서? 내 보물고?&n아니면… 침실?

1001407565.english: Because I like to sleep on my treasure, you know?&nBut I'm sleepy now...&nSo lie down here.&nWell... it doesn't matter if it's an arm pillow or a lap pillow.
1001407565.korean: 나는 내 보물 위에서 자는 걸 좋아하거든?&n그런데 지금 졸리네...&n그러니 여기에 누워.&n뭐… 팔베개나 무릎베개라도 상관없고.

1001407566.english: I have many precious treasures. From gold to jewels, artwork, limited edition figures, and various other things. But there is only one thing that is precious to me. It is you.
1001407566.korean: 내 보물 중에는 귀중한 것이 많아.&n황금부터 시작해서 보석, 예술품, 한정 피규어&n그리고 여러가지.&n하지만 소중한 것은 하나뿐이야. 바로 너 말이야.

1001407567.english: Just as not everything that sparkles is gold, not everything valuable sparkles. Just like you. Wait... looking at you again, you are quite dazzling, aren't you? Hehe.
1001407567.korean: 모든 반짝이는 것이 금은 아닌 것처럼&n모든 가치있는 것이 반짝이는 아니더라.&n바로 너처럼 말이야.&n아니다… 다시 보니까 무척 눈부시네? 후후.

1001407568.english: After spending time with the Emprecis Hounds, I realized they weren't as bad as I thought. But I can't forgive them for treating me like an external battery!
1001407568.korean: 엠프레시스 하운드 애들이랑 같이 지내보니까&n생각보다 나쁜 애들은 아니었어.&n하지만 나를 외장 배터리 취급한 건 용서 못 해!

1001407569.english: I can take that as meaning I'm precious to you, right? Hehe, then... why don't we try adding more things that are precious to you? For example... like a child?
1001407569.korean: 내가 너에게 소중하다는 의미로 생각해도 되겠지?&n후후, 그러면… 소중한 것을 더 늘려보지 않을래?&n예를 들어… 아이라던가?

1001407570.english: Guess what's the most important thing for a super spy? It's a genius brain! It's a role that suits me perfectly, as I'm in charge of Orca's genius, right?
1001407570.korean: 슈퍼스파이한테 가장 중요한 게 뭐게?&n바로 천재적인 두뇌야!&n오르카의 지니어스를 담당하는&n나랑 아주 잘 어울리는 역할이지?

1001407571.english: Commander, let's play Steel Line Online together! My work for today? Of course I finished it all! In English, it's called DIEND!
1001407571.korean: 사령관, 같이 스틸라인 온라인 하자!&n오늘 할 일? 당연히 다 끝냈지!&n영어로 하면 디엔드, DIEND라고!

1001407572.english: You'd better watch out, Commander! If this super spy Tomo sets her mind to it, no security measure can stop her!
1001407572.korean: 조심하는 게 좋을 거야, 사령관!&n이 슈퍼스파이 토모 님이 마음을 먹으면&n그 어떤 보완장치로도 막을 수 없으니까!

1001407573.english: Being a Super Spy means fighting and defeating a walking weapon equipped with nuclear weapons, right? Don't worry, I'll talk to Captain May and try to frame them!
1001407573.korean: 슈퍼스파이라는 건 핵무기를 탑재한&n보행 병기랑 싸워서 이겨야 하는 거지?&n걱정 마, 메이 대장이랑 잘 얘기해서&n혐의해 볼 테니까!

1001407574.english: One Maltese, shaken, not stirred. How about that? Did I look like the protagonist of a spy movie? Hehe, it would be troublesome if you fell for my sexy side!
1001407574.korean: 말티즈 한 잔, 젓지 말고 흔들어서.&n어때, 첩보영화 주인공처럼 보였어?&n후후, 내 섹시한 모습에 반하면 곤란해!

1001407575.english: The reason I decided to become a super spy is… you know, super spies are supposed to have a romantic partner by their side, right? I wanted to be in that kind of relationship with the Commander.
1001407575.korean: 왜 슈퍼스파이가 되기로 한 거냐면…&n슈퍼스파이 옆에는 로맨틱한 관계의&n연인이 있는 법이잖아?&n사령관이랑... 그런 관계가 되었으면 했거든.

1001407576.english: W-what are you doing?! I'll teach you a lesson with my 16 Kung Fu techniques!
1001407576.korean: 뭐, 뭐 하는 거야?!&n내 16가지 쿵푸 기술로 혼내주는 수가 있어!

1001407577.english: So you fell for Super Spy Tomo's honey trap?&nWhat should we do with the commander, who has become a poisoned rat...?&nHehe, I'll hold you tight so you can't run away.
1001407577.korean: 슈퍼스파이 토모님의 미인계에 걸렸구나?&n독 먹은 쥐가 된 사령관을 어떻게 할까…&n히히, 못 도망가게 꼭 끌어안고 있어야지.

1001407578.english: Spies sometimes create fake families.&nBut don't worry!&nThe commander and I aren't like that...&nBecause we're actually a couple.
1001407578.korean: 스파이는 가끔 가짜 가족을 만들기도 한대.&n하지만 걱정하지 마!&n사령관이랑 나는 그런 게 아니라…&n진짜로 연인 사이니까.

1001407579.english: The highest commander of Poseidon Industries,&nIt is said to be an invincible dragon.&nI'm commanding the PECS naval unit.&nI look forward to working with you, Commander.
1001407579.korean: 포세이돈 인더스트리 소속 최고 지휘관,&n무적의 용이라고 한다.&nPECS의 해군 부대를 지휘하고 있지.&n잘 부탁한다, 사령관.

1001407580.english: Poseidon's core doctrine is very simple.&nUnleashing overwhelming firepower without hesitation,&nIt's about subduing the enemy and minimizing friendly casualties.
1001407580.korean: 포세이돈의 핵심 교리는 매우 간단하다.&n압도적인 화력을 아낌없이 퍼부어서&n적을 제압하고 아군 피해를 줄이는 것이지.

1001407581.english: There's a misunderstanding that I'm a warmonger...&nActually, I love peace.&nSo before the enemies threaten peace,&nAren't they trying to get rid of everything?
1001407581.korean: 내가 전쟁광이라는 오해가 있는데…&n사실 난 평화를 사랑한다.&n그러니 적들이 평화를 위협하기 전에&n전부 없애버리려는 것 아니겠나?

1001407582.english: You can't win a war alone.&nIn that sense, I'm not lucky.&nLike sirens, undines, Thetis, and nereids.&nBecause I have reliable subordinates with me.
1001407582.korean: 혼자서는 전쟁에서 승리할 수 없다.&n그런 의미에서 난 운이 좋지.&n세이렌, 운디네, 테티스, 네레이드처럼&n든든한 부하들을 데리고 있으니까.

1001407583.english: Being by your side, the last human...&nThe Metal Parasites that cover this land and&nWe could fight endlessly.&nJust imagining it is already fun.
1001407583.korean: 마지막 인간인 그대 옆에 있으면...&n이 땅을 뒤덮고 있는 철충들과&n끝없는 싸움을 벌일 수 있겠지.&n상상만 해도 벌써 즐겁군.

1001407584.english: He who controls the sea controls the world.&nIf that's true, this world is...&nIt's practically the commander's.&nBecause I will always be by your side.
1001407584.korean: 바다를 지배하는 자가 세계를 지배한다.&n그 말이 사실이라면, 이 세계는&n사령관의 것이나 다름없겠군.&n그대의 옆에는 항상 내가 있을 테니까.

1001407586.english: Is this an attempt to seduce me?&nHeh heh, alright. Let's be happily seduced.
1001407586.korean: 이건 날 유혹하려는 건가?&n후후, 좋아. 즐겁게 유혹당하도록 하지.

1001407587.english: Poseidon has a maternity leave system.&nWhy am I saying this?&n... Don't you already know it well?
1001407587.korean: 포세이돈에는 출산 휴가 제도가 있다.&n왜 이 말을 하는 거냐고?&n...이미 잘 알고 있지 않나?

1001407588.english: Hehe, how is it? This is the dress I prepared for today's party. I was most curious about how it would look to the Commander, more than to anyone else.
1001407588.korean: 헤헤, 어때?&n오늘 파티를 위해서 준비한 드레스야.&n다른 사람보다 사령관의 눈에 어떻게 보일지&n제일 궁금했어.

1001407589.english: You've all worked so hard. We deserve a day like this. Well... though there are people who worked even harder for this party. Like the kitchen staff... and the Sky Knights...
1001407589.korean: 그동안 고생 많이 했잖아.&n이런 날도 있어야지.&n뭐… 이 파티를 위해서 더 고생한 사람도 있지만.&n주방 맴버들이라던가… 스카이 나이츠도…

1001407590.english: Commander, do you want a drink too? We have juice, alcohol, water, sparkling water, and tea. I, I've always been kind, whatever!
1001407590.korean: 사령관도 한잔 할래?&n주스, 술, 물, 탄산수, 차 모두 있어.&n나, 나는 언제나 상냥했다, 뭐!

1001407591.english: The dances performed by idols are really different from the dances done at parties. Don't you want to see how they differ?
1001407591.korean: 아이돌 공연할 때 추던 춤이랑,&n파티에서 추는 춤이랑 많이 다르더라.&n어떻게 다른 지 보고 싶지 않아?

1001407592.english: I heard about what humans were like in the past from old records and from members who have lived since before the apocalypse. Commander… you are worth more than all those terrible humans combined.
1001407592.korean: 옛 자료와 멸망 전부터 살아왔던 대원들에게&n과거의 인간이 어떤지 들었어.&n사령관… 사령관은 그 끔찍한 인간들 모두&n합친 것보다 더 가치있는 사람이야.

1001407593.english: That day… I have no idea how glad I was that I was the one who first met the Commander. Constancia was there too, but still… You say I’m being honest today? … … Fool.
1001407593.korean: 그날… 사령관을 처음 만난 것이&n나라서 얼마나 기쁜지 몰라.&n콘스탄챠도 있기는 했지만 그래도…&n오늘따라 솔직하다고? ……바보.

1001407594.english: P-we're in the middle of a party, you idiot...

1001407595.english: It's a party for everyone, but...&nAt this very moment,&nI'm going to monopolize the commander.
1001407595.korean: 모두를 위한 파티이지만…&n지금 이 순간만큼은&n내가 사령관을 독점할 거야.

1001407596.english: Human, Commander, Pervert, Producer, Fool...&nThinking about it, I've been called a lot of different things too.&nThey called the commander.&n...Hey, honey... Oh, I didn't say anything, did I?
1001407596.korean: 인간, 사령관, 변태, 프로듀서, 바보…&n생각해보니 나도 참 다양한 호칭으로&n사령관을 불렀네.&n……여, 여보… 아, 아무말도 안했다, 뭐!

1001407597.english: Welcome, Master.&nSometimes I just want to talk with you alone...&nWe've prepared a small gathering, if only a modest one.
1001407597.korean: 어서 오세요, 주인님.&n가끔은 단 둘이서 이야기를 나누고 싶어서…&n조촐하게나마 자리를 마련해 보았답니다.

1001407598.english: It's not an important story, so don't worry.&nJust, how are you doing these days...?&nWhat else are you thinking about...?&nI wanted to hear those little stories.
1001407598.korean: 중요한 이야기는 아니니 걱정하지 마세요.&n그냥, 요즘은 어떻게 지내시는지…&n또 무슨 생각을 하고 계신지…&n그런 소소한 이야기들이 듣고 싶었거든요.

1001407599.english: Why am I curious about those things? Well...&nBecause I want to know more about you, Master.&nNot the commander of Orca, but...&nAbout the person called "Master."
1001407599.korean: 왜 그런 것들이 궁금하냐고요? 그야…&n주인님에 대해서 더 알고 싶으니까요.&n오르카의 사령관이 아니라,&n주인님이라는 사람에 대해서 말이에요.

1001407600.english: These flowers are for our meeting today.&nThese are the children I raised myself.&nSince it's a place to serve the master...&nI wanted it to be a little more special.
1001407600.korean: 이 꽃들은 제가 오늘의 만남을 위해&n직접 키운 아이들이랍니다.&n주인님을 모시는 자리인 만큼...&n조금 더 특별한 시간이 되었으면 해서요.

1001407601.english: Are you worried about being cold? It's okay.&nThis snowfield is made of holograms, after all.&nIf you still feel cold even after that...&nIt's okay if you hug each other tightly.
1001407601.korean: 추울까봐 걱정되시나요? 괜찮아요.&n이 설원은 홀로그램으로 만든 거니까요.&n그래도 추운 느낌이 드는 것 같다면…&n서로 꼭 안고 있어도 괜찮겠네요.

1001407602.english: Whenever I think about the times when the master isn't here,&nHow precious you are to me, Master,&nAnd also how much I love you, Master.&nI'm realizing it.
1001407602.korean: 주인님이 계시지 않을 때를 떠올릴 때마다&n주인님이 제게 얼마나 소중한 분인지,&n또 제가 주인님을 얼마나 사랑하고 있는지&n깨닫게 되네요.

1001407603.english: Oh, wait a moment... Please wait.

1001407604.english: If you wish, Master...&nShall we spend some more special time together?
1001407604.korean: 주인님께서 원하신다면…&n함께 좀 더 특별한 시간을… 보내볼까요?

1001407605.english: Are you planning to begin the reconstruction of humanity?&nI'm ready to cooperate anytime.&nOf course, because the other person is the master.
1001407605.korean: 인류 재건 활동을 시작하시려는 건가요?&n전 언제든지 협조할 준비가 되어 있답니다.&n그야, 상대가 주인님이니까요.

1001407606.english: You asked why I became a knight? Steel armor, unwavering loyalty, and even perfect killing ability. Don't I look exactly like a knight?
1001407606.korean: 어째서 기사가 된 거냐고 하셨습니까?&n강철로 된 갑주와, 변하지 않는 충심.&n그리고 완벽한 살해 능력까지.&n기사들의 모습과 똑같지 않습니까?

1001407607.english: The noble duty I have newly discovered is to obey my lord's commands. I will fulfill any order, so please trust me and entrust me with your mission.
1001407607.korean: 제가 새로이 찾아낸 고귀한 의무.&n그것은 주군의 명령을 따르는 것입니다.&n그 어떤 명령이라도 완수할 터이니,&n절 믿고 임무를 맡겨주시길.

1001407608.english: Since I’ve become a Knight of the Azure Sky… I suppose you could say I’ve joined the Sky Knights. …Huh? You’re asking if I’m a Sky Knight and shouldn’t I be doing idol activities?
1001407608.korean: 창공의 기사가 되었으니까… 스카이 나이츠&n소속이 된 거라고 볼 수 있겠군요.&n…네? 스카이 나이츠라면&n아이돌 활동을 해야 하지 않겠냐고요?

1001407609.english: What do you think of my new clothes?&nI tried changing my tone a little to match my outfit...&nMaster, no...&nI hope my lord likes it.
1001407609.korean: 제 새로운 옷에 대해 어떻게 생각하시나요?&n옷에 맞게 조금 말투를 바꿔 보았는데…&n주인님, 아니…&n낭군님께서 마음에 들어 하시면 좋겠네요.

1001407610.english: Huh? If you're going to change it, the name "lemonade" too.&nShouldn't you change it to match your clothes?&n... Authenticity is only maintained as much as necessary.
1001407610.korean: 네? 바꿀 거라면 레모네이드라는 이름도&n옷에 맞게 바꿔야 하지 않겠냐고요?&n...고증은 필요한 만큼만 지키는 거랍니다.

1001407611.english: If it's something that will help my lord...&nI can do anything.&nSo, if there's anything you'd like,&nPlease don't worry about it and speak freely.
1001407611.korean: 낭군님께 도움이 되는 일이라면…&n저는 무엇이든 할 수 있어요.&n그러니 원하시는 게 있다면,&n괘념치 말고 편하게 말씀해 주세요.

1001407612.english: It seems traditional clothing is popular these days.&nThe traditional attire worn by the Horde members&nIs it because it became popular?&nSo... I tried following the trend too.
1001407612.korean: 요즘 전통 의상이 유행인 것 같아요.&n호드 분들이 입으셨던 전통 복장이&n인기를 얻었기 때문일까요?&n그래서... 저도 유행을 따라봤답니다.

1001407613.english: "Nanggun" is a term used to call one's husband, so,&nYou're saying it's not appropriate for the current situation?&nHeh heh, that's right. In the current situation, you see...
1001407613.korean: 낭군은 남편을 부르는 호칭이라서,&n지금 상황에는 맞지 않는 말이라고요?&n후후, 그렇죠. '지금' 상황에는 말이에요…

1001407614.english: Someday... just like we're joking around now...&nIt's not that I call you "My Lord"...&nReally, I consider you, Master, to be my husband.&nI hope the day comes when I'm called.
1001407614.korean: 언젠가는… 지금처럼 장난치듯이&n낭군님이라고 부르는 게 아니라…&n진짜로 주인님을 저의 낭군님이라고&n부르는 날이 왔으면 좋겠네요.

1001407615.english: ...My lord, if you do this, I...&nI can't hold it in anymore...

1001407616.english: I was worried the bedding would be cold when my lord came in, so...&nSince I've warmed it up with my own body...&nWould you like to enjoy the cloud and rain together?
1001407616.korean: 낭군님 들어오실 이불이 차가울까 하여,&n제 몸으로 따뜻하게 데워두었으니...&n함께 운우지락을 즐기지 않으시겠어요?

1001407617.english: Since my lord put the ring on my finger...&nWhenever I look at my hands, I think of my husband.&nI can't stop smiling.
1001407617.korean: 낭군님께서 제게 반지를 끼워 주신 후로...&n손을 볼 때마다 낭군님 생각에&n입가에서 미소가 떠날 줄을 모르겠어요.

1001407618.english: This is a special dessert… just for you, Master. M-please… enjoy it…
1001407618.korean: 주, 주인님만을 위한…&n특별… 디저트입니다.&n마, 맛있게… 드세요…

1001407619.english: I tried desserts from various shops to come up with a new menu just for you, Master. So my weight... Ah, no! Nothing at all!
1001407619.korean: 주인님만을 위한 새로운 메뉴를 구상하기 위해&n여러 가게의 디저트를 먹어봤어요.&n그래서 체중이… 아, 아니에요! 아무것도!

1001407620.english: Come to think of it, Mr. Hachiko mentioned that he is preparing a new menu for the Master as well. He ordered a large quantity of mint... I wonder what kind of menu it is?
1001407620.korean: 그러고 보니 하치코 씨도 주인님을 위한&n새로운 메뉴를 준비중이라고 했어요.&n민트를 대량으로 주문했던데…&n어떤 메뉴일까요?

1001407621.english: It goes without saying, but I didn't use any chocolate. You eat a lot every year, Master. It's a chocolate substitute, so please eat it with peace of mind.
1001407621.korean: 당연하지만 초콜릿은 안 썼어요.&n주인님께선 매년 많이 드시잖아요.&n대용초콜릿이니까 안심하고 드세요.

1001407622.english: Before serving the new dessert to the Master, I had it evaluated by Chef Sowon first. Of course, not for a taste test, but just for the plating!
1001407622.korean: 주인님께 새로운 디저트를 내기 전에&n소완 주방장님께 먼저 평가를 받았어요.&n다, 당연하지만 맛보기가 아니라 플레이팅만요!

1001407623.english: I went through a lot of trial and error to create this menu. I took a picture of the menu I made back then... wouldn't you like to see it?
1001407623.korean: 이 메뉴를 만들기 위해 시행착오를 거쳤어요.&n그 때 만들었던 메뉴 사진 찍어뒀는데…&n보고 싶지... 않으세요?

1001407624.english: Please, please eat it with your mouth! … … What did I just say?
1001407624.korean: 이, 입으로 드셔주세요!&n……내가 무슨 소리를 한 거지?

1001407625.english: Are you reordering?&nThen... would you like to try making it yourself this time?&nAnd then... I could make other things too... Sounds good.
1001407625.korean: 재, 재주문이신가요?&n그러면… 이번엔 직접 만들어… 보시겠어요?&n그러다가… 다른 것도 만들어도... 좋고요.

1001407626.english: Actually, when the master ordered it, I was coming here...&nI was stopped by the City Guard during that time.&nSince it's the master's order, Mr. Thaddeus said...&nThey sighed and sent it.
1001407626.korean: 사실 주인님께서 주문하셨을 때 여기로 오던&n중에 시티 가드의 검문에 걸렸어요.&n주인님의 주문이라고 하니까 사디어스 님이&n한숨을 내쉬면서 보내주시더라구요.

1001407627.english: Hachiko is learning to bake these days! I'm going to make lots of delicious bread and make everyone happy!
1001407627.korean: 하치코, 요즘 제빵을 배우고 있어요!&n맛있는 빵을 잔뜩 만들어서&n모두를 행복하게 만들어 줄 거예요!

1001407628.english: Mint, chocolate, and meat pie. Since three delicious things are combined, it must be three times as delicious, right?
1001407628.korean: 민트와 초코와 미트파이.&n맛있는 것 세 개가 합쳐졌으니까&n세 배로 맛있겠죠?

1001407629.english: We also sell regular meat pies for those who don't like mint chocolate. But... they sell out every day! Isn't that amazing?
1001407629.korean: 민트초코를 싫어하는 사람들을 위해&n일반적인 미트파이도 팔고 있어요.&n그런데... 매일 매진이에요! 대단하죠?

1001407630.english: Thanks to Lilith and Pero's help, I'm now able to sell the mint chocolate meat pie I made! Please give it a try, Master!
1001407630.korean: 리리스 언니랑 페로가 도와줘서,&n제가 만든 민트초코 미트파이를&n판매할 수 있게 되었어요!&n주인님도 한 번 드셔보세요!

1001407631.english: The person who likes mint chocolate meat pies the most isn't actually me, but Valkyrie. This happened a while ago, but she actually packed up all the pies I made!
1001407631.korean: 민트초코 미트파이를 제일 좋아하는 사람은&n사실 제가 아니라 발키리 언니예요.&n예전에 있던 일인데, 제가 만든 파이들을&n전부 포장해갔다니까요?

1001407632.english: I will work hard so that I can cook other breads besides pies! So, I will bake the bread you like every day for you, Master!
1001407632.korean: 파이가 아니라 다른 빵도 요리할 수 있도록&n열심히 노력할게요!&n그래서, 주인님이 좋아하시는 빵을 매일매일&n구워드릴 거예요!

1001407633.english: You might get flour on it!

1001407634.english: Hng, Master's hand... it's so warm...&nHachiko is melting like butter...
1001407634.korean: 흐앙, 주인님의 손… 너무 따뜻해서…&n하치코가 버터처럼 녹아버려요...

1001407635.english: This big meat pie is for the master,&nThis medium-sized meat pie is Hachiko's.&nAnd this little meat pie... hehehe.
1001407635.korean: 이 커다란 미트파이는 주인님 거,&n이 중간 크기 미트파이는 하치코 거,&n그리고 이 작은 미트파이는… 에헤헤.

1001407636.english: For Valentine's Day, I have a gift prepared for you, Master, who always works so hard. And that is... me...
1001407636.korean: 발렌타인 데이를 맞아, 항상 고생하시는&n주인님을 위해 준비한 선물이 있어요.&n그건, 바로… 저… 랍니다.

1001407637.english: The Valentine's gift I prepared for you, Master, is… well… sweet Daphne chocolate… … Ugh, I’m a little embarrassed.
1001407637.korean: 주인님을 위해 제가 준비한&n이번 발렌타인 선물은… 그러니까…&n달콤한 다프네 초콜릿이에요…&n…으으, 조금 부끄럽네요.

1001407638.english: … Please keep it a secret from Aqua that I am wearing these clothes. Aqua has been copying my outfits lately...
1001407638.korean: …제가 이런 옷을 입고 있다는 건&n아쿠아에게는 비밀로 해 주세요.&n아쿠아가 요즘 제가 입는 옷을&n따라 입고는 하거든요...

1001407639.english: Actually, Rize prepared this outfit for me. She has changed a lot since the past, too. Now she is a cute and reliable older sister.
1001407639.korean: 사실 이 옷은 리제 언니가 준비해 준 거예요.&n언니도 예전이랑은 많이 달라졌거든요.&n이제는 귀엽고 든든한 언니랍니다.

1001407640.english: To be honest, I am a little embarrassed. It’s quite different from my usual style. Still, keeping in mind that you, Master, will see this... I worked hard to prepare it.
1001407640.korean: 솔직히 조금 부끄럽기는 해요.&n평소의 제 스타일과는 많이 다르니까요.&n그래도, 주인님이 보실 것을 생각하면서...&n열심히 준비했답니다.

1001407641.english: I wish the chocolate were sweeter. It feels like it isn't sweet enough to express my feelings for you, Master.
1001407641.korean: 초콜릿이 더 달콤했으면 좋겠어요.&n주인님을 향한 제 마음을 표현하기에는…&n충분히 달콤하지 않은 것처럼 느껴져서요.

1001407642.english: Okay, just a moment. There is one more thing to prepare...
1001407642.korean: 자, 잠시만요. 준비할 게 하나 남아서…

1001407643.english: The master doesn't really like chocolate.&nI know you don't want to... but still... I...&nWould you like to try Daphne's chocolates?
1001407643.korean: 주인님이 초콜릿을 그리 좋아하지&n않으신다는 건 알고 있지만… 그래도… 저…&n다프네 초콜릿은 한번 맛보지 않으실래요?

1001407644.english: For your next Valentine's Day gift...&nWhat do you want to receive?&n... I want to hold the master's child...&nWhat do you think?
1001407644.korean: 다음 발렌타인 데이 선물로…&n뭘 받고 싶냐고요?&n...주인님의 아이를… 안아보고 싶은데…&n어떻게 생각하시나요?

1001407645.english: It's my first vacation in a long time, so I prepared these new clothes to hang out with you, Commander. How do you like them, Commander? Do you like my new clothes?
1001407645.korean: 오랜만의 휴가라서, 사령관이랑 같이&n놀려고 누나가 준비한 새 옷이거든?​&n어때, 우리 사령관.&n누나 새 옷이 마음에 들어?

1001407646.english: If anything needs fixing, call me! It’s not a problem to do maintenance even while wearing light clothes like this.
1001407646.korean: 수리할 일이 있으면 누나를 불러 줘!​&n이렇게 가벼운 옷을 입어도 정비하는&n데에는 무리가 없거든.

1001407647.english: I've made all the snacks and the drinks are ready. Great, I'm all set to go! And most importantly for me… if I take care of our Commander, I'll be done!
1001407647.korean: 간식도 다 만들었고, 음료수도 준비 완료.&n좋아, 놀러 갈 준비 다 됐거든!​&n그리고 누나한테 제일 중요한…&n우리 사령관까지 챙기면 끝!

1001407648.english: I wasn't planning on wearing this outfit, but Harpeia recommended it, you know? She said the Commander would like it... I guess I should thank him later.
1001407648.korean: 누나는 이 옷 입을 생각 없었는데,&n하르페이아가 권해서 입은 거거든?​&n사령관이 좋아할 거라고 하던데…&n나중에 고맙다고 해야겠네.

1001407649.english: You ask why I'm so serious about my vacation? Well, I do like my maintenance work, but... I really, really love hanging out with the Commander!
1001407649.korean: 왜 이렇게 휴가에 진심이냐고?&n그야, 누나는 정비 일도 좋아하지만...​&n사령관이랑 같이 노는 것도&n정말정말 좋아하거든!

1001407650.english: Shall I tell you a secret? Actually, I don't care where the vacation is. As long as the Commander is by my side, I can have a great time.
1001407650.korean: 누나가 비밀 얘기 하나 해 줄까?&n사실, 휴가 장소는 어디라도 좋아.​&n누나는 사령관만 옆에 있으면&n즐거운 시간을 보낼 수 있거든.

1001407651.english: Ah, sis, I'm sweating right now, so it's a bit like this...
1001407651.korean: 앗, 누나 지금 땀 나서 조금 그렇거든…

1001407652.english: Sister... my chest feels a little tight...&nCould you... take it off a bit more easily, please?
1001407652.korean: 누나… 가슴 부분이 조금 답답한데…&n좀 편하게… 벗겨 주면 좋겠거든?

1001407653.english: Since you might get cold if you sweat after playing a lot...&nLet's hug tightly, okay?&nFrom now on, it's okay to hug me... and it's also okay if you don't.
1001407653.korean: 잔뜩 놀다가 땀 나면 추울지도 모르니까…&n누나랑 꼭 끌어안고 있자?​&n지금부터 끌어안고 있어도… 좋고.

1001407654.english: Ahoy, Commander! It's the privateer Phoenix!&n...Wait, are you saying that even tho there's no ship, you're still a pirate?&nYou're not thinking of making a lame tackle, are you?
1001407654.korean: 아호이, 사령관! 사략해적 피닉스야!&n…잠깐, 설마 배도 없는데 왜 해적이냐는&n멋없는 태클을 걸 생각은 아니겠지?

1001407655.english: "...Why the sudden pirate costume?"&nNo, I definitely told the brownie...&nI told you to order beachwear...&nSigh, well... I just had a bit of a situation.
1001407655.korean: …왜 갑자기 해적 복장이냐고?&n아니, 난 분명 브라우니한테&n해변용 복장을 주문하라고 했는데…&n하아, 뭐… 그냥 일이 좀 있었어.

1001407656.english: Since we're going to do pirate cosplay anyway,&nShouldn't we do it properly?&nSo... as I was studying about pirates...&nHe even got a privateer's license.
1001407656.korean: 기왕 해적 코스프레를 할 거라면,&n제대로 해야 하지 않겠어?&n그래서… 해적에 대해 공부하다보니…&n사략해적 면허까지 따 버렸어.

1001407657.english: Where did the Baek-o-mil army go? Here it is.&nEven tho I've become a bit more classic to match the outfit,&nThe performance is still uncertain.
1001407657.korean: 백오밀 군은 어디 갔냐고? 여기 있잖아.&n복장에 맞게 좀 클래식해지기는 했어도,&n성능은 아직 확실하다고.

1001407658.english: There are quite a few pirate concepts in Orca...&nAre we going to end up forming a pirate crew or something?&nWell, if that happens... the boss would be the commander, right?
1001407658.korean: 오르카에 해적 컨셉이 상당히 많은데…&n이러다가 해적단이라도 생기는 거 아니야?&n뭐, 그렇게 되면… 대장은 사령관이려나?

1001407659.english: Of course, I don't have a boat. But...&nThere's only one person who can carry me.&nCommander, why don't we take the Phoenix for a spin...&nWant to try a night sail together?
1001407659.korean: 물론 나한테 배는 없지. 하지만…&n내 위에 태워줄 수 있는 사람은 하나 있어.&n사령관, 한번 피닉스 호를 타고…&n둘이서 밤 항해라도 해 볼래?

1001407660.english: how fearsome a pirate I am&nYou've become curious, haven't you?
1001407660.korean: 내가 얼마나 무시무시한 해적인지&n알고 싶어진 거야?

1001407661.english: I'm a privateer, so if you want something,&nYou can loot, you know?&nSo, from now on, the things absolutely necessary for rebuilding humanity are...&nWe're going to loot the supplies.&nThe commander, you know.
1001407661.korean: 난 사략해적이니까, 원하는 게 있으면&n약탈해도 되거든?&n그러니까, 지금부터 인류 재건에 꼭 필요한&n물자를 약탈할 거야.&n사령관 말이야.

1001407662.english: Commander, how about starting a pirate crew?&nWe don't have any crew members yet, though...&nIf the commander puts in the effort, it could happen quickly.
1001407662.korean: 사령관, 해적단 하나 만들 생각 없어?&n아직 선원이 하나도 없긴 한데…&n사령관이 노력하면 금방 생길 수도 있어.

1001407663.english: A little kid carrying an axe glared at me like I was an enemy. I gave him a light scare, and even though he was trembling, he didn't run away. Hah! How audacious.
1001407663.korean: 도끼를 들고 다니는 꼬맹이가 나를&n원수 보듯이 노려보더군.&n가볍게 겁을 줬는데 벌벌 떨면서도&n도망은 안 치더군. 핫! 당돌하긴.

1001407664.english: Don't put me in the same hangar as Glacias. Just looking at that pale fuselage makes my circuits feel like they're going to reject me.
1001407664.korean: 날 글라시아스랑 같은 격납고에 넣지 마라.&n그 허여멀건한 동체를 보기만 해도&n회로에 거부반응이 일어날 것 같으니까.

1001407665.english: My weapon is named Cocktail Maker, but I don't have the ability to make cocktails. … No, I should say I didn't… You damn Deconstructor.
1001407665.korean: 내 무장의 이름이 칵테일 메이커긴 하지만&n내게 칵테일 제조 기능은 없다.&n…아니, 없었다고 해야 맞겠군…&n빌어먹을 해체자 같으니.

1001407666.english: Why? Is this the first time you've seen me like this? If you have a complaint, say it. Go ahead and say it. It looks like you have something to say. Don't hold it in, just say it.
1001407666.korean: 왜? 이런 모습 처음 보냐?&n불만 있으면 말해. 말해보라고.&n할 말 있는 거 같은데? 참지 말고 말하라고.

1001407667.english: Sorry. If you don't have anything urgent, let's meet later. Hongryeon might collapse upon seeing this... Oh my... I didn't know Hongryeon would be like this...
1001407667.korean: 미안. 급한 용건 없으면 나중에 보자.&n홍련이 이 모습 보고 쓰러져서…&n아씨... 홍련이 이럴 줄은 몰랐는데…

1001407668.english: That bowl-cut girl, that old-fashioned jerk is such a nuisance. She goes on and on about rules and laws for everything. Does she really follow all that herself?
1001407668.korean: 바가지 머리, 그 꼰대 년이 귀찮게 하잖아.&n사사건건 규칙이 어쩌고 법이 저쩌고.&n지는 뭐 그런 거 다 지키고 사나?

1001407669.english: Who said a tuna can was torn open? Which bitch dares to cause trouble in my territory? I'll smash her to pieces so she trembles at the sight of me.
1001407669.korean: 누가 참치캔 뜯겼다고?&n어떤 년이 내 구역에서 설치냐?&n나만 보면 벌벌 떨게 작살을 내버리겠어.

1001407670.english: How much do you have? Nothing? Take out your wallet. You really don't have any... Then I'm treating today. Don't tell the others.
1001407670.korean: 얼마있냐? 없어? 지갑 꺼내봐.&n진짜 없네…&n그러면 오늘은 이 누나가 쏜다.&n다른 애들한테는 말하지 말고.

1001407671.english: Hey, come here. Are you going to eat me? Just come when I tell you to. Hmm... the more I look at you, the more you're totally my type. From now on, you're my boyfriend. Don't even think about looking at other guys.
1001407671.korean: 야, 여기 와 봐. 누가 잡아먹냐? 오라면 오라고.&n흐음… 보면 볼수록 내 취향이다?&n이제부터 너 내 남친이다.&n다른 애들한테 눈 돌리지마라.

1001407673.english: Huh? Chun-ah, you said you liked this look...&nDid you not like it? If you don't like it, just quit...&nWas it good? If it was good... I'll show you an even better side of myself.
1001407673.korean: 어? 처, 천아가 너는 이런 모습 좋아한다고…&n싫었어? 싫으면 그만 두고…&n좋았어? 좋았으면… 더 좋은 모습 보여줄게.

1001407674.english: When I found out Cheon-ah had lied,&nI was really angry, but I'm okay now.&nBecause my boyfriend said it was good. And...&nCheon-ah, I turned off the boiler while you were showering, so I got my revenge.
1001407674.korean: 천아가 속였다는 걸 알았을 때는&n많이 빡쳤는데… 지금은 괜찮아.&n남친이 좋다고 했으니까. 그리고…&n천아 샤워할 때 보일러 꺼서 복수했으니까.

1001407675.english: What were you doing that made you so late? Hurry up! Don't make my hand cold. ...What are you doing? You need to hold my hand right away.
1001407675.korean: 뭐 하다가 이렇게 늦었어?&n빨리빨리 좀 다니란 말이야!&n나 손 시리게 하지 말고.&n...뭐해? 빨리 손 잡아줘야지.

1001407676.english: You know how this outfit is super hard to find? Orders were backed up so much that even I couldn't get one. But there are some rain boots left over? So I borrowed one~.
1001407676.korean: 이 옷, 구하기 엄청 힘들다?&n주문이 하도 밀려서 나도 못 구했다고.&n그런데 장화 옷이 남네?&n그래서 장화 옷 한 벌 빌렸지~.

1001407677.english: You're asking if Janghwa won't get angry if I wear whatever I want? It's fine, it's fine. We're close, so... ...and she's getting angry? You petty bitch.
1001407677.korean: 옷 멋대로 입으면 장화가 화 안 내냐고?&n괜찮아, 괜찮아. 우리 친해서 그런 걸로…&n…화 내네? 쪼잔한 년 같으니라고.

1001407678.english: Varg and Fafnir get along surprisingly well? Maybe it's because they both have a bit of a goofy side... They really hit it off.
1001407678.korean: 바르그랑 파프니르, 의외로 잘 지내더라?&n둘 다 좀 바보같은 면이 있어서 그런가…&n서로 죽이 잘 맞아.

1001407679.english: I have to go out on a mission and I'm freezing to death... Hand warmer, I'm borrowing your clothes. Make good use of them and return them. Why take your clothes, you ask? Because they smell like you, so it's reassuring~
1001407679.korean: 작전 나가야 하는데 추워 죽겠네…&n핫팩, 옷 좀 빌려간다? 잘 쓰고 돌려줄게.&n왜 하필 네 옷을 가져가냐고?&n네 냄새가 나서 안심되거든~

1001407680.english: "How long are you going to keep calling it 'our hot pack'? Why, rather than 'our hot pack'... do you like 'my hot pack' better? Heh, don't worry. I wasn't planning on giving it to anyone anyway."
1001407680.korean: 언제까지 우리 핫팩이라고 부를 거냐고?&n왜, 우리 핫팩보다… '내 핫팩' 쪽이 더 좋아?&n킥, 걱정마. 안 그래도 남 줄 생각 없으니까.

1001407681.english: No, I'm telling you, it's a no-go until we get married!

1001407682.english: Hot pack, do you want to study biology with me?&nOkay. Then, shall we find out together...?&nHow large an object a snake can swallow.
1001407682.korean: 핫팩, 나랑 같이 생물 공부하고 싶어?&n좋아. 그럼 같이 알아볼까…?&n뱀이 얼마나 큰 물건까지 삼킬 수 있는지.

1001407683.english: Boyfriend~ Your girlfriend is so cold.&nShouldn't we raise their body temperature quickly?&nCome here and give me a big hug.
1001407683.korean: 남치인~ 애인이 이렇게 추워하는데&n빨리 체온 상승 좀 시켜줘야 하지 않겠어?&n이리 와서 꼭 안아봐.

1001407684.english: Addiction prevention education? Who should I target? … … Me? Why me? Caffeine and nicotine addiction? I strictly consume only the necessary amount…
1001407684.korean: 중독 예방 교육? 누구를 대상으로 하면 돼?&n……나? 내가 왜? 카페인이랑 니코틴 중독?&n나는 철저하게 필요한 양만 섭취하는데…

1001407685.english: Since I'm a member of the Health Committee, I have medical knowledge too... Red medicine for external wounds, white medicine for the inside. Just kidding. But the Cannoneer's captain nodded in agreement... I wonder why?
1001407685.korean: 보건위원이니까 나도 의료지식 있어...&n겉의 상처에는 빨간약, 속에는 하얀 약.&n농담이야. 그런데 캐노니어의 대장은&n맞다고 고개를 끄덕이더라… 왤까?

1001407686.english: The Bloody Panther comes by every day asking if their captain is here. Nashorn isn't always here... but he was here today?
1001407686.korean: 블러디 팬서가 맨날 찾아와서&n자기네 대장 여기 있냐고 물어봐.&n나스호른이 언제나 있는 건 아닌데…&n……오늘은 있었네?

1001407687.english: This? Scarabia… the instruction manual… Talonfeather made this to give me work… but there was a separate version for commanders… Do you want to see what it’s about… together?
1001407687.korean: 이거? 스카라비아… 사용 설명서…&n탈론페더가 나 일 시킨다고 만든 건데…&n사령관용은 따로 있더라…&n어떤 내용인지… 같이 볼래?

1001407688.english: There are some kids who secretly tamper with their health records. So there are some whose records differ from their actual health. Me? Forty... Do you want the Commander to measure it himself?
1001407688.korean: 몰래 건강기록부 수정하는 애들도 있어.&n그래서 기록부랑 실제랑 다른 애들도 있어.&n나? 사십... 사령관이 직접 측정해볼래?

1001407689.english: Commander… I’m asleep. So… I won’t know what you do… … … Don’t worry, it’s a YES today. Actually, if it’s you, Commander, it’s always a YES, but…
1001407689.korean: 사령관… 나 자고 있어.&n그러니… 사령관이 무슨 짓을 해도 몰라…&n……오늘은 YES니까 걱정마.&n사실 사령관이라면 언제나 YES지만…

1001407690.english: What if the others come... Well... I guess it doesn't really matter?
1001407690.korean: 다른 애들 오면 어쩌려고…&n뭐… 딱히 상관없나?

1001407691.english: Among the things a health commissioner does...&nThere's also sex education...&nTogether... Should we make some audiovisual materials?
1001407691.korean: 보건위원이 하는 일 중에…&n성교육도 있는데…&n같이... 시청각 자료… 만들까?

1001407692.english: Commander... no overwork. So lie down next to me.&nIt's a narrow bed for two people to lie on, but...&nIt's okay if I'm with the commander.&nThat means we can be that close together.
1001407692.korean: 사령관… 과로 금지. 그러니 내 옆에 누워.&n둘이 눕기에는 좁은 침대지만…&n사령관이랑 함께라면 괜찮아.&n그만큼 가까이 붙어있을 수 있잖아.

1001407693.english: What's the use of cleaning it all day long when it's a mess from the start? Where did you squander all that money? Tsk! Ah. I mean my gun, Commander. Can't you swap it with me?
1001407693.korean: 백날 손질하면 뭘 해. 기본부터 글러먹었는데.&n그 많은 돈 어디다 빼돌리고 쯧!&n아. 제 총 말입니다.&n사령관님. 무기 바꿔주시면 안 됩니까?

1001407694.english: Ryan is an ammunition carrier and a transport soldier. He is a huge help in situations where vehicle or air resupply is impossible. He also engages in hand-to-hand combat when my gun malfunctions. Very often.
1001407694.korean: 라이언은 탄약수이자 수송병입니다.&n차량이나 항공 보급이 불가능한 상황에&n큰 도움이 되죠. 또 제 총기가 작동 불량일 때&n백병전을 수행합니다. 엄청 자주요.

1001407695.english: I asked Gremlin to upgrade my weapon... and she hugged my gun and cried. She asked why I was born so hopeless... Ha ha ha. That hopeless thing is my standard issue weapon.
1001407695.korean: 그렘린 언니에게 무기 개량을 부탁했더니…&n제 총을 끌어안고 울더군요.&n왜 이렇게 답이 없게 태어났냐고…&n하. 하. 하. 그 답 없는 게 제 제식무기입니다.

1001407696.english: Vera often tells me not to charge blindly, but... what can I do? I won't get shot unless I get right in front of the enemy...
1001407696.korean: 베라 언니가 무턱대고 돌격하지 말라고&n자주 말하지만…&n적 코앞까지 가지 않으면&n총이 맞지 않는 걸 어쩝니까…

1001407697.english: I know very well that I have a bad personality. But… I hate the fact that I can’t be of proper help to my sisters so much…
1001407697.korean: 제 성격이 나쁜 건 잘 알고 있습니다.&n하지만… 자매들에게 제대로 도움이&n되지 못하는 사실이 너무 싫어서…

1001407698.english: I've been receiving psychological counseling lately. They told me to think of things that calm my mind when I get angry. My sisters, Ryan. And… Bee, it's a secret.
1001407698.korean: 요즘 심리 상담을 받고 있습니다.&n화가 날 때에는 마음을 안정시키는 것을&n떠올리라고 하더군요.&n자매들, 라이언. 그리고… 비, 비밀입니다.

1001407699.english: Why, Ryan? Are you bored? Ah, it's the Commander. What can I do for you?

1001407700.english: Um... Commander?&nWould you keep petting me?&nThings keep happening that make me angry...&nYes... thank you..."
1001407700.korean: 저기… 사령관님?&n계속 쓰다듬어 주시겠습니까?&n화나는 일이 계속 생겨서…&n네… 감사합니다…

1001407701.english: Commander, oh...&nI'm sorry, I'm sorry. Without even realizing it...&nHuh? Are you okay?&nC-Commander, please hug me. Hehehe.
1001407701.korean: 사령관님~ 아…&n죄, 죄송합니다. 저도 모르게…&n네? 괜찮… 나요?&n사, 사령관님~ 안아주세요. 헤헤헤.

1001407702.english: I get angry less these days than I used to. Things that make me angry are still the same, though… I think I’ve become more patient. So please give me a compliment. Hehehe.
1001407702.korean: 요즘은 옛날보다 화내는 일이 적어졌어요.&n화나게 만드는 일은 여전하지만…&n참을성이 많아진 거 같아요.&n그러니 칭찬해주세요. 헤헤헤.

1001407703.english: Originally, Ryan was developed separately from me. However, since Ryan and I are a good match and he is especially helpful for my psychological stability, Captain Leona told us to travel together.
1001407703.korean: 원래 라이언은 저랑 별개로 개발되었어요.&n하지만 저랑 라이언이 궁합이 잘 맞고&n특히나 제 심리 안정에 도움이 돼서&n레오나 대장님이 함께 다니라고 했어요.

1001407704.english: I trained with Steel Line last time... Is it Leprechaun? It was interesting to see the weapon he used fire without a single malfunction. ... ... It was incredibly interesting.
1001407704.korean: 지난 번에 스틸라인이랑 같이 훈련을 했는데…&n레프리콘인가? 그 사람이 쓰는 무기가&n작동불량 하나 없이 발사되는 게 흥미로웠어요.&n……엄청 흥미로웠어요.

1001407705.english: I think I need to limit how often I pat your head. It's not because I'm annoyed, but because it feels so good. So... just... 100 times a day!
1001407705.korean: 머리 쓰다듬는 거 횟수 제한해야 할 거 같아요.&n기분나빠서 그런 게 아니라 너무 기분 좋아서요.&n그러니... 하루에… 100번만!

1001407706.english: Hahaha! Just like our Quartermaster. I told you, he'll make anything you ask him to. This? A paint-splattering bomb. The explosive power is still the same. You want to see it? You do, don't you? Let's see!
1001407706.korean: 캬하핫! 역시 우리 보급관.&n만들어달라면 다 만들어준다니까.&n이거? 물감 튀는 폭탄. 폭발력은 여전한 거.&n보고 싶어? 보고 싶지? 보자고!

1001407707.english: I was thinking of forming a crew with Sylphid... but we decided against it because of a difference of opinion. That guy insisted that Mei is the best! No matter what anyone says, Captain Khan is the best!
1001407707.korean: 실피드랑 크루 한 번 짜보려고 했는데…&n견해 차이로 안 하기로 했어.&n그 녀석이 메이가 최고라고 우겼다고!&n누가 뭐래도 최고는 칸 대장이잖아!

1001407708.english: You know how I found a warehouse full of spray paint while scouting for supplies? I played around with the spray until the transport unit arrived, and that's how I got into graffiti.
1001407708.korean: 전에 물자 탐색하다가 스프레이가&n잔뜩 있는 창고 발견했잖아.&n수송부대 올 때까지 스프레이 가지고 놀다가&n그래피티에 빠져들었지.

1001407709.english: An artist? Who? Me? Nah, I hate that. Hearing things like that makes me care what others think. I just want to draw what I want to draw.
1001407709.korean: 아티스트? 누가? 내가?&n에이~ 싫어, 그런 거.&n그런 소리 들으면 남의 눈 신경 써야 하잖아.&n나는 내가 그리고 싶은 것만 그리고 싶다고.

1001407710.english: Keshik scolded me for vandalizing the Horde barracks. I told him not to think I would draw in such an easy place, and he understood. It's true that I drew it, though.
1001407710.korean: 호드 병영에 낙서했냐고 케시크가 혼냈어.&n내가 그렇게 쉬운 곳에 그릴 거 같냐고&n말하니까 납득하더라.&n내가 그린 거 맞지만.

1001407711.english: Commander, may I take a few photos? I plan to draw you as a character later. And also, because I want them for myself!
1001407711.korean: 사령관, 사진 몇 장 찍어도 될까?&n나중에 사령관을 캐릭터로 그리려고.&n그리고 내가 가지고 싶으니까!

1001407712.english: I'm going to go around writing "The Commander is a pervert" all over the walls! … … Since it's true, I wonder if it will have any impact?
1001407712.korean: 온 벽에다가 사령관은 변태라고&n쓰고 다닐 거야!&n……사실이라 타격은 없으려나?

1001407713.english: Hahaha! I knew it!&nThe commander wouldn't just stand still!&nSo... I drew on my body...&nShall I show you? No... please forgive me..."
1001407713.korean: 캬하핫! 이럴 줄 알았어!&n사령관이 가만히 있을 리 없지!&n그래서… 내 몸에 그림 그렸는데…&n보여 줄까? 아니… 봐줘…

1001407714.english: Did you see the letters I painted on the wall recently?&nYou didn't see it?&nThose are the names I've thot of for our babies!&nWhat do you like about it? Huh?
1001407714.korean: 내가 최근에 벽에 그린 글자들 봤어?&n못 봤다고?&n내가 생각해둔 우리 아기들 이름이라고!&n뭐가 마음에 들어? 응?

1001407715.english: You ask what I saw this time to be acting like this? It's a classic game called *Kangpa Girl Clover-chan*. Look it up later.
1001407715.korean: 이번엔 또 뭘 봤길래 이러는 거냐고?&n<경파소녀 클로버양>이라는 고전 게임이야.&n나중에 한번 찾아봐.

1001407716.english: Of course, the delinquent concept has gone out of fashion. But you know the word "classic," right? It's like the style of a bygone era, just like a cowboy in a Western.
1001407716.korean: 물론 불량배 컨셉이 유행이 지나긴 했지.&n하지만 클래식이라는 말도 있잖아?&n이건 마치 서부극의 카우보이처럼&n옛 시대의 멋 같은 거라고.

1001407717.english: My goal is to one day succeed Captain Khan and become the second leader of the Horde Alliance. Though that seems a bit difficult for now.
1001407717.korean: 내 목표는 언젠가 칸 대장의 뒤를 이어서&n호드 연합의 2대 두목이 되는 거야.&n아직까진 좀 힘들 것 같지만 말이지.

1001407718.english: I heard that wearing a long skirt looks rebellious, so I tried it on... and the city guards really loved it. Being rebellious is really hard to define.
1001407718.korean: 치마가 긴 게 불량스러운 거라고 하길래&n한번 입어봤는데…&n시티가드에서 엄청 좋아하더라고.&n불량이라는 거 참 어렵구만.

1001407719.english: A woman who calls herself a delinquent should use a yo-yo as a weapon... but I went out to fight with a yo-yo and gave up because Kesik freaked out.
1001407719.korean: 불량배를 자칭하는 여자라면&n요요를 무기로 써야 하는 법인데…&n요요를 들고 싸우러 나갔다가&n케시크가 기겁하길래 포기했어.

1001407720.english: I've noticed a lot of clichés in creative works where delinquents become good after getting married and starting a family. So... if the Commander wants to make me good, you know what to do, right?
1001407720.korean: 창작물 속의 불량배는 결혼하고&n가정을 꾸리고 나서 착해졌다는&n클리셰가 많이 나오더라고.&n그럼... 사령관이 날 착하게 만들고 싶다면&n어떻게 해야 할지 알겠지?

1001407721.english: Do you want to get hit with a bamboo stick filled with love?
1001407721.korean: 사랑이 담긴 죽도로 한 번 맞아 볼래?

1001407722.english: You're quite fearless, Commander...?&nThen, how far can I become bold...?&nShall we take a look?
1001407722.korean: 상당히 겁이 없는데, 사령관…?&n그럼 어디까지 대담해질 수 있는지…&n한 번 볼까?

1001407723.english: Thugs don't follow rules.&nSo... Even if you do lewd things all the time,&nSo you're saying there's absolutely no problem?
1001407723.korean: 불량배는 규칙 같은 거 안 지켜.&n그러니까... 시도때도 없이 야한 짓을 해도&n전혀 문제가 없단 얘기지.

1001407724.english: This time, I'm going to conquer the music world!&nI'm not wearing these clothes because of that reason...&nI just wore it because I wanted to hold a concert!
1001407724.korean: 이번에는 음악계를 평정하고야 말겠다!&n…라는 이유로 이런 옷을 입은 건 아니고…&n그냥 음악회를 열어보고 싶어서 입은 거야!

1001407725.english: My greatest strength is conducting, but&nStill, I can play a few instruments.&nFor example... um... Theremin, perhaps...?
1001407725.korean: 내가 제일 자신있는 건 지휘지만,&n그래도 악기도 몇 개는 다룰 줄 알아.&n예를 들면… 음... 테레민이라던가…?

1001407726.english: Did you study music hard originally? Of course!&nWhen going to the battlefield,&nIt's supposed to have cool background music, right?
1001407726.korean: 원래 음악 공부를 열심히 했냐고? 당연하지!&n모름지기 전장에 나갈 때는&n멋진 배경음악이 깔려야 하는 법이잖아!

1001407727.english: Want to listen to a song I made?&nIt's a song titled "Poseidon March"...&n...the title sounds familiar?&nTch, that's why those quick-witted guys are...
1001407727.korean: 내가 만든 노래 들어볼래?&n'포세이돈 마치'라는 제목의 곡인데...&n…어디서 많이 들은 제목이라고?&n칫, 이래서 눈치 빠른 녀석들은…

1001407728.english: Arthur, if there's a song you want to hear, just let me know!&nFrom classical to electronic music&nI've collected albums from various genres!&n...Why? I didn't say I could play it.
1001407728.korean: 아서, 듣고 싶은 곡 있으면 말만 해!&n클래식부터 일렉트로닉 음악까지&n다양한 장르의 음반을 수집해 놨거든!&n…왜? 연주할 수 있다곤 안 했잖아.

1001407729.english: What music term suits me?&nLovely amabile?&nOr perhaps an elegant grazioso?&n...What? How about "ridiculously"?&nArthur! Take that back!!
1001407729.korean: 나한테 어울리는 음악 용어는 뭘까?&n사랑스러운 아마빌레?&n아니면 우아한 그라치오소?&n…뭐? '우스꽝스럽게'는 어떠냐고?&n아서! 그 말 취소해!!

1001407730.english: It's good manners to watch the performance until the end, Arthur!

1001407731.english: Arthur, would you like to play it this time?&nBut the instrument I'll be playing this time... is me.
1001407731.korean: 이번에는 아서가 한 번 연주해 볼래?&n그런데 이번에 연주할 악기는… 바로 나야.

1001407732.english: Duets are good, but trios or quartets are even better.&nAre you thinking of holding another concert?&nNo, we were planning a family.
1001407732.korean: 듀엣도 좋지만, 트리오나 콰르텟은 더 좋지.&n또 음악회를 열 생각이냐고?&n아니, 가족 계획 중이었는데?

1001407733.english: Producer! Do you like my outfit concept this time? I even trained really hard on special poses to show you! Look at this! Hop hop!
1001407733.korean: 프로듀서! 내 이번 의상 컨셉은 마음에 들어?​&n프로듀서 보여주려고 스페셜 포즈도 열심히 트레이닝 했어!​&n이거봐! 깡총깡총!​

1001407734.english: Producer, do you want to try wearing matching bunny girl outfits with me next time? Just kidding~ Don't make that face~
1001407734.korean: 프로듀서도 다음에 나랑 같이 커플 바니걸 의상 입어볼래? ​&n장난이야~ 너무 그런 표정 짓지마~​

1001407735.english: The fans will like the special outfit I worked so hard to prepare, right? You think they will like it? Thank you~! Producer!
1001407735.korean: 팬분들도 열심히 준비한 내 특별 의상을 좋아해 주시겠지? ​​&n좋아해 줄거라고? 고마워~! 프로듀서!​

1001407736.english: Hey Producer~ Why do you keep glancing at me..? You can just look comfortably~ Should I strike a pose?
1001407736.korean: 저기이 프로듀서~ 왜 자꾸 힐끔힐끔 보는 거야..? 그냥 편하게 봐도 돼~ 포즈라도 취해 볼까? ​

1001407737.english: The producer likes me~ The producer likes me~ I heard my voice has the power to move people's hearts, so I'm testing it out~!
1001407737.korean: 프로듀서는 날 좋아한다~ 프로듀서는 날 좋아한다~ &n내 목소리에 사람 마음을 움직이는 힘이 있다고 해서 실험해보는 중이야~!​

1001407738.english: I've always stood on stage for my fans. But I don't think I need to anymore. Because now, you are the only fan I need... Producer♥ Tonight, I'll prepare a performance just for you~ Will you... harmonize with me?
1001407738.korean: 난 항상 나의 팬들을 위해 무대를 섰어. 하지만 이제 그럴 필요 없을 것 같아. &n왜냐하면 이제 내가 필요로 하는 팬은 너 하나 뿐니까..&n프로듀서씨♥ 오늘 밤, 프로듀서만을 위한 공연을 준비할게~ 나와 함께.. 하모니를 맞춰보겠어?​

1001407739.english: I'd like you to respect the boundaries between the producer and me.

1001407740.english: How did you know the concept for today's performance was a seductive bunny girl? Could you please produce my performance tonight to see if there are any flaws?
1001407740.korean: 오늘 공연은 컨셉은 유혹하는 바니걸 컨셉인 거 어떻게 알았어?​&n내 퍼포먼스에 결점은 없는 지 오늘 밤.. 프로듀싱을 부탁해도 될까?​

1001407741.english: It's wonderful to be so completely captivated by someone like this... I feel like I've become a fan of someone too. Please take care of me from now on. My own A. This. Stone. ♥
1001407741.korean: 누군가에 이렇게 푹 빠진다는 건 행복한 일이구나.. 나도 누군가의 팬이 된 것만 같아.​&n앞으로 잘 부탁해요. 나만의 아.이.돌.♥​

1001407742.english: "Young girl, this is a training outfit I prepared to show you a different side of myself, my lord. Doesn't it remind you of a wild rabbit caught in a net?"
1001407742.korean: 소녀,&n주공께 색다른 모습을 선보이고자&n마련한 수련복이옵니다.​&n꼭 그물에 걸린 야생의 토끼를&n연상시키는 모습이지 않사옵니까?​

1001407743.english: It is said that rabbits have thick, fluffy fur on their soles to reduce the impact from the load during fast running or high jumps... but in your sight, My Lord, what is the girl's like...?
1001407743.korean: 토끼는 빠른 달리기나 높은 도약 시&n하중으로부터 오는 충격을 줄이기 위해&n발바닥에도 복슬복슬한 털이&n가득하다 하옵니다만…&n주공이 보시기에 소녀의 것은,&n어떻사온지…?​

1001407744.english: My Lord, perhaps one girl would be enough for your rabbit… However, I am undoubtedly the only one who devotes my whole heart to you…!
1001407744.korean: 주공의 토끼는&n소녀 하나 만으로도 족하지 않을 지…&n허나, 주공께 온 정성을 다하는 건&n소녀 하나 뿐일 것임에 틀림 없사와요…!

1001407745.english: Responding to a man's curiosity is surely a woman's innate destiny, and please, other places as well…
1001407745.korean: 사내의 호기심에 응하는 것이야말로&n응당 여인의 타고난 숙명 아니겠사옵니까,&n부디 다른 곳도…​

1001407746.english: They say rabbits have truly incredible reproductive capabilities... Girl, isn't this a wild rabbit hunted by the Lord...?
1001407746.korean: 토끼들은 그 번식력이&n참으로 대단하다고 하온데…&n소녀, 주공이 사냥한 야생의 토끼…&n아니겠사와요?

1001407747.english: Oh, girl... I... I can't control myself anymore...
1001407747.korean: 소, 소녀… 더 이상은…&n주체하지 못 하겠사와요…​

1001407749.english: Uh... how could I... with these filthy feet, my lord's... A maiden, I cannot do such a thing! If my lord desires it so much... Even if I am clumsy, I will slowly... serve my lord...
1001407749.korean: 어… 어찌 이 더러운 발로 주공의…&n소녀, 그럴 순 없사와요!​&n그렇게까지 주공께서&n원하고 계신다면야…&n서툴더라도 천천히…&n주공께 봉사 하겠사와요…​

1001407750.english: Just for this moment, I, your girl, wish to be called Sumire by you, my lord...
1001407750.korean: 지금 이순간만큼은 소녀,&n주공께 스미레…로 불려지고 싶사와요…​

1001407751.english: Oh, you mean... today's weight... based on the report... right...? Th-I wonder why you are curious about that...
1001407751.korean: 오, 오늘 자 몸무게… 보고… 말씀,이시죠…?&n그, 그게 왜 궁금 하신지…​

1001407752.english: I-I'm sorry, Master... Baseball... I only intended to look at the results...
1001407752.korean: 죄, 죄송해요, 주인님…&n야구… 결과만 보려고 했던 건데…​

1001407753.english: This... isn't Master's official schedule... Master... has to find out about a promise I don't know about...
1001407753.korean: 이건…&n주인님의 공식 스케줄이 아닌데…&n내가 모르는 약속을…&n주인님께서... 알아 내야해…​

1001407754.english: It's not that the clothes are too small... it's that they can't fully contain my voluptuous figure...
1001407754.korean: 옷이 작은 게 아니라…&n육감적인 제 몸매를 다 담지 못하는…

1001407755.english: So that others won't see... I'll stay quietly under Master's desk... ?
1001407755.korean: 다른 분들은 보지 못하게…&n주인님 책상 아래 얌전히 있을 게요…?​

1001407756.english: Should I… swallow everything again today? Master’s…

1001407757.english: I am clumsy, but... until I become proficient, please give me the opportunity to continue serving.
1001407757.korean: 서툴지만…&n능숙해 질 때 까지,&n제게 계속 봉사할 수 있는 기회를…&n주세요.​

1001407758.english: Oh, today it tastes somehow... richer than usual...
1001407758.korean: 오, 오늘은 뭔가&n평소 보다 진한 맛이…​

1001407759.english: Here too... I would appreciate your signature, Master...

1001407760.english: Oh, it's not that the clothes are small… &n I modified them to be practical for activity…​
1001407760.korean: 오, 옷이 작은 게 아니라…&n활동에 편리하도록 개조한 거니까…​

1001407761.english: One, two, three, one! &n One, two, three, two!
1001407761.korean: 하나, 둘, 셋, 하나!&n하나, 둘, 셋, 둘!

1001407762.english: Right now the water has &n become the safest refuge… &n But sometimes I imagine &n that one day that unknown sea &n will swallow everything… &n Am I being too stupid?
1001407762.korean: 지금은 물 속이&n가장 안전한 도피처가 됐지만…&n언젠가 저 미지의 바다가&n모든 걸 집어 삼키진 않을까…&n상상하곤 해. 너무 바보 같은가?​

1001407763.english: That was almost a disaster…! &n Please, at least you… &n don't do anything stupid, okay! ​
1001407763.korean: 큰일날 뻔 했잖아…!&n부탁이니까 당신 만큼은 제발…&n바보같은 짓 좀 하지 말아줘! ​

1001407764.english: …You. Who are you looking at right now? &n Am I… still not enough for you?​
1001407764.korean: …당신. 지금 누굴 쳐다보는 거야?&n나로는... 아직, 부족한 거야?​

1001407765.english: Because of the moisture it's hard to undress… &n Could I borrow your hand…?​
1001407765.korean: 물기 때문에 탈의가 힘들어서 그런데…&n당신 손 좀… 빌려도 괜찮을까…?​

1001407767.english: It popped out over my uniform… &n

1001407768.english: My wave… &n Is it going to roughly swallow me &n again today?​
1001407768.korean: 내 파도…&n오늘도 날&n거칠게 집어 삼킬 예정이야?​

1001407769.english: I wonder what's at the end of that sea? &n With you &n I want to set off and go there… &n Oh? I have this side to me too…​
1001407769.korean: 저 바다 끝엔 뭐가 있을까?&n당신과 함께&n그 곳까지 떠나보고 싶어졌어…&n어라? 나한테도 이런 면이…​

1001407770.english: Ugh ugh… ha! &n Is this really supposed to be CPR practice…?​
1001407770.korean: 읍읍… 하!&n이거 정말 인공호흡 연습 맞아…?​

1001407771.english: If you and my sister were drowning in the water &n who would you save first? &n W-well… &n Sis is on the sawfish, right? &n What I consider the priority is… &n you, so… ​Honestly…! &n Are you going to keep doing this~?​
1001407771.korean: 물 속에 언니랑 당신이 빠져있다면&n누구부터 구할 거냐고?&n이, 일단…&n언닌 소우피쉬에 타고 있는 상태인 거지?&n내가 우선으로 생각 하는 건…&n당신, 이라서… ​정말이지…!&n당신 자꾸 이럴 거야~?​

1001407772.english: Because you keep doing that… &n it makes me want to leave the safety zone…​
1001407772.korean: 당신이 자꾸 그러니까…&n안전 범위를 이탈하고 싶어지잖아…​

1001407773.english: This… I made it by gathering my feathers. Can you feel the gentle chill?
1001407773.korean: 이건… 제 깃털을 모아 만들었어요.&n은은한 냉기, 느껴지시나요?​

1001407774.english: Ahaha... Don't be shy, come into the shade, Master.
1001407774.korean: 아하핫…&n사양 말고 어서 그늘 아래로 들어오세요,&n주인님.​

1001407775.english: Ah... Phew... It's hectic but fun, hahaha...!

1001407776.english: If Master wishes... let's meet alone at night when everyone is asleep.
1001407776.korean: 주인님이 원하신다면...&n모두가 잠든 밤에 단 둘이 만나요.​

1001407777.english: You're having trouble sleeping because of the heat...? Then I... I'll stay by your side until you fall asleep peacefully, Master.
1001407777.korean: 더위로 잠을 설치신다구요…?&n그럼 제가…&n편히 잠드실 때 까지 주인님 곁을 지킬 게요.​

1001407778.english: Master… would you… make me hot too…?

1001407779.english: Th-like, right here where everyone is watching... M-m-m-prepared... not yet...
1001407779.korean: 이, 이렇게 모두가 보는 데서…&n마, 마음의 준비가… 아직…​

1001407780.english: The spot where Master's hand brushed... feels good...

1001407781.english: If you massage me like that, just like when you sleep… I, I didn't ask you to stop… Please… do it again…
1001407781.korean: 주무실 때처럼 그렇게 주무르시면…&n머, 멈춰 달라 말씀드렸던 건 아니었어요…&n다시… 해주세요…​

1001407782.english: I-I'm tied up… &n You… don't just stand there watching &n could you help me a bit?​
1001407782.korean: 무, 묶여 버렸어…&n당신… 가만히 보고 있지만 말고&n좀 도와주면 안될까?​

1001407785.english: You! &n Commanding is fine, but don't overwork yourself! &n …While you're with me, forget everything &n and, like floating on the water, &n relax, deeply~ okay?
1001407785.korean: 당신!&n지휘도 좋지만, 과로는 금물이야!&n…나랑 있는 동안만큼은 전부 잊고&n물 위에 떠 있는 것 처럼,&n편안하게, 푹~ 쉬는 거야, 알겠지?

1001407786.english: Shall we start the examination? &n I'll make you all fired up &n again today, okay? Ufufu….​

1001407787.english: Will you give me an injection… too?​

1001407789.english: I'll… wait in the operating room…?​

1001407790.english: Just for today… &n I'll tolerate you overdoing it… &n Ufufu…​

1001407791.english: I feel like I'm getting stronger little by little since I'm training just as Master said!
1001407791.korean: 주인님이 말한대로 훈련하니깐&n조금씩 강해지고 있는 것 같아!​

1001407792.english: Sister Alcyone said Master is a wolf. Could it be that Master has a tail like me?!
1001407792.korean: 알키오네 언니가 주인님은 늑대라고 했어.&n설마 주인님도 나처럼 꼬리가 있는 거야?!

1001407793.english: Merlin? Hmph~ That noisy subordinate kept playing chess with me... You know that one who kept stubbornly insisting he had to take back a mistake? Lord Gamma, how did you end up with such an idiot as an advisor?
1001407793.korean: 멀린? 흥~&n그 시끄러운 부관이 자꾸 나랑 체스 뒀었는데…&n실수했다 자꾸 무른다고 박박 우기는 거 있었지?&n감마님 어쩌다 그런 바보를 참모로 뒀던 거야?

1001407794.english: I went to the food warehouse with Alvis yesterday. Andvari's trap? It was useless against the brain of this super-genius killer whale beauty!
1001407794.korean: 어제 알비스랑 같이 부식 창고에 갔어.&n안드바리의 함정 쯤이야.&n이 초 천재 범고래 미소녀의 두뇌 앞에선 무용지물이었지!

1001407795.english: I'll say it again... this is undeniably the Guardian series! Small in size, but an orca! Master, you keep saying the sea's terrifying predation... sniff sniff... Ah, a sweet smell...
1001407795.korean: 난 다시 말하지만… 엄연한 가디언 시리즈라고!&n체구는 작아도 범고래! 주인님 자꾸 바다의 무서운 포식…&n킁킁… 앗, 달콤한 냄새가…

1001407796.english: After losing my sisters, I thought I had lost my purpose in life... But now it's different... From now on, my goal is my Master... My goal is to become my Master's personal guardian!!
1001407796.korean: 언니들을 잃고 나의 삶의 목표를 잃었다고 생각했어..&n하지만 지금은 달라..​ 이제부터 나의 목표는 주인님이야..&n주인님에게 전속 가디언이 되는 것이 목표야!!

1001407797.english: Ahh... Don't touch my tail! It's really embarrassing! Master, were you really a tailless wolf?
1001407797.korean: 아앗… 꼬리 만지지 마! 진짜 부끄럽다고!​&n주인님, 진짜 꼬리 없는 늑대였던 거야?

1001407798.english: Master... I'm not quite as big as my sister, but I have a delicate tail too, right? I love it so much when you pat my tail...♥
1001407798.korean: 주인님.. 언니 만큼은 아니지만, 나도 델리케이트 꼬리지?​&n주인님이 꼬리 토닥거려주는 거 엄청 좋아...♥

1001407799.english: Honestly, I didn't know having someone pet my tail felt this good... Make me feel good every single day... Master!!
1001407799.korean: 사실 나 누군가가 꼬리 만져주는 거 이렇게 기분 좋은 지 몰랐어..&n날 매일 매일 기분좋게 해줘..주.인.님!!

1001407800.english: Master... No matter what I do, you keep lingering in my mind... Why is this happening?
1001407800.korean: 주인님..&n나 자꾸 뭘 하든 주인님이 머릿속에서 아른거려..&n이거 왜 그런 거야?​

1001407801.english: Master! What did you do with the Guardian sisters in that place called the Secret Room before? I want to do it with you! Huh? Why are you making such a fuss?
1001407801.korean: 주인님! 전에 가디언 언니들이랑 비밀의 방? 이란 곳에서 뭘 했던 거야?&n나도 같이 할래! 에? 왜 그렇게 호들갑이야?​

1001407802.english: Master, you know what? Let's do that! Huh? I'm just asking you to go swimming... Why is your face turning red?
1001407802.korean: 주인님 있잖아 그거 하자 그거!&n응? 수영하자고 하는 건데… 왜 얼굴이 빨개져?​

1001407803.english: Master! Hurry up and pet my head… and… pet this tail too♥
1001407803.korean: 주인님! 얼른 머리 쓰담어 줘… &n그리고… 이 꼬리도 쓰다듬어줘♥​

1001407804.english: The Guardian sisters dressed me up to show you, Master. How do I look? Am I cute?
1001407804.korean: 가디언 언니들이&n주인님 보여준다고 꾸며줬는데,&n나 어때? 귀여워?​​

1001407805.english: You know... actually, I've really wanted to go to an amusement park for a long time...
1001407805.korean: 나 있지이..&n사실 예전부터 놀이동산에&n정말 가보고 싶었어..​​

1001407806.english: I heard churros are so sweet and savory. Have you ever tried them, Master? Here~ Open your mouth. Ah!
1001407806.korean: 츄러스가&n그렇게 달콤하고 고소하다던데,&n주인님도 먹어본 적 있어​?&n자~ 여기 아 해봐 아~!

1001407807.english: Master, what do you want to ride when we go to an amusement park? What? You want to watch the dolphin show? A beautiful killer whale is right in front of you like this?!
1001407807.korean: 주인님은 놀이동산에 가면&n뭐 타보고 싶어?&n뭐? 돌고래 공연 보고 싶다고?&n미소녀 범고래가&n이렇게 앞에 있는데?!
