1001407857.korean: 오늘도 테라피를 하고 싶다고요?&n어떤 부분을 풀고 싶은지…&n어떤 강도로 받고 싶으신지…&n제게 자세히… '하나'…'하나'…&n얘기해주실래요?​

1001407858.english: The Commander always calls for me often... LLR and Alvis know we're just putting the Commander to sleep... but shall we try some deep sleep therapy until we're exhausted...?
1001407858.korean: 사령관님께선&n늘 저를 자주 부르시더군요…&nLRL과 알비스는 그저 사령관님을&n코 재우는 거라 알고 있지만…&n피곤할 때까지 잔뜩…&n숙면 테라피를 해볼까요?​

1001407859.english: I sweated a lot because it was hot… I feel like I might smell, but I held it in. I wonder if the Commander would like it… Ah… A new therapy idea just popped into my head. Could you make me hotter, Commander?
1001407859.korean: 더워서 땀을 많이 흘렸어요…&n냄새 날 것 같지만 참았어요&n사령관님이 좋아하실까…&n아… 새로운 테라피가 떠올랐어요.&n절 더 뜨겁게, 해주실래요 사령관님?​

1001407860.english: Alvis said… that the Commander likes chocolate… Here… there’s some delicious chocolate right in front of you. Could you… unwrap this for me?
1001407860.korean: 알비스가 말했어요…&n사령관님은&n초콜릿을 좋아한다고…&n여기…&n맛있는 초콜릿이&n눈 앞에 있어요.&n이 '포장' 좀…&n까주실래요?​

1001407861.english: Ah... Haa... I'm not going anywhere, I'm right here, Commander... ♥
1001407861.korean: 아앗… 하아…&n어디 가지 않아요,&n여기 있어요 사령관님…♥

1001407862.english: I have received much important advice from the fellow Kunoichis regarding how to serve you, My Lord… Although I am still a bit awkward… I, your girl, will devote my utmost heart and soul to serving you, My Lord.
1001407862.korean: 쿠노이치님들께 나리를 뫼시는&n방법에 대하여 중요한 조언들을&n많이 받았사옵니다…​&n아직 어색하지만… 소녀,&n나리를 모시는데는&n열과 성을 다하겠사옵니다.​

1001407863.english: Please lie down here, my lord. Today, will you not lie on my lap, forget the world, and unleash all that has been bottled up inside you… Mmm… upon me?
1001407863.korean: 어서 이리 누워보시지요, 나리.&n오늘은 소녀 무릎에 누워 천하를 잊고&n쌓여있던 것들을 모두… 으음…&n소녀에게 푸시지 않겠사옵니까?​

1001407864.english: My lord, your body is very stiff. One by one… I shall loosen them for you. Hehe… First, starting with these hard-knotted parts…
1001407864.korean: 나리의 몸이 많이 뭉치셨습니다.&n하나 하나…&n제가 풀어드리도록 하겠사옵니다.&n후훗… 우선 이 딱딱하게 뭉친 부분부터…

1001407865.english: Though the season is still autumn… Haa… the body of this girl offered to you, my lord, is still in the middle of summer… Hurry… Hurry… Please cool this scorching summer… Hurry, lie down here, my lord. Today, will you not lie on my lap, forget the world, and unleash all the things that have been bottled up inside you… Mmm… upon me?
1001407865.korean: 여전히 계절은 가을이건만… 하아…&n나리께 바친 소녀의 몸은&n아직 한 여름이옵니다…어서… 어서…&n이 뜨거운 여름을 식혀주시옵소서…&n어서 이리 누워보시지요, 나리.&n오늘은 소녀 무릎에 누워&n천하를 잊고 쌓여있던 것들을 모두…&n으음… 소녀에게 푸시지 않겠사옵니까?​

1001407866.english: Hehe… I also find joy in exchanging words with you, my lord. Oh dear, I am drenched in sweat… Please press down firmly as you write♥
1001407866.korean: 후후… 나리와의 필담 또한&n소녀는 즐겁사옵니다.&n이런, 소녀의 땀이 흥건하니…&n부디 꾹꾹 눌러 써주시기 바라옵니다♥​

1001407867.english: Ah... My Lord... ♥ I, your girl, have briefly entertained lewd thoughts. Haaah... My Lord... A little more... harder... harder... Please, punish me severely with that massive switch!
1001407867.korean: 아아… 나리…♥&n소녀, 잠시 음탕한 생각을 했사옵니다.&n하으읏… 나리…&n좀더… 세게… 세게 우람한 회초리로&n소녀를 엄히 벌해… 주시옵소서!​

1001407868.english: Sir…! ​​You must not do that during therapy…

1001407869.english: Oh my lord... It's already yours... This side is your handwriting too... Haaat... Ahh... Lord...?! To think you're slapping my back too... You're so mischievous... ♥
1001407869.korean: 나리도 참…&n이미 나리의 것인데…&n이쪽도 나리의 글씨를…&n하앗… 아앗… 나리…?!&n제 등에도 매를 드시다니…&n짓궂기도 하셔라…♥​

1001407870.english: My Lord, my voice and eyes are used solely to trick the enemy… If you so beg… please lie down here for now. Please relax and entrust your precious body to me… My Lord.
1001407870.korean: 나리, 소녀의 목소리와 눈은&n오로지 적에게 술수를 부리기 위한&n용도이옵니다…&n그렇게 부탁하신다면…&n일단 이리 누워보시지요.&n긴장을 푸시고 소녀에게…&n나리의 옥체를 맡겨 주시옵소서.​

1001407871.english: Delta certainly had a good sense of aesthetics. Of course, on the inside, she was twisted like the Chairman of Moon River, though… You think I'm a reincarnation of Delta? If you say that to my face… I’m really hurt…!
1001407871.korean: 확실히 델타는 미적 감각이 좋았죠.&n물론 속은 문리버 회장처럼 뒤틀려 있었지만…​&n델타가 환생한 것 같다고요?&n제 앞에서 그런 말씀 하시면 저… 정말 서운해요…!​

1001407872.english: If I were to give the role to Beta… well, my figure is certainly closer to perfection than Beta's. Still, it looks like my clothes are about to burst… do you think I can fool that kid?
1001407872.korean: 베타에게 배역을 준다면…&n뭐, 베타보단 역시 제 몸매가 완성형에 가깝긴 하죠.​&n그래도 옷이 터질 것 같은데…&n그 아이를 잘 속일 수 있을까요?​

1001407873.english: Huh? This isn't alcohol. It's just lemonade... Ugh... Did I drink too much because I was nervous? Ugh...?! The signal... Ah...
1001407873.korean: 예? 이건 술이 아니에요.&n그냥 레모네이드일 뿐이지…​&n읏… 긴장해서 너무 마셨나?&n읏…?! 신호가… 아앗…​

1001407874.english: Master... please don't look at me like that. Delta was just exceptionally slim... As for her weight? That is an absolute secret, Master...
1001407874.korean: 주인님… 그렇게 보지 마세요.&n델타가 유별나게 슬림했던 거예요…​&n몸무게요? 그건 절대 비밀이에요 주인님...​

1001407875.english: Wait, cut! Cough! Hurry, I need to go to the bathroom... What, ah, you said no?! Ugh?! Ah, no... I really need to... Ahh... no... Everyone... don't look... I'm doomed to get married... Hmph...
1001407875.korean: 잠깐 컷! 커엇~! 빨리 화장실 좀… 뭐엇, 아, 안된다고요?!​&n으읏?! 아, 안 돼… 급하단 말이야… 아아… 안 돼… ​&n모두… 보지 마세요… 나 시집 다 갔어… 히잉…​

1001407876.english: A reward? M-Master, how can you try to drink it just because you feel it's a waste to throw it away on the ground?!
1001407876.korean: 포상이라고요?​&n주, 주인님, 땅에 흘린 게 아깝다고 마시려 하시면 어떡해요?!​

1001407877.english: If you touch it like that, it'll really tear!

1001407878.english: Chairman… you like my vulgar appearance, don’t you?
1001407878.korean: 회장님… 제 천박해진 모습도 마음에 드시죠?​

1001407879.english: To be honest, I didn't want to play Delta. But imagining that Delta showing such a vulgar side in front of you, Master... Hmph... Chairman? Today, instead of Beta... I will serve you with all my heart... Hehe...
1001407879.korean: 사실 델타를 연기하는 건 싫었어요.&n하지만 그 델타가 주인님 앞에 천박한 모습을 보인다고 상상하니… 훗...​&n회장님? 오늘은 베타 대신… 제가 혼신의 봉사를 해드릴게요… 으흣…​

1001407880.english: Hey, Commander! Your zipper is open! Pfft, you're so polite!
1001407880.korean: 여~ 사령관! 바지 지퍼 열렸어!​&n푸핫, 인사 잘~ 한다!​

1001407881.english: Hmm... how to look manly... shouldn't I start by acting like a man?
1001407881.korean: 흠… 남자답게 보이는 방법이라…&n일단 남자답게 행동해야 하지 않을까?​

1001407882.english: Today is the kind of weather that makes me want to just lie down and stare blankly at the sky… Do you feel the same way, Commander?
1001407882.korean: 오늘은 뭔가 멍하게 누워서 하늘을 보고 싶은 날씨네…&n혹시 사령관도 그래?​

1001407883.english: Wow! What's gotten into our rookie commander?
1001407883.korean: 이욜~! 우리 애송이 사령관님이 어쩐 일이래?​

1001407884.english: Hey, hey... what on earth do you want from me? Huh? Do you want me to be your training partner?
1001407884.korean: 이, 이봐… 대체 나한테 뭘 바라는 거야?&n응? 특훈 상대라도 해줘?​

1001407885.english: The kid is finally acting like a man... If things continue like this, this big sister might just show you what it's like to be an adult...?
1001407885.korean: 이제야 애송이가 좀 남자다워졌네…​&n이대로만 가면 이 누나가 어른의 맛을 보여줄지도…?​

1001407886.english: Are you seriously acting this confidently just because you think you're the Chairman?
1001407886.korean: 설마 본인이 회. 장. 님이라고&n이렇게 당당히 행동하는 거야?​

1001407887.english: Well, I'm just a rookie... but since you're the Chairman... However...! Since this kind of mission is unfamiliar to me, I'll keep practicing to become proficient... I ask for your cooperation.
1001407887.korean: 뭐, 애송이지만… 일단 회장님이니까…​&n그치만…! 이런 임무는 아무래도 낯서니까,&n계속 연습해서 능숙해질 수 있게... 협조, 부탁할게.​

1001407888.english: You have good stamina? Did you call me in for secret training again today, you little brat Chairman? I'm not going easy on you today!
1001407888.korean: 체력 좋아? 오늘도 비밀 특훈 상대로 부르신 겁니까,&n애송이 회. 장. 님? 오늘은 안 봐준다?​

1001407889.english: Are you satisfied with the premium close-range security service currently in effect? ​​It's for the Chairman's safety, after all... so refusal is out of the question.
1001407889.korean: 현재 적용 중이신 특급 밀착 경호 서비스는 만족스러우신지요?&n회. 장. 님의 안전을 위한 거니까, 뭐... 거절은 거절이야~​

1001407890.english: I can detect your signals even with my eyes closed. What, what? Special training... right now... here? Is outdoor training your thing?
1001407890.korean: 눈을 감고도 네 신호를 알아챌 수 있어.​&n뭐, 뭐? 지금… 여기서… 특훈? 야외 훈련이 취향이야?​

1001407891.english: If necessary… it’s fine if you point your gun at me. Ah~ of course… I’d be thrilled with the Chairman’s gun too, hehehe~
1001407891.korean: 필요하다면… 총구를 내게 겨눠도 괜찮아.​&n아~ 물론... 회장님의 그 총도 대환영이야, 에헤헤~​

1001407892.english: Haaah… shall we… proceed… with… disarmament, Chairman…?
1001407892.korean: 하읏… 무장 해제… 진행… 합니까, 회장…님?​

1001407893.english: How does it feel to be a manager after always just giving orders? Ah, I'm not trying to boss you around just because you became a manager. You look like you're turning red... Why don't you grab a glass of water and take a break?
1001407893.korean: 맨날 지휘만하다 매니저 해보니까 어때?&n아~ 사령관이 매니저 됐다고 해서 부려먹으려는 건 아냐.​&n얼굴 빨개진 것 같은데… 물이나 한잔 마시면서 쉬는 게 어때?​

1001407894.english: What did you say, Manager? Don't listen to Beta! The Iron Maiden, with me as the ace, is better than the LA Cannoniers! Repeat after me! The Pittsburgh Iron Maiden is the strongest! Team!
1001407894.korean: 뭐라고, 매니저? 베타 말은 듣지 마!&nLA 캐노니어즈보단 이 내가 에이스인 아이언 메이든이 최고라고!&n​따라해! 피츠버그 아이언 메이든은 최강! 구단이야!​

1001407895.english: Huh? The Philadelphia Elvens? Manager, don't even mention a team that hasn't won a single championship in front of this ace! The strongest team in the world is undoubtedly the Pittsburgh Iron Maidens! I'm telling you, the team with me, Shepherd, is the best!
1001407895.korean: 에엥? 필라델피아 엘븐즈?&n매니저, 우승 한 번 못한 구단을 이 에이스 앞에서 꺼내지도 말라고!&n세계 최강의 구단은 단연 피츠버그 아이언 메이든!&n이 셰퍼드님이 계신 구단이 최고다 이말이야!​

1001407896.english: Ah, look at that bat swinging wildly over there! Haa... Seriously, the whole team needs to see the Manager swinging the bat... I've heard rumors everywhere that he swings it really well~
1001407896.korean: 아~ 저기서 방망이가 헛돌아가네! 하아…&n정말이지 매니저님이 휘두르는 방망이를 팀원들 모두가 봐야 하는데…&n정말 잘~ 휘두른다는 소문이 곳곳에서 들리는데 말이야~​

1001407897.english: Look at this… right here under the floor, there’s a ball that got hit by a home run… one… two… What? Haha~ You mean a baseball looks like an egg? Oh dear… Would our manager please… let me give birth to one?
1001407897.korean: 이거 봐… 여기 바닥 아래, 홈런 맞은 공이 하나… 둘… 뭐?&n하하~ 야구공이 알 같다고? 이런 이런…&n우리 매니저님께서 어디 한 번… 낳게 해주시겠어요?​

1001407898.english: Haa~ Manager? Practice just… isn’t going well today? Hmm… there’s a perfect secret stash over there… Shall I… get some of your enthusiastic support there? I wish you’d bring that bat with you, too♥
1001407898.korean: 하아~ 매니저님? 오늘은 연습이 영… 잘 되질 않네?&n어디… 저기 딱 좋은 비밀창고가 있는데…​&n그곳에서 매니저님의 열성적인 응원을… 좀 받아볼까?&n그 방망이도 같이 들고 와줬으면 좋겠어♥​

1001407899.english: Manager? Do you want to see the bat break?
1001407899.korean: 매니저님? 방망이 부러지는 거 보고 싶어?​

1001407900.english: Seriously… are you trying to make me hit a home run all the time?
1001407900.korean: 정말이지… 시도 때도 없이 날 홈런치게 만드려는 거야?​

1001407901.english: A batter has to pick their pitches... and a pitcher shouldn't give the batter the pitch they're looking for. In that sense, you're really seasoned, Manager. Since you only show me... one by one, only the sides that make me happy... I always end up giving up home runs or striking out in front of you, don't I?
1001407901.korean: 타자는 공을 골라야 하고… 투수는 타자가 노리는 공을 안 줘야하지.&n그런 의미에서 매니저님은 참 노련하단 말이야.​&n매니저님은 하나… 하나, 날 행복하게 만드는 모습만 보이니…&n늘 당신 앞에선 홈런을 맞거나 삼진아웃만 하게 되잖아?​

1001407911.english: You want me to walk elegantly, Commander? Ugh... Hmph... I don't think I'm used to it yet. I'll try my best...!
1001407911.korean: 우아하게 걸어보라고요 사령관님? 웃챠아…&n히잉... 아직 익숙하지 못한 것 같아요.&n노력해볼게요...!

1001407912.english: I was talking to Sergeant Gnome earlier. You ask what I was talking about? Oh, nothing. I was just saying that with a figure like yours, the Commander would definitely… like it… Hehehe…
1001407912.korean: 아까 노움 병장님이랑 이야기하고 있었어요.&n무슨 이야기냐고요?​&n아, 아무것도 아녜요. 병장님 같은 몸매라면 분명…&n사령관님이 좋아하실 거라고… 에헤헤….​

1001407913.english: Commander, you're inspecting my personal supplies? I didn't bring any... What? Th-take... me? Aaaah?! How did you know that?! Why did Sergeant Ifrit... spread rumors about something like that...
1001407913.korean: 사령관님, 제 개인 생필품을 검사하신다고요,&n안 챙겨 왔는… 네? 가, 가지…요?​&n으아아앗?! 그걸 어떻게 아세요?!&n이프리트 하사님은 왜… 그런 걸 소문 내셔서...​

1001407914.english: Commander. Could you... pass me some oil over there? I'd like to get a tan too... H-h
1001407914.korean: 사령관님. 거기서 오일…&n좀 건네 주실 수 있으세요?​&n저도 태닝하고 싶은데…&n호, 혹시… 몸에 발라 주실... 수 있으신가요?​

1001407915.english: I feel a bit embarrassed wearing a see-through swimsuit… I’ve always worn thick clothes. …Because of the Commander’s intense gaze, I feel hot for no reason… and even more ashamed.
1001407915.korean: 속이 비치는 수영복은 좀 낯뜨거운 것 같아요…&n항상 두터운 옷만 입어와서.​&n...사령관님의 뜨거운 시선 때문에 괜히 덥고…&n더 부끄럽네요.​

1001407916.english: As for the personal necessities you mentioned… I couldn’t bring them. Hmm… Actually, I did bring them… Shall we go together to that secluded spot over there? …You mustn’t spread the word to the other members, okay?
1001407916.korean: 말씀하신 개인 생필품은… 못 가져왔어요&n으음... 사실, 가져왔는데…&n같이, 저기 아무도 없는 곳으로 좀 가실까요?&n​...다른 대원 분들께 소문 내시면 안 돼요,&n아시겠죠?​

1001407917.english: Even though it's a vacation... that's a violation of military discipline...!

1001407918.english: Commander. Just a moment... I'll cover it with a parasol... and finish...

1001407919.english: I am so happy spending time with you, Commander… May I try riding it? Not the tube, but you... Commander.
1001407919.korean: 사령관님과 보내는 시간이 너무 행복해요…&n저, 한 번 타봐도 될까요?​&n튜브가 아니라, 사령관님... 을요.​

1001407920.english: Hahaha! Even the mighty Dragon has turned into a total girl. I don't know if I should call this disappointing or fitting... Anyway, it's fun to watch.
1001407920.korean: 하하하! 천하의 용도 계집 아이가 다 돼있더군. ​&n이걸 실망스럽다고 해야 할지, 어울린다고 해야 할지…&n여하튼 지켜보는 재미가 있어.​

1001407921.english: I apologize. You aren't the type to get all flustered surrounded by weak women's skirts, are you...? Just because of that doesn't mean I'll go work a part-time job at a cafe and act all sweet. ...Remember that.
1001407921.korean: 사과하지. &n나약한 여자들 치마폭에 둘러싸여&n얼 타는 놈은 아니더군…?&n그렇다고 해서 내가 카페 알바나 하며&n아양 떠는 일은 없을 거야.&n…잘 알아 둬.​

1001407922.english: I am Lemonade of 'Rage'. I am way more different from soft-hearted kids like Alpha and Beta. Come to think of it... I heard you get a surge of exhilarating power when night falls... Hmm...
1001407922.korean: 난 ‘분노’의 레모네이드다.&n알파와 베타 같이 물러 터진 애들과는&n달라도 한참 다르지.​&n그러고보니 너…&n밤이 되면 호쾌한 힘이 솟는다고 하던데…&n흐음…​

1001407923.english: Judging by the dragon's behavior lately, it's like a toothless tiger... Is it because of you? Huh? The dragon of old was never like that. Well... shall we start with the story of when the dragon and I first roamed the seas? It's going to be a very long story.
1001407923.korean: 요즘 용의 행동을 보건대, &n이빨 빠진 호랑이와도 같더군… 너 때문인가?​&n응? 옛날의 용은 전혀 그렇지 않았지. ​&n어디… 용과 내가 처음 바다를 누볐던&n이야기부터 시작해볼까?&n아주 긴 이야기가 될 거야.​

1001407924.english: Merlin told me to go on a date with you... but I have no interest in that kind of thing! ...What? You mean I'm interested in you? Who said that...! P-P-That's ridiculous!
1001407924.korean: 멀린이 너랑 데이트를 해보라고 하던데…&n그런 것 따위, 난 관심 없다!​&n…뭐? 내가 너한테 관심이 있다고?&n누가 그런…! 우, 웃기지도 않는 소리!​

1001407925.english: Alright! I’m fully prepared for a showdown with you… Hey, you, you! Why on earth are you taking off your clothes? And that huge thing… what is it! Don’t… Don’t come near me! I said don’t come near me! I, I didn’t intend for a fight like that!
1001407925.korean: 자! 너와 대결을 하기 위해 만반의 준비를…&n이봐, 너, 너! 대체 옷은 왜 벗는 거지?&n그리고 그 거대한 건… 뭐야! 당장 안 치…​&n가까이 오지 마! 오지 말라니까?&n나, 난 그런 싸움을 생각한 게 아니라고!​

1001407926.english: It's the right thing to do... seriously, it's the kind of thing that deserves to be beaten to death.
1001407926.korean: 맞는 행동이야…&n진짜 뒤지게 쳐 맞는 행동.

1001407927.english: Hmph... Just so you know... I'm, weak at back... It's my... handicap... that I'm only telling you...
1001407927.korean: 흐읏… 난 참고로… 뒤, 뒤가 약하다…&n너한테만 말하는… 내… 핸디캡이야…​

1001407928.english: Yes, it is tonight... I have always been ready! Now, engrave that Commander's power into my body! Wait, just a moment...! I will remove the combat suit myself... so... please... wait just a little...
1001407928.korean: 그래, 바로 오늘 밤이군... 난 늘 준비 되어있었다!&n어디, 그 사령관의 저력을 이 몸에 새겨보거라!&n자, 잠깐…! 전투 슈트는 직접 벗을 테니…&n조금만… 기다려 줘…​

1001407929.english: You want me to try on different clothes? Hmph! You still don't know me at all, Commander. Damn it…! Just try them on! Tch, Merlin is going to tease me to his heart's content again. Haa…
1001407929.korean: 다른 옷을 입어 보라고?&n흥! 아직도 날 몰라도 너무 모르는군, 사령관.​&n젠장…! 입어 보면 될 거 아니냐!&n쳇, 멀린이 또 실컷 놀리겠군. 하아…​

1001407930.english: It was a dragon that left this scar on my eye. Commander, do you have no intention of leaving a deep wound inside me, either? I have a nature that absolutely cannot stand losing. If that happens, I will continue to think of you, Commander, the source of this wound, day and night.
1001407930.korean: 이 눈의 상처를 남긴 건 용이었어.&n사령관도 내 안에 깊은 상처를 남길 생각 없어?&n난 절대 지고는 못 사는 성미니까.&n그렇게 되거든 계속해서 상처의 출처인&n사령관 당신을 밤낮으로 떠올리겠지.​

1001407931.english: Sometimes I wonder... what it would be like to have a daughter like Merope... ...Commander? Won't you temper me tonight so I can bear a reliable daughter?
1001407931.korean: 가끔 보면 메로페 같은… 딸이 있으면 어떨까…&n생각해볼 때가 있어.​ …사령관?&n듬직한 딸을 낳을 수 있도록 오늘 밤,&n날 담금질 해주지 않겠나?​

1001407932.english: My condition is quite good today. Just for tonight, I will give my all to the Commander. Rest assured, I can definitely hold out for at least thirty minutes...
1001407932.korean: 오늘 내 컨디션은 꽤 괜찮아.&n오늘 밤 만큼은 특별히 사령관에게&n내 전력을 다하도록 하지.&n바, 반드시 삼십 분 이상은 버틸 수 있으니 안심해라…​

1001407933.english: As for this outfit... in response to Alpha's suggestion that I try wearing something a bit more comfortable... I didn't wear it because I wanted to! Please don't misunderstand...
1001407933.korean: 이 옷은 그러니까…&n조금 편한 옷을 입어 보는 게 어떻냐는 알파의 제안에…&n내가 입고 싶어서 입은 게 아냐! 절대 오해하지 말도록…​

1001407934.english: It's definitely nice that it's more comfortable than a combat suit, but... it feels a bit awkward. Especially... you! Your gaze is weird! Look at the eyes, not the chest, when someone is talking! S-stop staring, you damn bastard!
1001407934.korean: 확실히 전투 슈트 보다 편해 좋긴 하지만…&n좀 어색하군.​ 특히… 너! 네 시선이 이상하다고!&n사람이 말을 할 땐 가슴이 아니라 눈을 보라고!&n그, 그만 쳐다봐, 젠장할!​

1001407935.english: I've never worn clothes like this, not even in front of Chairman Poseidon or the Dragon. So… this is the first time I've shown you this side of myself… huh…? … You want me to call you 'honey'? Have you really lost your mind…?
1001407935.korean: 포세이돈 회장님과 용 앞에서도&n이런 옷을 입은 적은 없었어. 그러니까…&n네 앞에서 이런 모습을 보인 게 처음이란… 응…?&n…’여보’라고 불러 달라니?&n너 정말 머리가 돌아버린 거냐…?​

1001407936.english: Tch, Merope and Merlin will be surprised since they've never seen me like this... but I can't exactly go around wearing only a suit, can I? Well... if you like it... clothes don't really matter, though...
1001407936.korean: 칫, 메로페와 멀린은 내 이런 모습을&n본 적이 없으니 놀라겠지만…&n계속 슈트만 입고 다닐 수도 없는 노릇이잖아?&n뭐… 네가 좋다면… 옷 따위 상관 없지만…​

1001407937.english: Damn it… what’s on my butt? Eek… that’s too big, can’t you clean it up right now?!
1001407937.korean: 젠장… 엉덩이에 뭐가 묻은 거지?&n히익… 그건 너무 크잖아, 당장 치우지 못해?!​

1001407938.english: I... *Haa*... lost... Damn it, it's hot and I'm out of breath, so I'll rest here for a bit... Waityyy! We need to take breaks while we work, don't we!
1001407938.korean: 내가… 하아… 졌다…&n젠장, 덥기도 하고 숨도 차니, 여기서 잠깐 쉬도록…&n잠까아아안! 쉬는 시간은 가지면서 해야 할 것 아니냐!​

1001407939.english: Please be gentle! The stains won't come off easily!
1001407939.korean: 제발 살살 하라고!&n자국이 잘 안 지워 진단 말이야!​

1001407940.english: Hmph... You're rough... I... I can't believe I'm defeated by you like this...
1001407940.korean: 흐읏… 거칠단 말이다…&n내가… 너에게 이렇게 패배할 순…​

1001407941.english: I'll never wear clothes like this again... I told you we should stop! ... Honey, you shouldn't act like this in front of my subordinates... When we get home... I'll finish it for you... so please bear with me just a little longer...
1001407941.korean: 다음부턴 내가 이런 옷을 입나 봐라…&n그만 하자고 했잖아!​&n…여보, 제 부하들 앞에서 이러시면 안 돼요…&n집에 가면… 제가 마저 해드릴 테니… 좀만 참으세요…​

1001407951.english: I saw in the Kama Sutra that there are various positions, especially… I liked the one where you lift a woman up… I guess I’m no match for you, Master…?
1001407951.korean: 카마수트라를 보니 여러 체위가 있더군요,&n특히… 여자를 번쩍 드는 자세가 좋던데...​&n역시 전 안 되겠죠, 주인님…?​

1001407952.english: I still don't understand the saying that the more exposed, the better... Look at this belly fat... No, don't give me belly farts, Master!
1001407952.korean: 노출이 많을수록 좋다는 말은 아직 모르겠어요…&n이렇게 뱃살이… 안 돼, 배방구 하지 마세요 주인님!​

1001407953.english: I failed my diet, but... I didn't know you would like it this much, Master. Master, my singing pouch says it's hungry. Can I have a late-night snack...?
1001407953.korean: 다이어트는 실패했지만…&n주인님이 이렇게 좋아해 주실 줄은 몰랐어요.​&n주인님, 제 노래주머니가 배고프대요.&n야식… 먹어도 되죠?​

1001407954.english: I am a woman with many secrets, Master… but I have shown them to you like this. So… Master… could you… also show me the baseball bat… that I’ve only heard about in rumors?
1001407954.korean: 전 비밀이 많은 여자에요 주인님…&n하지만 이렇게 주인님 앞에 보여드렸어요.​&n그러니까… 주인님께서도…&n소문으로만 듣던 야구 배트를…&n제게 보여주시면 안 될까요?​

1001407955.english: Master... Haa... Please, hurry, make my gloomy appearance even whiter. Plenty... very generously... Please fill me up quickly until my hair turns white...
1001407955.korean: 주인님… 하아… 제 음침한 모습을 어서,&n더 하얗게 만들어주세요.​ 듬뿍…아주 듬뿍…&n제 머리가 하얗게 될 때까지, 어서 가득 주세요…​

1001407956.english: Master… I am the lemonade of gluttony… I want to eat more, I want to savor more… Your very richness… Please fill every part of me quickly, because the night is still long… until I cling to you and collapse…
1001407956.korean: 주인님… 저는 폭식의 레모네이드에요…​&n더 먹고 싶어요, 더 음미하고 싶어요…&n주인님의 아주 진한 걸…​&n빨리 제 모든 곳에 주인님을 채워주세요,&n아직 밤은 기니까…&n제가 주인님께 매달려 쓰러질 때까지…​

1001407957.english: First of all… I’ll… serve you, Master.
1001407957.korean: 일단… 제가 먼저… 주인님께 봉사 해볼게요.​

1001407958.english: Master, to grant such a reward to lowly me… I'm so happy…&nWon't you also give me a mighty baseball bat, Master…?
1001407958.korean: 주인님, 미천한 제게 이런 포상을 해주시다니…​ 기뻐요…&n어서 주인님도 제게 우람한 야구 배트를 주시겠어요…?​

1001407959.english: Master, thank you so much.&nI thought I wasn't beautiful… ah…&n…everything around is a mess.&nOn this elegant bed, I'm so vulgar… ah…&nThis is my master's... aaah…&nSuch a dashing sight makes me want to serve you again and again.&n…So tonight you're saying this is mine, Master♥?
1001407959.korean: 주인님, 정말 감사해요.&n제가 아름답지 않다고만 생각했었는데… 아앗…&n…주변이 엉망이네요.​&n우아한 침대 위에서 제가 천박한… 아앗…&n이건 주인님의... 아아…&n몇 번이고 봉사하고 싶게 하는 늠름한 모습이네요.&n…오늘 밤은 이게 제 거란 말씀이시죠, 주인님♥?​

1001407960.english: Boyfriend~ I heard there's a bulk sale on hand warmers, and the prices are reasonable! You ask why I buy so many of these? It's because you never hug me! Ugh... Get a clue.
1001407960.korean: 남친~ 핫팩 대량 세일 한다는데 가격도 적당해!&n​뭐 이런 걸 많이 사냐고?&n맨날 안아주질 않으니까 사는 거 아냐!&n으휴… 눈치 좀 챙겨라.

1001407961.english: Ah~ this outfit? I'm always just wearing jackets, so I decided to try something different this time~ It suits me, right? Fafnir bought it for me specially because we're friends... Ugh~ damn it, I'm paying you back!
1001407961.korean: 아~ 이 옷? 맨날 자켓만 입고 다니다&n이번에 기분 전환 좀 해봤어~​&n나랑 좀 어울리지?&n파프니르가 특별히 친구라고 사줬…&n아~씨 갚는다고 쫌!

1001407962.english: Ugh... why are they blasting the air conditioning here? It's freezing, seriously... I can't take it anymore. Boyfriend, open your arms. Just hug me for a moment.
1001407962.korean: 으… 여기 에어컨 왜 이렇게 빵빵 트는 거야, 춥게 진짜…​&n안 되겠다. 남친~ 팔 벌려. 잠깐만 나 안아주고 있어.

1001407963.english: Boyfriend~ Haven't you bought pretty much everything by now? We're leaving the cart behind... Huh? What's this? Boyfriend... You really took your sex education well, didn't you?
1001407963.korean: 남친~ 이제 웬만한 건 다 사지 않았어?&n카트 놓고 나갈…​ 어? 뭐야 이 물건은?&n남친… 성교육은 착실하게 잘~ 받았네?

1001407964.english: Boyfriend, this bikini... do you think it looks good on me? If you're not sure... shall we go to the changing room over there and try it on? Ah... but I don't know how to put this on... Can you help me put it on?
1001407964.korean: 남친, 이 비키니… 나랑 어울릴 것 같애?&n잘 모르겠으면… 저~ 기 탈의실 가서 한 번 입어볼까?​&n아~ 근데 이거 입는 법을 모르겠는데…&n나 좀 입혀줄 수 있어?

1001407965.english: The air conditioner is cold, so hug me tight… huh? What the heck~ Boyfriend… you bought a strong-willed pet snake? Look at it holding its head up stiffly, so ill-mannered… I think I need to train it a bit, just like Baek-ah did. It might be a little aggressive, so shall we go somewhere without CCTV? I know exactly how to calm it down… ♥
1001407965.korean: 에어컨 추우니까 꼭 안아… 응?&n뭐야~ 남친… 자기 주장 강한 애완 뱀을 사왔네?&n버릇 없이 빳빳하게 고개든 거 봐…&n백아처럼 교육 좀 시켜줘야겠는데?&n조금 폭력적일 수 있으니까 CCTV 없는 곳으로 갈까?&n내가 진정시키는 법 잘 알 거든…♥

1001407966.english: Boyfriend. This is a public place... Let's keep the boundaries... Okay?
1001407966.korean: 남친. 여긴 공공장소거든… 선은 지키자… 어?

1001407967.english: Hey babe, could you measure my underwear size for me? Huh, you don't know?&nAww, your boyfriend's hands remember well, so measure them carefully!
1001407967.korean: 남친, 나 속옷 치수 좀 재줄래? 엥, 모른다고?​&n에이~ 남친 손이 잘 기억하니까 자세히 재 봐~

1001407968.english: Why am I looking at baby products? Hehe... I'll be a mom someday,&nIsn't it a mother's wish to dress her child in pretty clothes?&nWhat's with that look? Are you shy? You're going to have a baby with me someday, right...?&nRight, Daddy?
1001407968.korean: 왜 육아 용품 보고 있냐고? 히힛… 언젠가 애기 엄마 될 텐데,&n예쁜 옷 입혀주고 싶은 게 엄마 마음 아니겠어?&n뭐야… 그 표정? 부끄러워? 나랑 언젠간 애 만들 거잖아…&n그치, 애기 아빠?​

1001407969.english: All the Orca members worship me as the goddess of fortune. Look over there, do you see them lining up in front of the tables just to catch a glimpse of me? ... It's not because I'm a pushover!
1001407969.korean: 모든 오르카 대원들이 날 행운의 여신으로 받들고 있어.​&n저기 봐봐, 한 번이라도 날 보려고&n이렇게 테이블 앞에 줄 서서 대기 하는 거 보여?​&n…내가 호구라서 그런 거 아니야!​

1001407970.english: That hand... it's a hand that can beat me. I'm quite confident. When this game is over... how about the loser strips off?
1001407970.korean: 그 패, 나한테서 승리할 수 있는 패야, 자신만만한데?​&n이 게임이 끝나면…&n패자가 시원하게 탈의하는 건 어때?

1001407971.english: I’m betting everything on the probability that card is heart-shaped. Why? Hahaha~ Because I can see your eyes are full of hearts right now~ Yeah... no? Th-that can't be... I’ve never been wrong about a prediction, not even once!
1001407971.korean: 그 카드, 하트 모양일 확률에 내 모든 걸 걸게.​&n왜냐고? 하하하~ 지금 니 눈에 하트가 가득 찬 게 보이거든~​&n응...아냐? 그, 그럴 리 없어…&n내가 예측한 건 틀린 적은 단 한 번도 없다고!

1001407972.english: The treasures on the table right now are nice, but… I haven’t been able to get my hands on the treasure I want yet… The tail on the front of your pants… Huh? You want me to try picking it if I want it? Hehe, wait a minute, I think I’ll get my hands on it soon.
1001407972.korean: 지금 테이블에 올라 온 보물들도 좋지만…​&n내가 원하는 보물은 아직 손에 못 넣었어…&n니 바지 앞섶 꼬리… 응? 갖고 싶으면 따보라고?​&n후훗, 잠깐 기다려, 곧 손에 넣을 것 같은데?

1001407973.english: Haa... damn it. I lost. I never imagined something like this would happen... Ah, whatever! I don't care! Go ahead and sue me! I have nothing! So... how about you take me to the secret room instead of money?
1001407973.korean: 하아… 이런. 내가 졌네. 이런 일은 상상도 하지 못했는데…​&n아~몰라 몰라! 배 째! 나 가진 거 없어! 그러니까…&n돈 대신 날 비밀의 방에 데려가는 건 어때?​

1001407974.english: Wanna make a bet? Look at me right now... and see if your front tail is curled up or not. Hahaha! See, right? Right! I want to check... so pull that front tail up in front of me!
1001407974.korean: 나랑 내기 할까? 지금 내 모습 보고…&n니 앞꼬리가 올라갔는지 안 올라갔는지.​&n아하하하! 거 봐, 그렇지? 그렇지! 확인하고 싶은데…&n그 앞꼬리를 내 앞에 까보라고!

1001407975.english: Stop right there... Do I look like a pushover to you?
1001407975.korean: 동작 그만… 내가 빙다리 핫바지로 보여?

1001407976.english: How dare you... touch a symbol of good luck so carelessly?&nYou knew you'd face consequences since you did something wrong, right?&nGo to bed and incur the goddess's wrath...&nYou'll need to loosen up a lot.
1001407976.korean: 감히… 행운의 상징을 함부로 만져?&n부정 탈 짓 했으니까 각오 했겠지?​&n침대로 가서 여신의 노여움을…&n잔뜩 풀어줘야 할 거야.

1001407977.english: The treasure I found, it's good to sleep on it...&nIt would be nice just to hold you like this, but...&nHeh heh... just as expected, it resembles gold.&nI think making baby gold would be the best!
1001407977.korean: 내가 얻은 보물, 깔고 자는 것도 좋고…&n이렇게 끌어 안고만 있어도 좋지만…​&n흐흥… 역시 황금을 닮은 &n아기 황금을 만드는 게 제일 좋을 것 같아~

1001407978.english: When you're feeling down, you just have happy daydreams! … Ehe… Ehehehe~~ Hot! What I imagined is a secret!
1001407978.korean: 우울할 때는 행복한 상상을&n하는 거예요!​ …에헤… 에헤헤헤~~&n핫! 무슨 상상을 했는지는 비밀이에요!​

1001407979.english: What? You're asking who I like better between Gamma and Merope? Th-that... Gamma... B-but Merope too... ...Hmph~ I can't decide!
1001407979.korean: 네? 감마 님이랑 메로페 님 중&n누가 더 좋냐고요?​ 그, 그건… 감마 님…&n하, 하지만 메로페 님도……&n하으~ 정할 수 없어요~!​

1001407980.english: This rocket? It's a gift from Merope. Someday, I want to... become a capable member like Merope!
1001407980.korean: 이 로켓이요?&n메로페 님이 주신 선물이에요.​&n언젠가는 저도… 메로페 님처럼&n유능한 대원이 되고 싶어요!​

1001407981.english: You ask what I usually fantasize about? That’s… a secret… because we’re not that kind of relationship yet…
1001407981.korean: 평소에 무슨 상상을&n하는 거냐고요?​&n그건… 비밀… 이에요…&n아직까지는 그런 사이가 아니니까요…​

1001407982.english: What? So you're asking if I can tell you once we get a little closer...? Well... I'll think about it... Commander! Won't you go somewhere with me? I'm fine anywhere as long as I'm with you! If it's just the two of us... that would be even better...
1001407982.korean: 네? 그럼 좀 더 친해지면 알려줄 수 있냐고요…?&n그건… 생각해 볼게요…​&n사령관님! 어디 같이 놀러가지 않으실래요?​&n사령관님과 함께라면 저 어디라도 좋아요!&n단둘이서라면… 더 좋아요…​

1001407983.english: When I'm with you, Commander, I feel different than when I'm with Gamma or Merope… They are all people I really like, so I wonder what is different… Do you know, Commander…?
1001407983.korean: 사령관님이랑 같이 있으면&n감마 님이나 메로페 님과&n있을 때랑은 다른 기분이 들어요…​&n전부 제가 정말 좋아하는 분들인데&n뭐가 다른 걸까요…&n사령관님이라면 알고 계시나요…?​

1001407984.english: … Eh? What is this? Is something like this normally allowed in Orca…? … Commander… You lowlife…
1001407984.korean: …에? 뭐죠? 오르카에서는&n이런 일이 평범하게 허용되는 건가요…?&n…사령관님... 저질…​

1001407985.english: …Again…? You’re just as trash as ever… Commander… Still… if it’s you… I… I’m fine…

1001407986.english: You say I smell nice…? Hehehe~ I'm so shy~~ Ah…! Could this be… a sign of something…? I’ll go ahead and get ready! Please take your time coming over~!
1001407986.korean: 저한테 좋은 향기가 난다고요…?&n에헤헤~ 쑥쓰러워요~~​&n앗…! 혹시 이건... 그런 신호인 건가요…?&n저, 먼저 가서 준비하고 있을게요!&n천천히 와주세요~!​

1001407987.english: Lady Gamma is an object of my respect, and Lady Merope is an object of my admiration. And now… the Commander is also one of my new objects of my affection. What…? You ask what kind of object? The Commander is… L… L… Love…
1001407987.korean: 감마 님은 저의 존경의 대상이고&n메로페 님은 동경의 대상이에요.​&n그리고 지금은… 사령관님도&n저의 새로운 대상 중 하나세요.​&n네…? 어떤 대상이냐고요?&n사령관님은… 사… 사… 사랑… 이요…​

1001407988.english: "Commander" is nice, but... sometimes I want to call you by a different title. Like "Oppa," or "Older Brother"... or, "Honey?" Ah, *clears throat*! Please, please forget that last remark...
1001407988.korean: 사령관님도 좋지만…&n가끔은 다른 호칭으로도 부르고 싶어요.​&n오빠라던가, 오라버니라던가…&n아님, 여… 보? 라던가…&n아, 으흠! 마지막 말은 이, 잊어주세요…​

1001407989.english: Commander… wait a moment, could you give me a hug? Hehehe~ It’s warm… Thank you for always protecting me, but… sometimes, please tell me what you want. I… I can do anything for you, Commander…
1001407989.korean: 사령관님…&n잠깐만, 안아주시면 안 될까요?&n에헤헤~ 따뜻해요…​&n언제나 지켜주셔서 감사하지만…&n가끔은 사령관님도 원하시는 걸 말씀해주세요.​&n저, 사령관님을 위해서라면 뭐든지 할 수 있어요…​

1001407990.english: Aaaah?! Commander…! Are you going to keep playing tricks on me!? Really… … I, I’m making an exception just for today…
1001407990.korean: 흐아아앗?!&n사령관님…! 자꾸 장난 치실 거예요!?​ 정말……&n오, 오늘만 특별히 허락해 드리는 거예요…​

1001407991.english: Merope saw my outfit today and said it suited me really well! … As for Gamma… Ahaha… he just sighed and left… but he definitely smiled a little at the end!
1001407991.korean: 오늘 제 옷을 본 메로페 님이&n엄청 어울린다고 하셨어요!&n…감마 님은…​&n아하하… 한숨만 쉬고 가셨는데요…&n그래도 마지막에는 분명 살짝 웃으셨어요!​

1001407992.english: How do you like the dessert I made? Hehe… I learned a little bit from Aurora… and Sowan asked if I’d like to try working at the cafeteria!
1001407992.korean: 제가 만든 디저트는 어떠세요?&n헤헤… 아우로라 님한테 살짝 배웠는데…​&n소완 님께서 카페테리아에서&n한 번 일해보는 건 어떠냐고 물으시더라고요!​

1001407993.english: This is the first outfit I've worn instead of my combat uniform… Commander… Do I look pretty? Hehehe! Next time, I'll make you happy with an even prettier outfit!
1001407993.korean: 전투복 대신 처음 입어보는 옷이에요…&n사령관님… 저, 예쁜가요?​ 헤헤헤!&n다음에는 더 예쁜 옷으로 즐겁게 해드릴게요!​

1001407994.english: The Commander said it suits me, but... since it's my first time wearing clothes like this, it feels really awkward... Hehe... Aaaah?! Phew... I really want to stop falling over now...
1001407994.korean: 사령관님께서 어울린다고는 하셨지만…&n역시 이런 옷은 처음이라 많이 어색하네요…&n헤헤…​ 으아아앗?! 후아…&n이젠 넘어지는 건 그만하고 싶은데…​

1001407995.english: Commander~ I’d like to host a tea party just for you… Especially, just the two of us… I’d like to do it… Is, is… that okay… with you?
1001407995.korean: 사령관님~ 사령관님을 위한&n다과회 자리도 만들고 싶어요…​&n특별히, 저랑 단 둘이서…&n하고 싶은데… 괘, 괘… 괜찮으… 시죠?​

1001407996.english: Waaah... I fell again... The dessert, the cake, the outfit... everything... is a mess... What...? You're saying it's a relief the main dessert is safe...? T-Commander, come on~~!
1001407996.korean: 흐아아아앙… 또 넘어졌어요…&n디저트도 케이크도 의상도… 모두…. 엉망이에요…​&n네…? 메인 디저트는 무사하니 다행이라고요…?&n사, 사령관님도 참~~!​

1001407997.english: Hmph... No, Commander! If you do this, my clothes will get wrinkled...!
1001407997.korean: 후에에… 안 돼요 사령관님!&n이러시면 옷에 주름이 생긴단 말이에요…!​

1001407998.english: Commander… please take your time… ♥ There’s still plenty of Rode left… Hehe… .
1001407998.korean: 사령관님… 천천히 드세요…♥​&n로데는… 아직 많이 남았어요…히힛….​

1001407999.english: Commander! Oh no... I'm... falling over again...! Hehe... I'm being hugged again... Hehe... Commander, your scent... seems sweeter than any dessert.
1001407999.korean: 사령관님! 어라라… 또… 넘어진다아…!​&n히힛… 또 안겼다… 헤헤… 사령관님 냄새는…&n그 어떤 디저트보다… 달콤한 것 같아요.​

1001408037.english: Does it look a bit risky? It's okay! This isn't difficult at all~ There are even more beautiful moves than this… Shall I show you?
1001408037.korean: 아슬아슬해 보인다고요?&n괜찮아요!&n이 정도는 어렵지 않아요~&n이것보다 더 아름다운 동작도 있는데…&n보여드릴까요?​

1001408038.english: This pose is a technique I learned from pre-apocalyptic video footage… Eeeeeeh? You mean this violates City Guard regulations?!
1001408038.korean: 이 자세는 멸망 전&n동영상 자료를 통해 익힌 기술…&n에에에에엣?&n이게 시티가드 심의에 어긋난다고요?!​

1001408039.english: We really need a pair for this performance, Commander. By any chance… would you be interested in practicing acrobatics with me tonight?
1001408039.korean: 이 공연에는&n페어가 꼭 필요해요,&n사령관님.&n혹시… 오늘 밤&n저랑 같이 곡예 연습&n하실 생각 있으세요? ​

1001408040.english: Can you see clearly? You can see it well, right? You will see it clearly! As for this posture, I mean... please don't keep looking only at that spot, Commander!
1001408040.korean: 잘 보이세요?&n잘 보이시죠?&n잘 보일 거예요!&n이 자세는 말이죠,&n그러니까…&n자꾸 그곳만 보진 마시고요,&n사령관님!​

1001408041.english: It's a heavy Kama Sutra pose... I'm thinking of including it in this performance. Hehe... Judging by the Commander's expression, I think it'll be a success?
1001408041.korean: 헤비한&n카마수트라 자세인데…&n이번 공연에&n포함 시켜 보려고요.&n헤헹… 사령관님 표정을 보니&n성공적일 것 같은데요?​

1001408042.english: Ah... the ropes got tangled... I, I can't move... No, Commander... It's cheating to grope me at a time like this!
1001408042.korean: 아앗…&n줄이 꼬여버렸는데…​&n우, 움직일 수가…&n안 돼요 사령관님…&n이럴 때 더듬으시는 건&n반칙이에요!​

1001408043.english: If you keep doing that, you'll lose your strength, you shouldn't touch it now!
1001408043.korean: 그러다 힘 풀린단 말이에요,&n지금 만지시면 안 돼요!​

1001408044.english: Now… it doesn’t matter how… I… now… might… open my eyes to new tastes…
1001408044.korean: 이젠… 어떻게든 좋아…&n나… 이제… 새로운 취향에…&n눈뜰 지도…​

1001408045.english: Commander… my legs feel a bit stiff… could you spread them a little wider? Oh dear~? You seem to be even more stiff than me… Shall I… loosen them for you right now?
1001408045.korean: 사령관님…&n제 다리가 좀 굳은 것 같은데…&n더 벌려주시겠어요?&n어라라~?&n사령관님께선 더 단단하게&n굳으신 것 같은데…&n지금 당장… 풀어드릴까요?​

1001408068.english: Master! Melite gave me these clothes as a gift. She sent them so the two of you could have a good time together... How do they look? Do they look okay?
1001408068.korean: 주인님!&n이 옷 멜리테가 선물해준 거야.&n둘이서 좋은 시간 보내라고&n보내준 건데…&n어때? 괜찮아보여?​

1001408069.english: Master, I see a lot of colorful fish over there. Shall we go fishing? If you don't have a fishing rod, I'll dive in and catch them myself. Just leave it to me!
1001408069.korean: 주인님,&n저기 알록달록한 물고기가&n많이 보이는데&n한 번 낚시 한 번 하러 갈까?​&n낚시대가 없으면 직접&n내가 다이빙 해서 잡아 볼게,&n맡겨 달라고!​

1001408070.english: Master, wait... could you turn around for a moment? My clothes are a little see-through because they're wet... Ugh... huh? You want to see? Ugh... I'm telling you, you're a total pervert, Master.
1001408070.korean: 주인님,&n잠깐… 뒤 좀 돌아줄래?&n젖으니까 옷이 조금 비쳐서…​&n으… 응? 보고 싶다고?&n으휴… 진짜 변태 주인님이라니까?​

1001408071.english: Master, since I'm wearing a skirt today... don't touch my tail suddenly... Kyaaat?! My skirt is lifting up! Really... D-don't touch it... Kyaaat, noooo!
1001408071.korean: 주인님,&n오늘은 치마 입었으니까…&n갑자기 꼬리 만지면 안…​&n꺄앗?! 치마 들어 올려지잖아!&n정말… 마, 만지지… 꺄앗, 안돼에!​

1001408072.english: Master, getting wet is a bit of a hassle... but would you like to go into the sea with me? I can do the swimming... You just need to hold me tight... Hehe...
1001408072.korean: 주인님,&n젖는 게 좀 그래도…&n나랑 같이 바다로 들어가 볼래?​&n수영은 내가 하면 되니까…&n꼭, 나만 꼬옥 끌어안고 있으면 되는데…&n헤헤…

1001408073.english: Master~ Shall I show our... sisters in heaven... our cute niece?
1001408073.korean: 주인님~&n우리...&n하늘에 있는 언니 동생들한테...&n귀여운 조카 보여줄까?​

1001408074.english: Master... please bear with me since it's still daytime.

1001408075.english: Just a moment, Master! &n You're going too fast! &n First, would you calm my excited tail… &n Could you?
1001408075.korean: 자, 잠깐 주인님!&n너무 빠르다고!​&n우선, 내 흥분하는 꼬리부터…&n가라앉혀줄래?​

1001408076.english: Haa… I'm soaked through, &n what am I to do about that? &n Master… come here. &n From now until you get all warm and toasty… &n will you nestle right into my arms?
1001408076.korean: 하아… 흠뻑 젖었는데,&n이를 어쩐담?&n주인님… 이리 와 봐.​&n지금 부터 따끈따끈해질 때까지…&n내 품 안에 쏙 안겨 있는 거야?​

1001408077.english: I prepared this outfit for practical training, but... now that things have turned out this way... I wonder why I want to act spoiled toward my master?
1001408077.korean: 실전 교육을 이유로&n이런 차림을 준비하긴 했지만…&n이렇게 되니까…&n주인님께 어리광을 부리고 싶은&n이유는 뭘까요?​

1001408078.english: Parenting? Hehe... That's my specialty. First off... let's start with practicing how to put the bottle in the baby's mouth. Alright, hurry up...
1001408078.korean: 육아요? 후후…&n제 전문이랍니다.&n일단… 젖병 물리는 방법부터&n실습해보도록 하죠.&n자~ 어서...

1001408079.english: What? You want me to act like a baby is crying? I, I'm embarrassed... Ugh... uh... uh... D-Daddy...

1001408080.english: From now on, it’s the real deal. You have to be gentle, just like you’re treating a real baby. Master… no, Dad? Hurry… would you like to hold Maria in your arms?

1001408081.english: Now that I’ve gone from being the caregiver to being the one being cared for... I feel like various new emotions are arising... I even taught you how to change diapers... Would you like to try it out?

1001408082.english: … Master? I told you what to do when the baby whines, didn't I? Ahh…?! You have to be gentle with the baby’s bottom…!
1001408082.korean: …주인님?&n아이가 칭얼거릴 땐&n어떻게 해야 한다고&n말씀드렸었죠?&n아앗…?! 아기의 엉덩이는&n살살 다뤄주셔야 해요오…!​

1001408083.english: Babies are sensitive! Please stop doing that!

1001408085.english: No more... I can't take it anymore... Wah, wah... Maria wants to be scolded really badly... ♥ Dad... please hurry up and teach this ill-mannered Maria a lesson... !
1001408085.korean: 더… 더 이상은 못 참아…&n응애, 응애...&n마리아는 잔뜩 혼나고 싶어요오…♥​&n아빠… 어서 버릇 없는 마리아한테&n교육을 시켜주세요…!​

1001408086.english: I heard that humans of old used to create passwords using numbers. For example… 360 520… Hehehe, guess what that means, dragon?

1001408087.english: Commander, would you like to have some dumplings together? Hehe... They're bouncy and plump, just like cute Rinti's skin, right?
1001408087.korean: 사령관님,​&n같이 만두 드실래요?​&n헤헤… 귀여운 린티 피부처럼~​&n탱글 탱글 거리죠?​

1001408088.korean: 사령관님…​&n곰이 나타났어요!​​&n짜잔, 알고 보니​&n귀여운 팬더​&n린티~! 였답니다!​

1001408090.english: You're not satisfied with just cute Linti? You really are such a greedy Commander... In that case... shall we switch to a breathtaking Linti♥?

1001408091.english: What does 25184 mean~? Hehe… Guess~ Lovely Rinti will give you kisses forever, Hehe… ♥
1001408091.korean: 25184가 무슨 뜻일까요~?​&n히힛… 맞춰보세요~​&n사랑스러운 린티가​&n평생 뽀뽀 해드릴게요,​&n헤헤…♥​

1001408092.english: Commander, please just look at Linty's cuteness with your eyes!

1001408094.english: Commander, it's nice that you're eating the dumplings I brought, but... could you please use chopsticks to pick up the toppings and... poke them? ♥ Hehe...♥
1001408094.korean: 사령관님~​&n제가 가져온 만두를​&n먹는 것도 좋지만…​&n젓가락으로 토핑을​&n콕♥ 집어 주시,면​&n안 될까요? 헤헹…♥​

1001408095.english: I wasn't sleeping... I just closed my eyes and opened them... Just for a very brief moment... Very... slowly...

1001408096.english: Ada must have already done that work... Okay, wait... Now, it's finished... Please don't disturb me while I sleep...
1001408096.korean: 그 작업은 이미 에이다가&n다 해줬을 텐데…​&n알았어, 기다려 봐…&n자, 이제 끝났으니까…&n자는 데 방해 말아줘…​

1001408098.korean: 사령관,&n나랑 듀오…&n해줄 수 있어?&n빨리 티어 올려야&n푹 잠들 수 있을 것 같아서…&n우리 연승 할 수 있겠지?​

1001408103.english: I wear a suit that keeps me clean, so I don't take separate showers... So... even if you sniff me like that, I don't smell weird, so please... stop...
1001408103.korean: 난 청결을 유지해주는&n슈트를 입어서 따로&n샤워는 안 한단 말이야…&n그러니까…&n…그렇게 맡아 대도&n이상한 냄새 안 나니까,&n제발… 그만 해…​

1001408104.english: Commander, I didn't shower because I was too lazy, don't come near me... Ugh... Huh? ... You actually like it? I haven't been able to shower for over three days... Commander, your taste is really weird...

1001408105.english: Laziness isn't a sin... You actually need to get enough rest to improve your work efficiency. Commander, sometimes you act like Ada... always asking me to do this... and that... I should... give me more satisfying rewards like an Alpha or Beta... Then I'll listen...
1001408105.korean: 나태는 죄악이 아니야…​&n원래 충분히 쉬어야​&n작업 능률이 오르는 거라구.&n사령관은 가끔 에이다 같이 굴어…​&n맨날 이거 해달라… 저거 해달라…&n나도… 알파나 베타처럼​&n더 만족스러운 포상을 줘…​&n그럼 말 잘 들을게…

1001408106.english: You want me to teach you the strategy for the pattern the boss used earlier? Roll and roll to dodge the X-shaped skills, dash towards the boss, and when a clone appears, unleash a full combo on the glowing spot on the main body. If you get stunned, spam all skills to enter Phase 2. Jump to dodge the full-range AoE attack, then roll and roll again, and if you get stunned, unleash a burst of damage. Commander... I'm telling you to practice a bit... Seriously... Stop riding the bus... ...Hmph? What, t-you're saying this is a strategy for a real-life boss fight...?! Stop unzipping... Stop it...

1001408108.english: If I live a life of just lying around reading comic books, stuffing myself with snacks, and falling asleep right away… I won’t last long and will end up like a Beta, you say? Hehehe, it’s fine, Commander. I have a metabolism that doesn’t gain weight no matter how much I eat.

1001408109.english: … I’ve been stuck in my dorm lately doing nothing but playing games, so I’ve gotten bored. I’ve memorized all the boss patterns… and collected all the items… Ugh… these days… seeing the Commander’s face… is more fun and enjoyable.

1001408111.english: There are times when nothing feels quite right, no matter what I do. Is it because I'm lacking stimulation? What is the Commander doing on a holiday like this... Why are you coming to the Commander's office with a panel even on the weekend...?

1001408112.korean: 요즘 오르카 호는&n테일러 소설을 원작으로 한&n연애 시뮬레이션 게임이 유행이더라...&n요즘 원작 소설 읽고 있거든…&n주인공은 사령관이던데…​&n나 말이야…&n엔딩 업적 수집은 다 끝냈는데…&n실제 업적은 아직 못 깼다…?

1001408113.english: … Ugh, haa… This part… huh? D-Why am I sweating so much? P-It’s because it’s hot from working out.… Wait! Don’t smell the pillow! Don’t do that! Don’t do that! It’s embarrassing!

1001408114.english: Ah... You're going to do it now, Commander? I don't want to do anything... so just move on your own...
1001408114.korean: 아… 지금 하겠다고 사령관?&n아무것도 하기 싫으니까…&n혼자 알아서 움직여…​

1001408115.english: Alright, it's time to put what I've seen in books to the test... Commander, I'll make the moves... so you have to stay put...?

1001408116.english: … Commander. No matter what I do, my interest isn't satisfied. As expected, doing it directly with you is the most fun. Hmm… Commander… it’s a hassle… Let’s… skip the washing up… and… let’s… play… the game… right now, okay?
1001408116.korean: …사령관.&n뭘 해도 흥미가 채워지지 않아.&n역시 사령관이랑 직접 해보는 게&n제일 재밌어.​&n흐음… 사령관… 귀찮은데…&n서로 씻는 건… 생략하고…&n지금 당장 게. 임… 하자, 응?​

1001408117.english: The Orca is like a huge aquarium... because I can see colorful fish outside the window. I'm a Little Mermaid trapped in an aquarium... Huh? It's not an aquarium?
1001408117.korean: 오르카호는 커다란​&n아쿠아리움… 같아…​&n알록달록한 물고기들이​&n창밖으로 보이니까.​&n난 아쿠아리움에 갇힌​&n인어공주&n…응? 아쿠아리움이 아니야?​

1001408118.english: This outfit… The Arsenal captain recommended it… You ask where the bikini top is? The Arsenal captain told me to say that he’s never heard of a mermaid wearing a bikini top.
1001408118.korean: 이옷…​&n아스널 대장이 추천해줬어…​&n비키니 탑은 어디있냐고?​​&n인어가 비키니 탑을​&n입었단 소리는 못 들었어,​&n라고 아스널 대장이 말하랬어.​

1001408119.english: The buzzer Constancia gave me? I left it behind. I know everything there is to know by now. Like 1+1 equals 3... huh?
1001408119.korean: 콘스탄챠가 준 부저?​&n두고 왔어.​&n나도 이제​&n알 건 다 알아.​​&n1+1은 3이라던가… 응?​

1001408120.english: Since the Orca dives into the sea, this is our daily uniform from now on. Commander, hurry up and put on your swimsuit and let's play together.
1001408120.korean: 오르카호는 바다에 잠수하니까,​&n이 옷은 이제부터 생활복이야.​​&n사령관도 얼른 수영복 입고​&n나랑 놀자.​

1001408121.english: The Arsenal captain told me to put more sea creatures on my body, but I'm too scared of octopuses, so I can't do it...
1001408121.korean: 아스널 대장이 몸에다​&n바다 생물들을 더​&n올려놓으라고 했는데.​&n문어까진 무서워서​&n안 되겠어…​

1001408122.english: Do mermaids lay eggs or give birth to children? Can't the Commander confirm it for us personally?
1001408122.korean: 인어는 알을 낳을까,​&n아님 아이를 낳을까?​​&n사령관이 직접​&n확인시켜주면 안 돼?​

1001408123.english: … I'm embarrassed. Give me a little time.

1001408124.english: … This is a signal, right? I learned really hard from the Arsenal captain, so… please look forward to it…

1001408125.english: I'm not stupid. I'm going to do what the older sisters did. ... If you keep refusing, I'm going to sit here and keep patting my belly.
