1001408126.english: I like this outfit. It makes me feel like the Goddess of Death. If Death acts this cute and behaves as if she belongs to you, Master, your enemies will surely be terrified. Hehe...
1001408126.korean: 저는 이 옷이 마음에 들어요.&n마치 죽음의 여신이 된 것 같거든요.&n죽음이 이렇게 애교를 부리고,&n주인님의 것이 된 것처럼 행동한다면&n주인님의 적들은&n공포에 질릴 게 분명해요.&n후훗…​

1001408127.english: When Azaz saw this outfit, he tried to add various functions to my coffin. Like, if you press a button on the coffin, a nuclear weapon will fire... Huh? He also tried to add a function where Dracurina and my coffin would merge to become a strategic weapon.
1001408127.korean: 이 옷을 본 아자즈가 제 관에&n여러 기능을 추가하려고 했죠.&n관에 있는 버튼을 누르면&n핵무기가 나간다 거나…&n아? 드라큐리나와 제 관이&n합체해서 전략 병기가 되는&n기능도 넣으려고 했어요.​

1001408128.english: Do not be afraid, for I, the Goddess of Death, am serving you like this, Master. Do not worry at all, Master. As long as I obey, you, at least, can escape from death.
1001408128.korean: 두려워하지 마세요,&n죽음의 여신인 제가 이렇게&n주인님을 섬기고 있잖아요?​&n주인님께선 아무 걱정 마세요.&n제가 복종하는 동안,&n주인님 만큼은 죽음으로부터&n벗어날 수 있으니까요.​

1001408129.english: Persephone, the Queen of the Underworld, had the nickname 'Persephone the Terror.' But don't worry, she was a lovely and obedient wife to her husband, Hades. Will you come and hug me?
1001408129.korean: 명계의 여왕 페르세포네는&n‘공포의 페르세포네’라는&n이명이 있었죠.​&n걱정 마세요,&n그녀는 남편인 하데스에게 만큼은&n사랑스럽고 순종적인 아내였으니까요.&n어서 절 안아 보실래요?​

1001408130.english: I hope you don't find it too frightening. It is a ceremonial robe I tried on because I loved you so much, Master, that I couldn't wait any longer. Now, please touch me. Isn't this heart... still beating hotly toward death...?
1001408130.korean: 너무 무섭게만 생각하지&n않으셨으면 해요.&n주인님을 너무도 사랑해서&n기다리지 못하고 입어 본&n예복이니까요.​&n자, 어서 절 만져보세요.&n이 심장이…&n계속해서 죽음을 향해&n뜨겁게 뛰고 있지 않나요…?​

1001408131.english: Master… ride on death… and ravage it to your heart's content. Show everyone… quickly… that you have conquered death…
1001408131.korean: 주인님…&n죽음을 올라타고…&n마음껏 유린해주세요.&n모두에게 죽음을 정복했다는 걸…&n어서… 보여주세요…​

1001408132.english: As expected of you, Master, you are so unrestrained… Haa… I am dying of happiness…

1001408133.english: Master… are you… planning to kill me in bed?! I’m so happy… Haa…
1001408133.korean: 주인님…&n절… 침대에서 죽이실 생각이신 가요?!&n너무 행복해요… 하아…​

1001408134.english: Master… I’ve heard that pomegranates have long been a symbol of fertility. Please give me as many children as there are seeds in this fruit… until I die… ♥
1001408134.korean: 주인님…&n석류는 예로부터&n다산의 상징이라고 들었어요.&n이 열매 알맹이 만큼이나&n많은 아이를…&n죽기 전까지 선물해주세요…♥​

1001408135.english: I didn't expect to be assigned to the Doombringer. Since I've been in charge of transport for a long time, it's not exactly a stretch, though. ...But Lieutenant Knight Angel is looking at me with an unusually strange gaze. I must be mistaken, right?
1001408135.korean: 제가 배속될 곳이 둠브링어가&n될 줄은 예상치 못했습니다.&n과거부터 수송 담당이었던 만큼,&n그렇게 억지는 아니지만요.​&n…그런데 나이트 앤젤 부관님이&n절 유난히 이상한 눈길로 보시는데,&n착각이겠죠?​

1001408136.english: I am truly grateful for you creating a new Haka. However, there are times when I deeply miss the old Haka. It’s because there are so many things I couldn't do for you...
1001408136.korean: 하카를 새로 만들어 주신 것에 대해선&n정말 감사하게 생각합니다.&n하지만 예전의 하카가&n사무치게 그리워질 때가 있습니다.&n못해준 게 참 많아서요…​

1001408137.english: Ah, you mean this gold hairpin? It's the first gift that idiot ever gave me. That fool still brags that he gave me pure gold... but this is just cheap plating.
1001408137.korean: 아~ 이 금 머리핀 말입니까?&n그 바보가 처음으로&n저한테 줬던 선물이에요.&n그 바보는 아직도 순금을&n줬다고 으스대는데…&n이거 싸구려 도금입니다.

1001408138.english: As expected, the other Doombringer members boasted quite agile physiques, given their emphasis on mobility. ...Honestly, if I hadn't gained so much weight since coming to Orca, I think I would have maintained that body as well.
1001408138.korean: 다른 둠브링어 대원들은&n역시 기동을 중요시하는 만큼&n제법 날렵한 몸매를 자랑하더군요.&n…솔직히 저도 오르카에 온 후로&n많이 찌지만 않았더라면&n그 몸매… 유지했을 거라고요.​

1001408139.english: Cloaking field on/off, okay… Radio wave stealth… Confirmed. Combined fusion reactor safety check… Whoaah?! You mustn't touch me when I'm concentrating… The new Haka is an especially delicate one, so it's dangerous…
1001408139.korean: 은폐장 온 오프 오케이…&n전파 스텔스… 확인 완료.&n복합핵융합로 안전성 체크…&n우아아앗?!​&n제가 집중할 땐&n터치하시면 안 돼요…&n새로운 하카는 특히나 세심한 아이여서&n위험하단 말이에요…​

1001408140.english: Commander, th-stop groping... What?! You want to repair me? ... ... Um, if you go up to the warehouse first, I'll... follow you right away...
1001408140.korean: 사령관님,&n그, 그만 더듬으…&n네엣?! 절 정비해주고 싶으시다고요? …&n…저기, 창고에 먼저 올라가 계시면,&n바로 따라… 갈게… 요…​

1001408141.english: Commander, surely this isn't an Orca-style initiation ceremony, is it?

1001408142.english: … onto Commander’s thigh… can I land?

1001408143.english: Commander, I want to become a member like Varg or Captain May. As for Fafnir… well… I don’t know… we went through such a hard time working together…
1001408143.korean: 저는 사령관님께 바르그 님이나&n메이 대장님 같은 대원이&n되고 싶습니다.&n파프니르는…&n… 글쎄요… 같이 일했을 때&n워낙 고생을 했어서…​

1001408144.english: Sometimes, I want to sail through the dark night sky with just the two of us, Commander. I want to show you that sight… of the stars twinkling through the curtain of clouds…
1001408144.korean: 가끔 사령관님이랑 단 둘이서&n어두운 밤하늘을 항해하고&n싶을 때가 있습니다.​&n구름 커튼 사이로&n별이 반짝이는 그 광경을…&n사령관님께 보여드리고 싶어요…​

1001408145.english: Captain Mei explained to me, "Supplies are the most important thing!" So, I mean, supplies are a critical matter. ...Commander? Could you please supply me with your Haka quickly?
1001408145.korean: 메이 대장님이&n‘보급이 가장 중요하다!’&n저한테 설명했어요.&n그. 러. 니. 까, 보급은&n중대사항이란 말이에요.&n…사령관님?&n사령관님의 하카를 빨리&n제게 보급해 주시겠어요?​

1001408146.english: Compared to when I was working with that idiot, the workload and tonnage are much lighter now, and it’s great. Back then, there were quite a lot of things to worry about... Well, sometimes whenever the Commander pulls off something extraordinary, it does feel like I’m going back to the old days. Haha...
1001408146.korean: 그 바보랑 다녔을 때랑&n비교하면 업무량도 중량톤수도&n지금이 훨씬 가볍고 좋아요.&n그땐 신경 쓸 일이 상당히 많았는데…​&n뭐, 가끔 사령관님께서&n기상천외한 일을 벌일 때마다&n옛날로 돌아가는 기분이긴 하네요.&n하핫…​

1001408147.english: Commander, if you keep doing this, I'm going to beg you to make me the baby chief engineer!
1001408147.korean: 사령관님,자꾸 그러시면&n저 아기 기관장 만들어 달라고&n조를 겁니다?​

1001408148.english: I'm going back to that time. That way, there won't be any setbacks in carrying out the mission. It doesn't make sense, logically, that a member who can't do anything without a Haka is a Doom Bringer...!
1001408148.korean: 다시 그 때로 돌아갈 거예요,&n그래야 임무수행에도&n차질이 없을 테죠.​&n하카 없이는 아무 것도 못하는&n대원이 둠 브링어라는 건&n상식적으로 말이 안 돼요…!​

1001408149.english: You know, I want to have a toned, strong, and slim figure just like Night Angel. As a fellow woman, I'm so envious... Huh? Ah... I think I might have said something wrong...?
1001408149.korean: 전 말이죠,&n나이트 앤젤님처럼&n군더더기 없이 튼튼하고&n슬림한 몸매가 되고 싶어요.​&n같은 여자로서&n얼마나 부러운데요…&n네? 아… 제가&n말 실수를 한 것 같기도…?​

1001408150.english: Since that idiot teased me about gaining weight, I’m going to lose it no matter what! I was definitely the one teasing him at our first meeting... but you’re saying I was yyyy thinner than him? Commander... surely you don’t believe me?
1001408150.korean: 그 바보가 살쪘다고 놀린 이상,&n무슨 수를 써서라도&n빼고 말 거예요!​&n분명 첫 만남엔 제가 놀렸는데…&n걔보다 제가 훠어어얼씬 날씬 했다고요?&n사령관님… 설마 못 믿으시는 건가요?​

1001408151.english: I realized that using this balance ball actually requires quite a bit of strength. I think I understand now. I realized it while doing it every night, after all. Hmm... Hmm!
1001408151.korean: 이 밸런스볼이 은근 힘이&n많이 들어가는 운동이더라고요.​&n이제 알 것도 같아요.&n밤마다 하면서 알게 됐으니까요,&n흐흠… 흠!​

1001408152.english: Commander, you suddenly said you wanted to work out just the two of us, so I practiced a bit... uh... um... Is this the correct posture?
1001408152.korean: 사령관님,&n갑자기 저랑 단 둘이&n운동을 하겠다 하시길래,&n나름 연습했는데…&n어… 음…&n이런 자세가 맞아요?​

1001408153.english: Hwah… Commander… Exercising just the two of us… Ahh… Wait! My heart feels like it’s going to burst… Stop… Stop! Stop with that Haka now…!
1001408153.korean: 후아… 사령관님…&n단 둘이 하는 운동은…&n아아… 잠까안!​&n저 심장 터질 것 같다구요…&n그만… 그만!&n그 하카는 이제 그마안…!​

1001408154.english: Commander, I told you we need to focus on training right now!

1001408155.english: … Haa, come to think of it, I think this kind of exercise is good. My back hurts a bit, but… it feels good… so I’d like to ask for one more coaching♥ Hehehe
1001408155.korean: ….하아, 생각해보면,&n이런 운동도 좋은 것 같아요.&n허리는 좀 아프지만…&n기분은 좋으니까…&n한번 더 코칭, 부탁드릴게요♥&n에헤헤​

1001408156.english: … I’ve only just realized it. Exercise… should be fun and enjoyable, rather than difficult. Commander… I think I’m starting to get hungry… What’s on today’s protein menu? ♥
1001408156.korean: …이제야 깨닫았어요.&n운동은… 힘든 것보다 재밌고,&n즐거워야 한다고요.​&n사령관님…&n슬슬 배가 배고픈 것 같은데…&n오늘의 단백질 식단은 어떤 거예요? ♥​

1001408157.english: Hey senior, the video you uploaded this time, the views went up a lot! You're going to do the trending Sky Knights choreography challenge with me too, right?
1001408157.korean: 선배,&n이번에 업로드한 영상 말이야,&n조회수 엄청 올랐어!​&n요즘 핫한 스카이 나이츠 안무&n챌린지도 나랑 같이 해줄 거지?​

1001408158.english: I've decided, &n the next video I'll shoot with Talon feather… &n Huh? Why are you suddenly grabbing your head, &n senpai?
1001408158.korean: 결정 했어,&n다음 영상은 탈론페더랑 같이 찍을…&n어? 왜 갑자기 머리를 감싸 쥐는 거야,&n선배?​

1001408159.english: Wow~ senior~&nThat's an amazing reaction~?&nDo you have any plans to be a regular member in my short-form content from now on?
1001408159.korean: 우와아~ 선배~&n굉장한 반응인데~?&n앞으로 내 숏폼에 고정 맴버로&n활동할 생각은 없어?​

1001408160.english: Hey senior, the views did really well this time too! How about trying a slightly bolder angle for the video…?
1001408160.korean: 선배,&n이번에도 조회수가&n엄청 잘 나왔더라!&n조금 더 과감한 영상 각을&n잡아보면 어떨까…?​

1001408161.english: Uh… this position feels like it might violate the OrcaTube operating rules... Ahaha... well, I guess it should be fine…? Shall we keep going according to the script the commander picked…?
1001408161.korean: 읏… 이 자세는&n오르카튜브 운영 규정에&n어긋날 것 같은데에... 아하하...&n뭐, 괜찮으려나…?&n사령관이 골라온 각본대로&n계속해서 진행해… 볼까?​

1001408162.english: It's okay…! Th-this is just a soft belly button… so it's fine! Right? This is a belly button…! See, a belly button! Hehehe~ Our channel complies with broadcasting regulations~ Right, senpai~?
1001408162.korean: 괜찮아…!&n이, 이건 어디까지나 말랑한 배꼽…&n이니까! 그렇지?&n이건 배꼽…! 이잖아, 배꼽!&n에헤헤~&n우리 채널은 방송심의규정을 준수합니다~&n라구요, 선배~?​

1001408163.english: You have to follow the review rules, right, &nLine! Ship!​

1001408164.english: Hehehehe… senpai…&nReally reaaally… amaaaazing…&nNow even I really… don't knooow…​
1001408164.korean: 데헤헤헤… 선배에…&n정말 정마알… 갱장헤엣…&n이젠 나도 정말… 몰라아…​

1001408165.english: Senior,&nLet's change the genre from the next video&n.&nHmm... What would be good~me?&nI got the concept...&nThe level is going to be high&nI think we should put an age limit~
1001408165.korean: 선배,&n다음 영상부턴 장르를&n좀 바꿔볼까 해.&n으음… 뭐가 좋을까~나?​&n컨셉을 잡긴 했는데…&n수위가 높을 예정이라서&n연령 제한을 걸어야 될 것 같아~

1001408175.english: Hmm... Do not worry about me. I am merely observing you as I please. Act as usual.
1001408175.korean: 흠.. 이 몸은 신경쓰지 마시오.&n그저 마음 내키는 대로&n그대를 관찰중이외다.&n평소처럼 행동 하시오.

1001408176.english: You are a kind person. I have never seen a human speak to a bioroid like that.
1001408176.korean: 그대는 상냥한 자구려.​&n바이오로이드에게&n그렇게 말을 붙이는&n인간은 처음 보았소.​

1001408177.english: Zero's Thunder God Flash, Kaen's Avatar Descent... When this body first created the Murasaki clan, such techniques did not exist in the world. In other words, they are techniques created much later. They are techniques that recreate this body wielding this sword, the Thunder God and the Avatar.
1001408177.korean: 제로의 뇌신일섬, 카엔의 화신강림…&n이 몸이 처음 무라사키 일족을&n만들었을 무렵엔 그런 기술은&n세상에 존재하지 않았소.&n즉, 한참 후에나 제작된&n기술이란 말이오.​&n그것들은 이 칼,&n뇌신과 화신을 휘두르는&n이 몸을 재현하는 기술이거든.

1001408178.english: Don't push yourself too hard. If you keep working like that every time... Look, kid! Aren't you staggering? Wouldn't it be better to take a rest now?
1001408178.korean: 너무 무리는 하지마시오,&n매번 그렇게까지 일을 해 대다가는…​&n이봐, 애송이! 비틀대고 있지 않소?&n이제 그만 휴식을 취하는 편이&n좋지 않겠소?

1001408179.english: Kaen and Zero… Can you truly be called Kunoichi like this? Do not try to hide it from me. Good heavens, it would be best to start your training over from the beginning.
1001408179.korean: 카엔과 제로…&n이래서야 그대들은 진정&n쿠노이치라 할 수 있겠소이까?&n이 몸에게 숨길 생각은 마시오.&n이래서야 원,&n처음부터 수련을 다시&n시작 하는 게 좋겠구려.

1001408180.english: Ah, you mean humans? Human affairs are still a bitter wound to me. There is nothing I can do about the hatred welling up inside me. But, aside from that... I trust you. If you weren't just a brat, I wouldn't be leaning on you like this.
1001408180.korean: 아아, 인간 말이오?&n인간의 일은 여전히 이 몸에겐&n쓰라린 상처라오.&n차오르는 증오심은&n어쩔 도리가 없소외다.​&n하지만, 별개로… 그대는 신뢰하고 있소.&n애송이가 아니었다면&n이렇게 기대는 일 따윈 없었을터이지.​

1001408181.english: As expected. So you are human, too?

1001408182.english: Hmm? Is it time to nurse? &n Hehehe… Young one, &n You're bolder than I thought?
1001408182.korean: 흐응? 젖을 물린 시간인가?&n후후후… 애송이 그대,&n생각 이상으로 대담하구려?​

1001408183.english: So you're curious about this one's girlish appearance, &n aren't you! &n Outwardly, I'm no longer a girl, am I? &n You mean my way of speaking? &n This girl begs your pardon, my lord! &n Haa~ After living 700 years, &n it seems this way of speaking stuck with me. &n I shall be careful!
1001408183.korean: 이 몸의 소녀스러운 모습이&n궁금한 거로군!&n이미 외적으론 소녀가 아니겠소?&n어투, 말이오?&n소녀, 주공께 죄송하게 됐사와요!&n하아~ 700년을 살아오는 동안&n이런 말투가 되어 버린 것 같사와요.&n조심하겠나이다!​

1001408184.english: My Lord, are you overexerting yourself... I am fully aware by now that you are outstanding in many ways... but seeing you like this is simply unacceptable. You are truly a strange person... Now, let us wrap things up here for today. It would be best for you to rest with me.
1001408184.korean: 주군, 무리하고 있지 않는가…&n그대가 여러 방면으로 뛰어나다는&n것쯤은 이제 충분히 알겠네만은…&n이런 모습만큼은 도저히 납득하기 어렵구려.&n정말이지 이상한 사람이외다…&n자아, 오늘은 이쯤에서 마무리하게나.&n이 몸과 함께 휴식을 취하는 게 좋겠소.​

1001408185.english: I had a chat with Boryeon, and she was a very polite and well-behaved child. ... If you really dig into the world of 'gyaru,' there really are so many things to learn... It's difficult...
1001408185.korean: 보련과 담소를 나누었는데 말이오,&n매우 예가 바르고 참한 아이였소외다.&n…갸루라는 것을 본격적으로 파고 들면&n참 여러가지로 배울 것이 많더구려...&n어렵군…​

1001408186.english: Hey hey honey~ How do I look today? Can you tell I studied hard? W-what? You said I'm cute... like usual...? Ugh~ Stop these surprise attacks... It's not good for me at this age...
1001408186.korean: 저기 저기 자갸~ 오늘 나 오때?&n열공한 티나?&n무, 뭣? 평소처럼 귀엽…다고…?​&n크으으윽~​&n이런 기습 공격은… 그만 두게나…&n이 나이에 좋지 않소외다…

1001408187.english: Do you really~ like me that much~? Well… with a girl with a figure like this, I guess it can't be helped~? Maybe it's only natural to want to touch her~? Heyy~ Aren't you going to give me some nom nom today? Darling~♥
1001408187.korean: 정마알~ 내가 그렇게 좋아~?​&n뭐… 이런 몸매의 소녀라면&n어쩔 수 없으려나~?&n만지고 싶은 게 당연할지도~?​&n저기이~ 오늘은 옴뇸뇸&n안 해줄꼬야? 달링~♥​

1001408188.english: Ufufu... I thought you might like it... so I dressed up as an Oiran. How is it? Isn't it truly lovely?
1001408188.korean: 우후후…&n그대가 좋아할 것 같다고 생각해서 말이지…​&n오이란의 차림을 해 보았네.&n어떠한가? 참으로 곱지 않은가?​

1001408189.english: Relax. How about we take our time and enjoy some refreshments first? There is wine, too, but... perhaps it would be better for the brat to just breastfeed. Ahaha!
1001408189.korean: 맘을 편히 먹거라.&n우선 천천히 다과를 즐기는 게 어떻겠느냐?​&n술도 있지만, 뭐… 애송이는 역시&n젖을 물리는 게 좋을지도 모르겠구나.&n아하하!​

1001408190.english: I had decided to just watch you in silence... but I guess I just want to know a little more... Is that not allowed? Then let me tell you about myself. Now, feel free to take your time looking around, okay? Hahaha.
1001408190.korean: 그대를 잠자코 지켜보기로만 했거늘…​&n아무래도 조금 더 알고 싶어져서 말이지…&n안 되는 겐가?​&n그렇다면 이 몸에 대해 알려주마.​&n자아, 찬찬~히 보아도 괜찮단다?&n후후후.​

1001408191.english: Looks like the alcohol has put you in a good mood? Phew... I feel the same way... I can't remember how many decades it has been since I've been this drunk... No, judging by my sense of time, it must have been even longer ago. Sorry, I apologize if I spoiled the mood. Now, the night is long, so drink it all up.
1001408191.korean: 술이 들어가니 기분이 좋아졌나보군?&n후우… 이 몸도 마찬가지…&n이렇게 술에 취해본 게 몇 십 년 만인지…&n아니, 이 몸의 시간 감각으로 따지자면&n더 오래전이겠구나.&n미안하네, 분위기를 흐렸다면 사과하지.&n자아, 밤은 길다네, 쭈욱 들이키게나.

1001408192.english: When I am with you like this… perhaps because of your kindness, I find myself feeling the hatred in my heart fading before I know it. It is truly strange; despite how much I resented humans… I could not feel anything similar while traveling with you. On the contrary… affection begins to blossom.
1001408192.korean: 이렇게 그대와 함께 있으면…&n그대의 다정함을 때문인지 어느샌가&n마음 속 증오가 옅어지는 것을 느끼게 된다네.&n참 이상한 일이지, 그렇게도 인간을 원망했건만…&n그대와 동행 중엔 비슷한 그 무엇도 느낄 수가 없었어.&n오히려… 애정이 피어 오르게 되는 구나.

1001408193.english: Hehe, whenever I chat with you, I am overwhelmed with joy. If our promised time comes to an end soon… I will be lonely.… So please… would you stay by my side just a little longer? Won’t you share your time with me?
1001408193.korean: 후후, 그대와 담소를 나눌 적이면&n즐거움에 몸 둘 바를 모르겠구나.&n이제 곧 약속된 시간이 끝나버리면…&n외로워질테지.&n…그러니 부디 조금만 더…&n곁에 있어주면 어떻겠는가?&n그대의 시간을 이 몸에게 나누어 주지 않겠는가?

1001408194.english: The night is very long. When we get to know each other a little better, then I will give my permission.
1001408194.korean: 밤은 매우 길어.​&n서로가 조금 더 알게 되거든,&n그때 허락 하겠노라.

1001408195.english: Hehehe… Have you come to want to touch? Very well… &n This one, too, grows all hot and cannot help it…! &n You have also been fired up with heat, &n now then… cast off all your adornments, &n and let us exchange this heat with one another.
1001408195.korean: 후후… 만지고 싶어졌느냐? 좋다…​&n이 몸 또한 몸이 홧홧하여&n어쩔 수가 없구나…!&n그대 또한 열기로 달아올랐으니,&n자아… 치장은 전부 벗어 던지고&n서로 이 열을 주고 받아보자꾸나.

1001408196.english: I suddenly thought, &n that by using this one's power I might be able to increase the happiness we feel now by 1.3 times… &n but I stopped. &n For that would be how this one feels, &n and it would be different from the happiness you feel… &n It would rather make you and this one feel as if we were living in different times. &n That would be intolerable. &n This one wishes to spend the same time as you…
1001408196.korean: 내 문득 떠올리기를,&n이 몸의 힘을 이용해 지금 느끼는 행복을&n1.3배로 늘릴 수 있지 않을까, 하였네만…&n그만 두었네.&n그것은 이 몸이 그렇게 느끼는 것이지,&n그대가 느끼는 행복과는 다른 것이 될 테니…&n오히려 그대와 이 몸이 다른 시간을&n살고 있는 것처럼 느끼게 될 게야.&n그것은 당치도 않다.&n이 몸은 그대와 똑같은 시간을 보내고 싶네…​

1001408197.english: If you drink milk after brushing your teeth, it tastes like mint milk.
1001408197.korean: 이를 닦다 우유를 마시면&n민트 우유 맛이 나요!​

1001408198.english: How did you know I was taking a bath at this time? Ignis… you said you would definitely keep it a secret…
1001408198.korean: 어떻게 제가 이 시간에&n목욕 하는 걸 아셨던 거죠?​&n이그니스 씨… 비밀 엄수&n꼭… 해 주신다고 하셨으면서…

1001408199.english: Elven milk might be a cure-all…&nI wonder if it's pure animal milk…&nHuh? You mean ignorance is bliss…?
1001408199.korean: 엘븐 밀크는 만병 통치약일지도 몰라요…&n순수한 동물성 우유일까 궁금한데…&n네? 모르는 게 약이라고요…?​

1001408200.english: I've been paying a bit more attention to brushing my teeth...⏎When you kiss me, Commander...⏎I hope you can feel a fresh scent in my mouth...⏎That would be nice.
1001408200.korean: 칫솔질에 신경을 좀 쓰는 중이에요...&n사령관님께서 키스하실 때…&n제 입안에서 상쾌한 향을 느끼신다면…&n좋겠어요.

1001408201.english: Commander… could you help me wash off this milk foam properly…?
1001408201.korean: 사령관님… 이 우유 거품,&n깨끗하게 씻어낼 수 있도록&n도와주시겠어요…?​

1001408202.english: Commander, I've heard that Maiden Milk is good for the skin... Could I try a little as well?
1001408202.korean: 사령관 메이든 밀크도&n피부에 좋다는 얘기가 있던데…&n저도 조금 맛볼 수 있을까요?​

1001408203.english: Even if you touch it like that, milk won’t come out, ooooh!

1001408204.english: Elven milk homemade…♥&nCould you help me…?

1001408205.english: Commander, if you also like milk baths... please call me... I'll make sure my mint scent stays all over your body... hehe... ♥
1001408205.korean: 사령관님도&n우유 목욕을 좋아하신다면…&n불러주세요…&n제 민트향이 온 몸에 남게…&n해드릴게요… 헤헤…♥​

1001408215.english: This squid doll is Kibisis… or Kibi for short… Isn't it cute? Hmm… Now that I look at it, the Demon King… looks kind of like Kibi… ?
1001408215.korean: 이 오징어 인형은 키비시스…&n줄여서 키비야… 귀엽지?&n음… 이제 보니 마왕 오빠…&n키비랑 닮은 것 같기도…?

1001408216.english: What am I doing when I'm not coming out? Well, I'm totally absorbed in games inside Kibi... It's nothing...
1001408216.korean: 밖으로 나오지 않을 때는&n뭘 하고 있냐고?&n그야 키비 안에서 게임 삼매경…&n아무것도 아니야…

1001408217.english: Yay~ Broke my personal best~ &nHehehe, so easy~ &n… … Whoaah!? Demon Lord Big Brother!? &n… … Ah, no, I definitely wasn't just playing around… &nI was properly doing my duties as a subordinate! &nI really mean it~!
1001408217.korean: 아싸~ 최고 기록 갱신~&n후후후 쉽다 쉬워~&n……우아앗!? 마왕 오빠!?&n……앗, 아니야 이건 절대 놀고 있었던 건 아니고…&n제대로 부관 일도 하고 있었어!&n정말이야~!

1001408218.english: Demon Lord Oppa! Have you tried the new game that just came out? What? You haven't played it yet? What have you been doing all this time! It's a total god-tier game! I guess it can't be helped! I'll play with you!
1001408218.korean: 마왕 오빠!&n이번에 새로나온 신작 해봤어?&n뭐어? 아직 안해봤다고?&n지금까지 뭐 한 거야! 완전 갓 겜인데!&n어쩔 수 없네! 내가 같이 해줄게!

1001408219.english: Seriously~! Demon Lord, you were working again? You really need to rest sometimes! So, that's it for today's work! Let's play together! Th-this is my job as a subordinate, after all! It's absolutely not because I want to play!
1001408219.korean: 정말~!&n마왕 오빠 또 일하고 있었던 거야?&n가끔은 쉬지 않으면 안 돼!&n그러니까 오늘 일은 여기서 끝!&n나랑 같이 놀자!&n이, 이것도 부관의 일이니까!&n절대 내가 놀고 싶어서 그런 건 아니야!

1001408220.english: You said I seem to be coming out often these days…? Well… Kibi’s inside is nice and comfortable for playing games, but… the Demon King isn’t there…
1001408220.korean: 요즘 밖으로 자주 나오는 것 같다고…?&n그야… 키비의 안은 게임하기 쾌적하고 좋지만…&n거기에는 마왕 오빠가 없는 걸...

1001408221.english: … Demon King Oppa…? Since Ireina’s affection level isn’t that high yet…

1001408222.english: Come to think of it, Epsilon-nee said that. She said if I want to take Ireina, I have to defeat her in a game... Demon King-nii, you can do it, right? I'll be looking forward to it!
1001408222.korean: 그러고 보니 엡실론 언니가 그랬어.&n이레이나를 데려가고 싶으면&n게임으로 자기를 꺾어야 한다고…&n마왕 오빠, 할 수 있지?&n나 기대하고 있을 게!

1001408223.english: Ahh~! You're only petting Kibi again! That's unfair! I'm the most precious character to Demon King Oppa, you know! Come on, hurry up and pet me too! Hehehe~ I really like Demon King Oppa~
1001408223.korean: 아앗~!&n또 키비만 쓰다듬어 주고! 치사해!&n마왕 오빠한테 제일 소중한 캐릭터는 나잖아!&n자, 빨리 나도 쓰다듬어줘!&n에헤헤~ 마왕 오빠 정말 좋아~

1001408224.english: Demon King Oppa, sit here for a moment… *Hup*… *Phew*… Huh? You ask what I’m doing? Well, your lap is my designated seat, Demon King Oppa…
1001408224.korean: 마왕 오빠, 잠깐 여기 앉아…&n영차… 후으… 응? 뭐하는 거냐고?&n그야 마왕 오빠의 무릎 위는 내 지정석이니까…

1001408225.english: Oh? Demon Lord Oppa, got a rare item?! Hehe~ I'll make good use of it~ Since we've even taken a vow now, of course we're supposed to share items! Right? In return, if I get something good, I'll give it to you, Demon Lord Oppa! Promise!
1001408225.korean: 오? 마왕 오빠, 레어 아이템 득템?!&n헤헤~ 잘 쓸게~ 이제 서약까지 한 사이니까&n아이템은 당연히 같이 쓰는 거지! 그치?&n대신 나도 좋은 거 나오면 마왕 오빠 줄게!&n약속!

1001408226.english: Brother Demon King, you're so mean! You even put access restrictions just to play the game all by yourself! I caught you red-handed yesterday while looking through your game list! You say it's too early for me? Hmph! That's unfair! Let's play together! I want to play! I'm going to play!
1001408226.korean: 마왕 오빠, 너무해!&n혼자만 재밌는 게임 하려고&n접근 제한까지 걸어두다니!&n어제 보유 게임 리스트 보다가 딱 걸렸거든?&n나한테는 아직 이르다고? 흥! 치사해!&n나도 같이 하자! 같이 할래!&n같이 할 거야!

1001408227.english: When I'm with Demon King Oppa, I feel like I'm at ease... I want to stay by your side all the time... and I want to act all spoiled... Is that okay...?
1001408227.korean: 마왕 오빠랑 있으면&n마음이 편해지는 것 같아…&n계속 옆에 있고 싶고…&n잔뜩 어리광 피우고 싶어져…&n그래도 괜찮아…?

1001408228.english: "You're asking who's better at games between me and Epsilon...? Of course I'm better! Ah! You don't believe me?!"
1001408228.korean: 나랑 엡실론 언니 중에&n누가 더 게임을 잘 하냐고…?&n당연히 내가 더 잘하지!&n앗! 지금 안 믿는 거야?!

1001408229.english: With this…! Like this…! You persistent fellow…! This is the last one…! Hehehe~ How was it? I easily passed the test prepared by the Demon King!
1001408229.korean: 이걸…! 이렇게 해서…!&n끈질긴 녀석…! 마지막이다…!&n헤헤헤~ 어떄?&n마왕 오빠가 준비한 관문 쉽게 통과했어!

1001408230.english: Talk to me later... I'm concentrating right now... I can't let the flow get interrupted...
1001408230.korean: 나중에 말 걸어 줘…&n지금 집중하고 있으니까…&n흐름 끊기면 안 돼…

1001408231.english: That's weird... No matter how much I catch it, the 'core item' isn't dropping... Demon King Oppa... Surely... You didn't use some trick, did you?
1001408231.korean: 이상해… 아무리 잡아도&n‘핵심 아이템’이 안 나와…&n마왕 오빠… 설마…&n뭔가 꼼수를 쓴 건 아니지?

1001408232.english: Demon Lord Oppa… I’m watching you…! Today is the day I’ll show you that I clear it…!
1001408232.korean: 마왕 오빠… 잘 보고 있어…!&n오늘이야 말로 클리어하는&n모습을 보여줄 테니까…!

1001408233.english: I did it…! I finally cleared it…! Then, is it time to take on the 'hidden boss,' the real Demon King…?
1001408233.korean: 해냈다…! 드디어 클리어 했어…!&n그럼 ‘히든 보스’인&n진짜 마왕을 공략한 차례인가…?

1001408234.english: "Kibi said it looks like it's torn here and there and really worn out...? Ah... that... is fine... I'll fix it later..."
1001408234.korean: 키비가 여기저기 찢어지고&n많이 해진 것 같다고…?&n아… 그건… 괜찮아…&n나중에 고칠 테니까…

1001408235.english: Ugh…! I died again… Demon King Oppa… Sit here and hold Kibi… I calm down when you’re by my side… Yeah… I’ll try my best a little longer…!
1001408235.korean: 우으…! 또 죽었어… 마왕 오빠…&n여기 앉아서 키비 안고 있어…&n마왕 오빠가 옆에 있으면 진정되니까…&n응… 좀 더 힘내볼게…!

1001408236.english: We've reached the ending, but… the real game starts now…! Because our game is just beginning its 'second playthrough'…!
1001408236.korean: 엔딩은 뵜지만…&n진짜 게임은 지금부터야…!&n우리들의 게임은 이제 ‘2회차’ 시작이니까…!

1001408286.english: It seems like everyone in Orca is strong. I need to try harder too.
1001408286.korean: 오르카 분들은 모두 강한 것 같아요.&n저도 더 노력해야겠어요.

1001408287.english: The paperwork... the schedule... Ugh... It's tough... What? You're saying it's okay if I take a break? No way! Since I was asked to do this, I want to show you that I can do it too!
1001408287.korean: 서류에… 스케쥴에… 으으… 어려워요…&n네? 쉬고와도 괜찮다고요? 아니에요!&n부탁받은 이상 저도 할 수 있다는 걸&n보여드리고 싶어요!

1001408288.english: Soul Junk… Ah, we called them Iron Bugs here, right? Beings that must all be killed… Commander? What’s wrong? Why are you suddenly staring at me like that…?
1001408288.korean: 소울정크…&n아, 여기서는 철충이라고 불렀죠?&n전부 죽여버려야 하는 존재… 사령관님?&n왜 그러세요? 갑자기 그렇게 쳐다보시고…?

1001408289.english: Ah, welcome, Commander. I have something to drink right now... Commander... If you don't mind... could I learn how to brew tea?
1001408289.korean: 아, 사령관님 어서 오세요.&n지금 바로 마실 것을… 사령관님…&n혹시 괜찮으시면…&n차 내리는 법을 배울 수 있을까요?

1001408290.english: I feel like I’ve gotten used to this place now… and of course, to the Commander as well…
1001408290.korean: 이제 이곳에도 익숙해진 기분이 들어요…&n물론 사령관님에게도…

1001408291.english: Commander, you are a strong person. Because you are protecting everyone in Orca. I feel that if I am with you, I can become like that too.
1001408291.korean: 사령관님은 강한 분이세요.&n오르카의 모두를 지키고 계시니까요.&n사령관님과 함께라면&n저도 그렇게 될 수 있을 거란 생각이 들어요.

1001408292.english: ... ... Do you have anything else to say?

1001408293.english: M-Commander!? I think that’s still… too early for me…
1001408293.korean: 사, 사령관님!?&n그런 건 아직…&n저한테는 이르다고 생각해요…

1001408294.english: Ah… th-that… if it’s the Commander… it’s fine…

1001408295.english: You have to know death to realize how much more precious the life you are living now is. And because of that fear, I don't want to run away either.
1001408295.korean: 죽음을 알아야 지금 사는 삶이&n훨씬 소중하다는 걸 알게 돼요.&n그게 무서워서 도망치고 싶지도 않고요.

1001408296.english: My dream was to become a doctor because I wanted to help people. Although I couldn't become a doctor, I feel fortunate to be able to help you, Commander, like this. In a way, could this be considered a fulfillment of my dream?
1001408296.korean: 저는 사람들을 돕고 싶다는 이유로&n의사가 되는 게 꿈이었어요.&n의사가 되진 못했지만,&n이렇게 사령관님을 도울 수 있어서&n다행이라고 생각해요.&n어떻게 보면 이것도 나름 꿈을&n이루었다고 볼 수 있을까요?

1001408297.english: If you are tired, how about taking a short break? There isn't much I can do for you right now, but if you would like, even a lap pillow...
1001408297.korean: 피곤하시다면&n잠깐 휴식하는 건 어떠세요?&n제가 당장 해드릴 수 있는 게 별로 없지만,&n원하신다면 무릎베개라도…

1001408298.english: For the first time in my life… my heart is pounding so hard… Can… can you… hear… the sound of my… heart…?
1001408298.korean: 태어나서 처음으로…&n엄청 두근두근하고 있어요…&n저… 저의…&n심장 소리… 들리시나요…?

1001408299.english: You're coming to my room...? It doesn't really matter, but there probably isn't anything worth seeing even if you drop by... Or maybe you have some ulterior motive?
1001408299.korean: 내 방에 온다고…? 상관은 없지만&n놀러 와도 볼만한 건 없을 텐데…&n아니면 다른 꿍꿍이라도 있는 걸까나~

1001408300.english: Commander, sorry, but could you lend me a glasses cleaning cloth? You don't have one? The shirt you're wearing right now is fine, though.
1001408300.korean: 사령관 미안한데 안경 닦이 좀&n빌려줄 수 있어? 없다고?&n지금 입고 있는 셔츠로도 괜찮은데?

1001408301.english: "What are you listening to?" "Commander, do you want to listen too?" "It might be a little loud, though."
1001408301.korean: 뭘 듣고 있는 거냐고?&n사령관도 같이 들어 볼래?&n조~금 시끄러울지도 모르겠지만

1001408302.english: Today's Orca Restaurant menu is… Salmon salad, chicken steak, cream risotto… Looking at it again, the Orca Restaurant menu is amazing. Then, shall we go grab a meal together?
1001408302.korean: 오늘의 오르카 식당 메뉴는…&n연어 샐러드, 치킨 스테이크,&n크림 리조또…&n다시 봐도 오르카 식당 메뉴는&n굉장하네.&n그럼 같이 밥이라도 먹으러 갈까?

1001408303.english: Huh? You're saying not only my original appearance but even my personality is completely different? Hmm... *clears throat*, Commander, I love you. How is it? Hahaha, is this not it?
1001408303.korean: 응? 내 원래 모습 뿐만 아니라&n성격까지 완전 다르다고?&n음… 큼큼, 사령관, 사랑한다.&n어때? 아하하 이게 아니야?

1001408304.english: Hi Commander… …? What? You're sleeping?… Hehehe… To think I'd let you get away with it? Drawing on the handsome Commander's face… even… … Well… You look tired, so I'll let it slide today…
1001408304.korean: 사령관 안녕……? 뭐야 자고 있잖아?&n…후후후… 빈틈을 보이다니?&n잘생긴 사령관 얼굴에 낙서라… 도…&n……뭐… 피곤해 보이니까&n오늘은 그냥 넘어가 줄게…

1001408305.english: Yeah! Commander. You're curious about my new special move, aren't you? Now~ don't move from right there! If you move… you'll get hurt, okay?
1001408305.korean: 응! 사령관.&n나의 새로운 필살기가 궁금한 거지?&n자~ 거기 꼼짝 말고 있어!&n움직이면… 다친다?

1001408306.english: Gotcha! Hehehe, what should I do with these naughty hands~? Touching means you're prepared to be touched, right?
1001408306.korean: 잡았다! 후후후 이 나쁜 손을&n어떻게 해줘야 할까~?&n만졌다는 건 만져질 각오가&n되어 있다는 거겠지?

1001408307.english: You said you were bored... but I see you're going to act like this...? Let me tell you, you're the one who started this, Commander!
1001408307.korean: 심심하다고는 했지만…&n과연 이렇게 나오시겠다…?&n말해두지만 먼저 시작한 건&n사령관 쪽이니까~!

1001408308.english: You're coming to my room...? It doesn't really matter, but there probably isn't anything worth seeing even if you drop by... Or maybe you have some ulterior motive?
1001408308.korean: 내 방에 온다고…? 상관은 없지만&n놀러 와도 볼만한 건 없을 텐데…&n아니면 다른 꿍꿍이라도 있는 걸까나~

1001408309.english: Commander, sorry, but could you lend me a glasses cleaning cloth? You don't have one? The shirt you're wearing right now is fine, though.
1001408309.korean: 사령관 미안한데 안경 닦이 좀&n빌려줄 수 있어? 없다고?&n지금 입고 있는 셔츠로도 괜찮은데?

1001408310.english: "What are you listening to?" "Commander, do you want to listen too?" "It might be a little loud, though."
1001408310.korean: 뭘 듣고 있는 거냐고?&n사령관도 같이 들어 볼래?&n조~금 시끄러울지도 모르겠지만

1001408311.english: Today's Orca Restaurant menu is… Salmon salad, chicken steak, cream risotto… Looking at it again, the Orca Restaurant menu is amazing. Then, shall we go grab a meal together?
1001408311.korean: 오늘의 오르카 식당 메뉴는…&n연어 샐러드, 치킨 스테이크,&n크림 리조또…&n다시 봐도 오르카 식당 메뉴는&n굉장하네.&n그럼 같이 밥이라도 먹으러 갈까?

1001408312.english: Huh? You're saying not only my original appearance but even my personality is completely different? Hmm... *clears throat*, Commander, I love you. How is it? Hahaha, is this not it?
1001408312.korean: 응? 내 원래 모습 뿐만 아니라&n성격까지 완전 다르다고?&n음… 큼큼, 사령관, 사랑한다.&n어때? 아하하 이게 아니야?

1001408313.english: Hi Commander… …? What? You're sleeping?… Hehehe… To think I'd let you get away with it? Drawing on the handsome Commander's face… even… … Well… You look tired, so I'll let it slide today…
1001408313.korean: 사령관 안녕……? 뭐야 자고 있잖아?&n…후후후… 빈틈을 보이다니?&n잘생긴 사령관 얼굴에 낙서라… 도…&n……뭐… 피곤해 보이니까&n오늘은 그냥 넘어가 줄게…

1001408314.english: Yeah! Commander. You're curious about my new special move, aren't you? Now~ don't move from right there! If you move… you'll get hurt, okay?
1001408314.korean: 응! 사령관.&n나의 새로운 필살기가 궁금한 거지?&n자~ 거기 꼼짝 말고 있어!&n움직이면… 다친다?

1001408315.english: Gotcha! Hehehe, what should I do with these naughty hands~? Touching means you're prepared to be touched, right?
1001408315.korean: 잡았다! 후후후 이 나쁜 손을&n어떻게 해줘야 할까~?&n만졌다는 건 만져질 각오가&n되어 있다는 거겠지?

1001408316.english: You said you were bored... but I see you're going to act like this...? Let me tell you, you're the one who started this, Commander!
1001408316.korean: 심심하다고는 했지만…&n과연 이렇게 나오시겠다…?&n말해두지만 먼저 시작한 건&n사령관 쪽이니까~!

1001408317.english: You know~ sometimes my old man's voice comes out, and I hope you don't get scared. Really? You mean there's an older sister you know who's like that? I'm getting curious.
1001408317.korean: 있잖아~&n가끔 영감님 목소리가 나올 때가 있는데,&n놀라지 않았으면 좋겠어. 응 정말?&n오빠가 아는 언니들 중에도 그런 언니가 있다고?&n궁금해지는데?

1001408318.english: My favorite older sister in Orca? Of course it's Hachiko-nee! Come to think of it, Hachiko-nee likes mint chocolate...? She asked if I liked meat pies... Is that really delicious?
1001408318.korean: 오르카에서 내가 제일 좋아하는 언니?&n당연히 하치코 언니지!&n그러고보니 하치코 언니가 민트초코…?&n미트파이 좋아 하냐고 물었는데…&n그거 정말 맛있는 거야?

1001408319.english: [i][8B00FF] Just because Stella follows you, do not think that we follow you too. It is merely… a temporary alliance to protect this child… Keep that in mind.
1001408319.korean: [i][8B00FF]스텔라가 당신을 따른다 하여,&n우리들 또한 당신을 따른다 생각하진 말게.&n그저…&n이 아이를 지키기 위한 일시적인&n동맹일 뿐이지… 명심하게나.​[-][/i]

1001408320.english: This guitar is less for playing and more like an antenna gathering souls around me... ? Hmm... closer to that. Huh? Don't look at me sadly! Everyone likes me so much... ? Hehe...
1001408320.korean: 이 기타는 연주보단,&n내 주변에 영혼들을 모으는 안테나…?&n으음… 그거에 가까워.&n응? 슬프게 보진 마!&n모두들 날 얼마나 좋아하는데…?&n헤헤…

1001408321.english: Oppa sometimes treats me like such a little kid! I am clearly an adult! A secret room? I know exactly what you do when you go to places like that with the other older sisters! You're hiding delicious snacks there to eat together, aren't you?!
1001408321.korean: 오빠는 가끔 날 너무&n어린 애 취급한단 말이야!&n난 엄연한 어. 른! 이라고!&n다른 언니들이랑 비밀의 방?&n그런 곳에 가서 뭘 하는 지 다 알아!&n맛있는 간식 숨겨두고 같이 먹는 거 맞지?!

1001408322.english: [i][8B00FF]Since I met you, the sadness I feel from Stella has lessened… I should say thank you.[-][/i]Ah, sorry, Oppa. Whoa… Oppa, stop stroking my head! I'm not a kid, really!
1001408322.korean: [i][8B00FF]널 만난 뒤로 스텔라에게서&n느껴지는 슬픔이 적어졌다…&n고맙다고 말해두지.[-][/i]&n아 미안 오빠.&n우앗… 오빠, 머리 그만 쓰다듬어!&n나 어린 애 아니라구,&n진짜아!

1001408323.english: [i][8B00FF]Take that hand off Stella right now.[-][/i]

1001408324.english: Oppa, if you have time later, could you... go on a date with me... Ah~ Old Man! No! Come out of here...! Don't treat me like a child! I'm an adult, so I'm going on a date with you!
1001408324.korean: 오빠,&n나중에 시간 되면 나랑… 데이트…&n아~ 영감님! 안돼! 그만 나와…!&n어린 애 취급 하지 마!&n난 어른이니까, 오빠랑 데이트 할 거야!

1001408325.english: Oppa, a lot has changed since coming to the Orca. I used to feel sad all the time, but... whenever I'm with you, I feel a new sensation. You'll stay with me forever, right, Oppa...?
1001408325.korean: 오빠,&n오르카 호에 오고나서 많은 게 바뀌었어.&n예전에는 계속 슬픈 기분이었지만…&n오빠랑 있을 때마다&n새로운 기분을 느끼고 있어.&n나랑 영원히 함께 있어 줄 거지 오빠…?​

1001408326.english: I had a very close friend in a place called the Blank… but they died a terrible death in an accident. Here, you are my friend, and the person I cherish the most. You’ll always be by my side… right? You won’t, right?
1001408326.korean: 공백이란 곳에서 아주 친한 친구 한 명이 있었어…&n하지만 사고로 끔찍하게 죽었지.&n이곳에서 오빠는 내 친구면서,&n내가 가장 아끼는 사람이잖아.&n오빠는 늘 내 곁에 있어줄… 거지?&n그렇지?

1001408327.english: Now, I will have hope, not sadness. A happy hope that I will live here with my brother... So you too must swear to Stella. That you will protect this child's happiness forever.
1001408327.korean: 이제 난 슬픔이 아니라 희망을 가질 거야.&n오빠와 함께 이곳에서 살아가겠다는…&n행복한 희망.&n[i][8B00FF]그러니 너 또한 스텔라에게 맹세하라.&n이 아이의 행복을 영원히 지켜주겠다고 말이다.​[-][/i]

1001408328.english: got permission from the old man. He said I wouldn't butt in on our date all day today. So today, I'm leaving my guitar in the room and focusing solely on my date with Oppa. Huh? You think it might be dangerous? Come on~ What's dangerous when Oppa is right next to me? Besides, all the older ladies here are cheering for me! I mean, going on a date with Oppa, hehehe... ♥
1001408328.korean: 영감님한테 허락 받았어,&n오늘은 종일 데이트 하면서 끼어들지 않기로.&n그래서 오늘은, 기타도 방에 두고&n오빠랑 데이트에만 집중할 거야.&n응? 위험할 것 같다고?&n에이~ 오빠가 옆에 있는 데 뭐가 위험해?&n게다가 여기 언니들 모두가 날 응원해주고 있는 걸?&n오빠랑 데이트 하는 거 말이야, 에헤헤…♥​

1001408329.english: I'm so happy every time you pet me… *sniff*… Do I look like a puppy?
1001408329.korean: 오빠가 쓰다듬어줄 때마다 너무 행복해…&n히잉… 나 강아지 같아?

1001408330.english: [i][8B00FF] Women need to keep their abdomens warm, so why on earth are you wearing clothes like this… What kind of guys are you? Uh, huh? You say all kids dress like this these days? No matter how I think about it, this doesn't seem right… [-][/i]
1001408330.korean: [i][8B00FF]여자는 복부를 따뜻하게 해야 하거늘,&n대체 왜 이런 옷을…&n너희들은 뭐하는 놈들이지?​ 으, 응?&n요새 애들은 다 이렇게 입는다고?&n아무리 생각해도 이건 아닌 것 같은데…[-][/i]

1001408331.english: How was the performance you prepared with Hella unnie? Honestly, I was really scared... but after talking to her, I liked that we have a lot in common. The outfit I wore this time is also a matching set with Hella unnie's; what do you think, oppa? Does it suit me well? Hehehe...
1001408331.korean: 헬라 언니랑 준비한 공연은 어땠어?&n사실 많이 무서웠는데… 언니랑 얘기해보니&n나랑 비슷한 점이 많아서 좋았어.&n이번에 입고 나온 옷도 헬라 언니랑&n세트로 맞춘 건데 어때 오빠?&n나랑 잘 어울려? 에헤헤헤…

1001408332.english: It seems like Hella and the old man don't get along. Before I know it, we find ourselves pinching each other's cheeks and fighting... I wonder what on earth they said...
1001408332.korean: 헬라 언니랑 영감님은&n서로 사이가 좋지 않은 가봐.&n정신 차리고 보면 우리 서로&n뺨 꼬집으면서 싸우고 있다니까...&n도대체 무슨 말이 오고 갔길래…

1001408333.english: They say that before the apocalypse, people held festivals that not only the living but also the dead could enjoy. But don't be fooled. They just talked about festivals and whatnot while treating me harshly... But here, the older sisters empathize with me and have fun with me... I love it so much!
1001408333.korean: 멸망 전 사람들은&n산 사람 뿐만 아니라,&n죽은 사람들도 즐길 수 있는&n축제를 벌였다고 해.&n그치만 속으면 안돼.&n축제니 뭐니 말만 그렇게 하고&n나한테 모질게 굴었으니까...&n이곳에선 언니들이 공감해주고&n함께 즐겨주니까… 너무 좋아!

1001408334.english: Oppa… my legs gave out and I fell… *Sob*… my clothes are all messed up… ?[i][8B00FF]You rascal! Why aren't you fixing my clothes right away?!​-][/i]
1001408334.korean: 오빠…&n나 다리에 힘이 풀려서&n넘어져버렸는데…&n흐잉… 옷이 헝클어졌네…?&n[i][8B00FF]이 녀석!&n어서 옷을 추슬러주지 않고&n뭘 하는 게냐?!​[-][/i]

1001408335.english: So, kisses from adults really feel good… Later, if Grandpa allows it… I want to try all sorts of things with Oppa… Hehe… It’s no use raising a granddaughter well! Hmph!
1001408335.korean: 어른들의 뽀뽀는&n정말 기분 좋은 거구나…&n나중에 영감님이 허락하면…&n오빠랑 이것저것 더 많이 해보고 싶어…&n헤헤…&n[i][8B00FF]손녀 잘 키워봐야 아무 소용 없어!&n흥!​[-][/i]

1001408336.english: Oh my gosh, Oppa... Even though I'm all dressed up so nicely, you're treating me like a little kid?
1001408336.korean: 오빠도 참…&n이렇게 이쁘게 차려 입었는데도&n날 어린 애 취급하는 거야?

1001408337.english: A little more… just the way you want… dance for me…

1001408338.english: Thank you, Oppa, for hosting this festival. Thanks to you, not only Hella but everyone gathered here is happy! I hope we can continue to be together and have many more days like this... days filled with hope and happiness instead of sadness... I mean days like that.
1001408338.korean: 축제를 열어줘서 고마워 오빠,&n덕분에 헬라 언니는 물론,&n이곳에 모인 모두가 행복해하고 있어!&n앞으로도 오빠랑 함께 하면서,&n이런 날이 많았으면 좋겠어…&n슬픔 대신, 희망과 행복이 있는…&n그런 날 말이야.

1001408348.english: Did you think I was heartless? Haha... Listen carefully... If you don't change your mind, you are the one who will eventually die. In that sense, you are weak... and fragile.
1001408348.korean: 제가 매정하다고 느끼셨나요?&n하하… 잘 들으시길…&n마음을 바꾸지 않으면&n결국 죽는 건 당신입니다.&n당신은 그런 면에서 나약하고…&n여린 존재로군요.

1001408349.english: Rather than worrying about me, please pour that affection into your subordinates... Don't worry about me getting hurt, because I consider myself as good as dead a long time ago.
1001408349.korean: 절 걱정하기보단,&n당신의 부하들에게 그 정을 쏟으시길…&n제가 다치는 것엔 신경 쓰지 마세요,&n전 이미 오래전 죽은 목숨이나&n다름 없다 생각하니까요.

1001408350.english: … I really can't understand you. You are terribly kind. To me, watching how long you can continue to care for others is no different from entertainment.
1001408350.korean: …당신은 정말 이해할 수가 없어요.&n아주 지독하게 착하다고요.&n그런 당신이 언제까지&n타인을 위할 수 있는지 지켜보는 것도&n제게 있어선 유흥이나 다름 없답니다.

1001408351.english: … Why do you keep making me worry?! Why are you trying to be nice to me for no reason? I am fighting a powerful being, and I am even prepared to die at its hands! … Don't confuse me!
1001408351.korean: …왜 자꾸 신경 쓰이게 하시죠?!&n왜 쓸데없이 제게 잘해주려 하시는 거죠?&n전 강한 존재와 싸우고,&n그 존재에게 죽는 것까지 각오하고 있다고요!&n…절, 혼란스럽게 하지 마세요!

1001408352.english: … How is it that you are an ordinary person filled with the fear of loss, yet you are a commander who reigns over everyone? I want to get to know you a little better. It’s just… curiosity, so please don’t think it’s strange.
1001408352.korean: …당신은 어째서 잃는다는&n두려움이 가득한 범부이면서도&n모두를 군림하는 사령관일 수 있죠?&n당신을 조금 더 알아보고 싶어요.&n다, 단지… 궁금증이니,&n이상하게 생각하지 마세요.

1001408353.english: I’ve come to understand you a little bit now, seeing you risk everything for something precious. I’ve come to think that perhaps I was wrong, and you were right... You, at some point... started looking different.
1001408353.korean: 소중한 무언가를 위해&n자신의 모든 것을 거는&n당신의 모습을 이제 조금은…&n이해할 수 있게 됐어요.&n어쩌면 제가 틀렸고,&n당신이 옳았다는 생각이 들었거든요…&n당신, 언젠가부터… 달라 보이네요.

1001408354.english: If you cut off that hand, it might be somewhat bearable.
1001408354.korean: 그 손을 잘라버린다면&n좀 봐 줄만 하겠군요.

1001408355.english: Are you trying to pick a fight? Fine. Come on, bring it on.

1001408356.english: I understand your beliefs. In the end, the weak one was myself, trying to escape through death. Please forget the reckless, spoiled brat I was; I want to risk my life to fight and welcome a new world with you.
1001408356.korean: 당신이 가진 신념을 이해했어요.&n나약한 건 결국,&n죽음으로 도피하려는 제 자신이었군요.&n막무가내 어리광쟁이었던 저를 잊어주세요,&n제 목숨을 걸고 싸워&n새로운 세계를 당신과 함께 맞이하고 싶어요.

1001408357.english: … There was a time when I had no qualms about giving up my life, but… thanks to you, it seems my thoughts are changing. Just a little bit… is it okay if I act a bit childish?
1001408357.korean: …목숨을 버리는 것에&n거리낌이 없을 때가 있었죠,&n하지만… 당신 덕에&n생각이 바뀌어 가는 것 같네요.&n아주 조금은...&n어리광 피워도 괜찮을까요?

1001408358.english: … The way the world views me, I’ve always been called a monster because of my arrogant and foul personality. Yes, it’s true, so I never even bothered to refute it. But you are changing me little by little. Is this… like the growing pains… of transforming into a true noble?
1001408358.korean: …세간에서 평가하는 저란 인물은&n오만하고 더러운 성격 탓에&n줄곧 괴물이라 불려왔죠.&n네, 맞는 말이라 반박하지도 않았어요.&n하지만 당신이 절 조금씩 바꾸고 있어요.&n이것이… 진정한 귀족으로 탈바꿈하는…&n성장통… 같은 건가요?

1001408359.english: I'm seriously dying of embarrassment because you keep calling me Lovely Lily!! Stop with that nickname... Seriously! Just stop it, please!!
1001408359.korean: 당신이 자꾸 러블리릴리라고&n부르는 바람에 정말이지&n쪽팔려 죽겠다고요!!&n그런 별명은 이제 그만… 나 참!&n그만 하란 말예요, 제발!!

1001408360.english: Since you are merely toying with the flower like that… when do you intend to pluck it? It is a flower destined to be plucked anyway… are you just going to… keep me in suspense like this…?
1001408360.korean: 그렇게 꽃을 희롱만 하시니…&n언제 그 꽃을 꺾을 셈이죠?&n어차피 꺾일 꽃…&n이렇게… 애만 태울 셈인가요…?

1001408361.english: When I first met you, Ellie, I regarded you as nothing more than a cute young lady. After you listened to my story of the past, you advised me that rather than wishing for death, it would be better to resolve my pain by acting out it... Hmph, in your eyes, am I scary, or pitiful?
1001408361.korean: 처음 엘리 씨를 만났을 땐 그저,&n귀여운 영애 정도로만 여겼어요.&n제 과거 이야기를 들어주신 뒤로 엘리 씨께서,&n죽음을 바라기보단 죽음을 연기하며 아픔을 해소하는&n방향이 좋을 것 같다고 조언해주셨는데…&n훗, 당신이 보시기에 저는 무서운가요,&n애처로운가요?

1001408362.english: The outfit I am wearing was also created based on Ms. Eternity's suggestion, with the concept of a guide to the afterlife. To think that your wish is to enter a coffin together and end our lives... well, at least the desperation seems sincere. If you are curious... would you like to hear the rest of the story over a cup of tea?
1001408362.korean: 제가 입은 옷도 이터니티 씨의 의견에 따라,&n사후 세계의 안내자 컨셉으로 만들어진 의상이죠.&n함께 관에 들어가 삶을 마감하는게 소원이라니…&n뭐, 간절함만큼은 진심인 듯 하네요.&n궁금하시다면… 차 한 잔 하시면서&n이야기를 마저 들어보시겠어요?

1001408363.english: The Orca members get goosebumps whenever I speak even slightly seriously. Maybe it's because I'm hanging out with Shade?
1001408363.korean: 오르카 대원 분들은&n제가 조금만 진지하게 말해도&n소름 돋아 하더군요.&n쉐이드 씨랑 같이 다니니까,&n더 그런 걸 수도 있겠죠?

1001408364.english: … I used to think that colleagues were nothing more than a curtain where the weak wanted to hide. But as I’ve been living like this, I’ve come to reconsider the meaning of it a little.
1001408364.korean: …동료라는 건,&n그저 나약한 자들이 숨고 싶어하는&n커튼일 뿐이라고 여겨왔어요.&n하지만 이렇게 지내다 보니,&n조금은 그 의미에 대해&n다시 생각해보게 됐어요.

1001408365.english: If it weren't for you, I would have just repeated slashing and tearing with a scythe in hand, just like Mr. Shade. I suddenly wonder how many people I sent off on that ship back then.
1001408365.korean: 당신이 없었더라면,&n저는 쉐이드 씨처럼 낫을 든 체로&n그저 베고 찢는 것 만을 반복 했을 테죠.&n그 시절의 제가 얼마나 많은 자들을&n이 배에 태워보냈을까,&n문득 궁금해지는군요.

1001408366.english: Perhaps the true nature of my emotion wasn't madness... but 'fear'? Thinking that I will walk this path alone in the afterlife... if I think that... I feel like I'll be suffocated by fear. Will you... hold my hand?
1001408366.korean: 어쩌면 제가 지닌 감정의 본모습은&n광기가 아닌… '공포' 였던 게 아닐까요?&n저승에선 홀로 이 길을 걷겠구나…&n그렇게 생각한다면… 두려움에 숨이,&n콱… 막힐 것만 같은 기분이니까요.&n손… 잡아 주실래요?

1001408367.english: Mr. Shade, cut off this man's hand right now to lighten the weight of his sin.
1001408367.korean: 쉐이드 씨.&n당장 이 자의 손을 잘라&n죄의 무게를 덜어내시죠.

1001408368.english: …Would you purify this demon tainted by madness?

1001408369.english: "Then wouldn't it be enough to just die…?" That’s what I’ve always said. Although, to be honest, I was just a spoiled brat trying to hide my fear. It feels a bit awkward to say this in clothes like this, but… I’ve decided to change that answer now, because… I have to live on.
1001408369.korean: 그럼 죽으면 그만 아닐까요…' 제가 늘 했던 말이죠.&n사실 겁 먹은 걸 숨기려는 어리광쟁이였지만요.&n이런 옷을 입은 모습으로 말하긴 그렇지만,&n이젠 그 대답을 바꾸기로 하겠어요,&n…살아가야 하니까요.

1001408370.english: You ask if this hammer isn't heavy? No, not at all. If you're worried about me, you'd better stop. This is a weapon that only I can handle.
1001408370.korean: 이 해머가 무겁지 않냐고? 아니~ 전혀.&n날 걱정하는 거라면 접어두는 게 좋아.&n이건 오직 나만이 다룰 수 있는 무기라고.

1001408371.english: Hey… what’s the name of that little orca kid who was hanging out with LRL earlier? He was so smart and cute… Oh… you have an older sister? Ah… haha! Oh… no, I just thought he was so cute… I see…
1001408371.korean: 저기… 아까 그 LRL이랑 같이 다니던&n범고래 꼬마 이름이 뭐야?&n똑소리 나는 게 너무 귀엽던데…&n아… 친언니가 있다고? 아… 하하!&n아... 아니, 너무 귀여워서… 그렇… 구나…

1001408372.english: "Orca Resistance"—that's a terrible naming sense. Don't you have a cooler name? Like Justice Society, or Bioroid Alliance... You mean Orca Resistance is better?
1001408372.korean: 오르카 저항군'이라니 네이밍 센스가 떨어지네.&n좀 더 간지나는 이름 없어?&n이를 테면 저스티스 소사이어티라던가,&n바이오로이드 얼라이언스라던가…&n오르카 저항군이 더 낫다고?

1001408373.english: I don't really like people who give orders. No matter how much you are humanity's last hope. At the very least, if you want to give me orders, you would have to possess much greater power than me. How about it... are you confident?
1001408373.korean: 난 명령을 내리는 사람들을&n그리 좋아하지 않아.&n아무리 네가 인류의 마지막 희망이라 하더라도.&n적어도 나한테 명령을 내리려면,&n나보다 훨씬 강력한 힘을 가져야 할 거야.&n어때… 넌 자신 있어?

1001408374.english: … It’s not that I just want to get angry like this. I just hate oppressive adults. For example… forcing me to shove a teddy bear into a pit of fire… or teaching and forcing such violence under the guise of adult discipline… I just… hate… it.
1001408374.korean: …나라고 이렇게 화만 내고 싶은 건 아니야.&n억압하는 어른들이 싫을 뿐이라고. 이를 테면…&n불구덩이에 곰돌이 인형을 처박으라 강요한다거나…&n그런 폭력을 어른의 훈계라며 가르치고&n강제하는 게… 싫을… 뿐이야.

1001408375.english: … Watching you, I’ve come to realize what the responsibility of an adult is all about. Give me the order. I’ll get it done without complaining this time.
1001408375.korean: …널 보면서 어른의 책임은 이런 거구나,&n느끼게 되었어.&n명령을 내려 줘.&n이번엔 투정 없이 해낼 테니까.

1001408376.english: You bastard… get away from me before I smash your hand in…?

1001408377.english: Ack... Hey! This feels weird! Stop it!!

1001408378.english: You think I've become really mature? I'm not offended... Can I take that as meaning I've grown up?
1001408378.korean: 내가 많이 어른스러워진 것 같다고?&n기분 나쁜 건 아냐…&n내가 성장했다는 뜻으로 받아들여도 될까?

1001408379.english: The Orca commanders aren't as narrow-minded as I thought. Marie, in particular, seems to be a good match for me. I heard she really likes children... and you know how we really connect? When I see cute kids, I... really just can't resist either...
1001408379.korean: 오르카 지휘관들도 생각보다&n그렇게 꽉 막힌 사람들은 아니더라고.&n특히 마리는 나랑 잘 맞는 것 같아.&n아이들을 많이 좋아한다던데…&n나랑 정말 말이 잘 통하는 거 있지?&n귀여운 아이들을 보면&n나도… 정말이지 참을 수가 없거든…

1001408380.english: I feel so foolish for believing that getting angry would solve everything... Yes, the way you never back down no matter the situation... I think that is exactly the way I should emulate.
1001408380.korean: 화를 낸다고 모든 게 해결될 거라&n믿었던 내가 너무 바보 같아…&n그래, 어떤 상황에서도 물러서지 않는&n네 모습… 그런 모습이야말로,&n내가 본받아야 할 방식이 아닐까 싶어지네.

1001408381.english: Hey, you! Stop acting all cool... Instead of relying on you all the time, I want to show you that I've grown enough to protect you too!
1001408381.korean: 너 말이야,&n너무 멋진 척만 하진 말란 말이야…&n너한테 매번 의지하기보단,&n나도 널 지켜낼 수 있을 만큼&n성장했다는 걸 보여주고 싶다고!

1001408382.english: Naughty hands again? Haa... Fine. I'll let it slide for just 10 seconds...?
1001408382.korean: 또 또 나쁜 손?&n하아… 그래.&n딱 10초만 봐준다…?

1001408383.english: Sweating like this really helps calm my mind a bit. Now, may I ask you to spar again? Bring it on, don't hold back! I'll take every hit you take!
1001408383.korean: 이렇게 땀 흘리다보면&n마음 속이 좀 가라앉는 느낌이야,&n자, 계속해서 대련을 부탁해도 될까?&n인정사정 봐주지 말고 덤벼보라고,&n다 받아 쳐줄 테니까!

1001408384.english: I'm learning a lot from Shirayuri. She says true strength doesn't come from anger. So, I'm thinking of setting a new goal... I'll show you a version of myself that's cool and strong enough to make you call me 'Big Sister' before you even realize it, so just wait for me!
1001408384.korean: 시라유리한테 많이 배우고 있어.&n진정한 강함은 분노에서 나오지 않는다고.&n그래서 새로운 목표를 가져볼까 해…&n너도모르게 날 누나로 부를 만큼 멋지고&n강해진 모습 보여줄 테니까,&n기다리고 있어!

1001408385.english: You ask why I don't do other hobbies? Hmm... It's not that I haven't tried. Cooking, swimming... and... even bungee jumping... It just seems like this one suits me best. Haa~ Maybe I should gather the kids later and open an Iris Kendo dojo? Hehe...
1001408385.korean: 다른 취미활동은 왜 안 하냐고?&n으음… 사실 도전해보지 않은 건 아냐.&n요리나 수영… 그리고… 번지점프까지도…&n그나마 이게 제일 나랑 잘 맞는 것 같더라고.&n하아~ 나중에 애들 모아서&n이리스 검도 도장이나 한 번 만들어볼까?&n헤헤…

1001408386.english: can't say anything other than that you're really strong... Ha, so this is the real power of Commander Orca, huh? Just what kind of special training are you getting behind my back? Teach me too! I'm definitely not going to lose next time!
1001408386.korean: 정말 강하단 말 밖에 안 나오네…&n하, 이것이 진짜&n오르카 사령관의 파워라는 거지?&n대체 나 몰래 어떤 특훈을 받고 있는 건데?&n나한테도 전수해 줘!&n다음엔 절대 지지 않을 거니까!

1001408387.english: Shirayuri asked me a lot of questions about this and that. I wonder what she's so curious about... You, you! How do you know my preferences! I only told that to Shirayuri...! That was a secret!
1001408387.korean: 시라유리가 나한테&n이것저것 많이 물어보더라고.&n궁금하게 뭐 그리 많은지… 너, 너!&n내 취향을 어떻게 알아!&n그건 시라유리한테밖에 말하지 않았는데…!&n그건 비밀이었다고!

1001408388.english: Hwaaaah… Did I lose!!! How on earth am I supposed to beat you…? This isn't going to work… Let's play another round! Just what kind of mindset do you have to beat me in an instant?! I can't lose like this… Get into position again!
1001408388.korean: 흐아아아… 내가 진건가!!!&n대체 널 어떻게 해야 이길 수 있는 거야…?&n안 되겠어… 다시 한 판해!&n대체 네 마음가짐이란 어떻길래&n날 단박에 이겨버리는 건데?!&n이대로 질 수 없어…&n다시 자세 잡아!

1001408389.english: Haa! Found a weakness! Cast aside your worries and focus!

1001408390.english: …Haa, this is impossible… Since sparring is over now… *Hiccup*… Ah, noooo…?!
1001408390.korean: …하아, 무리야…&n이제 대련은 끝났으니까…&n히끅… 아, 안 돼엣…?!

1001408391.english: Hey you, stop treating me like a kid! If I win this duel, I'm going to make sure you call me 'Big Sister'! Now, grab that sword again and come at me!
1001408391.korean: 너 말이야, 그만 날 애처럼 다뤄!&n이번 대련에서 이기면 꼭&n너한테 누나 소리를 듣고야 말 테니까!&n자, 다시 그 검을 잡고 덤벼!

1001408401.english: Yes, even among the three thousand palace maids, I saw a few dandys skilled with spears... but still, someone like me who flies like a butterfly and stings like a bee... hire me right now with money~
1001408401.korean: 네 삼천궁녀들 중에도&n창을 잘 다루는&n멋쟁이들이 몇 명 보이던데…&n그래도 말이지 나비처럼 날아서&n벌처럼 쏘는 나같은 애는…&n지금바로 돈으로 고용하세요~

1001408402.english: Why are there so many pathetic bitches walking around naked here because they don't even have money to buy panties and bras?!
1001408402.korean: 빤스랑 브라자 살 돈도 없어서&n발가벗고 다니는 불쌍한 년들이&n왜 이렇게 많아 여긴?!

1001408403.english: All the kids here like you...? Why? What hypnosis app do you use? Its performance is insane!
1001408403.korean: 여기 있는 애들이 전부 널…&n좋아한다고? 왜?&n너 최면어플 뭐 쓰냐?&n성능 하난 끝장나네!

1001408404.english: You know your place, don't you? That's a relief. It's a world swarming with people who don't even realize they're a burden, so just knowing that is half the battle!
1001408404.korean: 넌 네 분수를 아는구나? 다행이다~&n자기가 짐인 줄도 모르고 사는 놈들이&n득실대는 세상인데,&n그것만으로도 반은 하는 거야!

1001408405.english: People protect expensive things even at the risk of their lives. It is a natural order of things in a world where money is more important than human life. Isn't it?
1001408405.korean: 비싼건 목숨을 걸어서라도 지킨다.&n사람 목숨보다&n돈이 더 중요한 세상에 당연한 섭리지.&n안 그래?

1001408406.english: Well… whatever your true identity is, I don’t care anymore…
1001408406.korean: 뭐… 네 정체가 뭐든 이젠 아무래도 좋아…

1001408407.english: Ugh... Why don't you just go die...

1001408408.english: My tattoo… don’t you want to take a closer look?
1001408408.korean: 내 문신… 자세히 보고 싶지 않아?

1001408409.english: My real name… I’ll tell you only. ‘Mari’… But please keep calling me ‘Ephnel’… Because I like that.
1001408409.korean: 내 진짜 이름… 너한테만 알려줄게.&n'마리'… 그치만 계속 '에프넬'이라고 불러줘…&n난 그게 좋으니까.

1001408410.english: I'm not pretending to be strong. I really am. You're the one who's drunk on the taste of power because the three thousand palace maids are fawning over you, calling you 'Commander~', 'Commander~', and now you can't tell the difference between poop and soybean paste~!!! Watch out, seriously... You're going to rot away at this rate. It's a good thing I'm here...
1001408410.korean: 난 강한 척 하는 거 아니야. 진짜 강한 거라고.&n너야말로 삼천궁녀들이 '사령관~',&n'사령관~'하면서 떠받들어주니까 권력 맛에 취해서&n똥인지 된장인지 구분 못 하고 있잖아~!!!&n조심해 진짜로… 너 그러다 뼈삭아.&n내가 있어서 망정이지…

1001408411.english: The Commander… gets angry… if you tease him by calling him a seedless watermelon… Uh, uh?! When did you get here…? Ah~ this? It’s a memo I wrote down in case I forgot, but I was reading it because I was bored. Ahaha!
1001408411.korean: 사령관은…&n씨 없는 수박이라고 놀리면… 화를 낸다…&n어, 어엇?! 언제 왔어…? 아~ 이거?&n혹시 잊어버릴까봐 적어 뒀던 메모인데&n심심해서 읽어보고 있었어.&n아하하!

1001408412.english: Hey, don't you feel any remorse making a pitiful beauty like me fight those grotesque and disgusting Iron Bugs?! Anyway... if you were born with something down there, have some pity on us who were born without it!
1001408412.korean: 야, 너는 나같이 가련한 미모의 여인을&n저런 괴상망측하고 징그러운 철충하고 싸우게 시키면서&n양심의 가책 같은 건 안 느끼는 거야?!&n하여간… 아랫도리에 뭐라도 달고 태어났으면&n없이 태어난 우리한테 동정심을 좀 가지란 말이야!

1001408413.english: Wait, stop right there! The deposit hasn't shown up in the account yet...?
1001408413.korean: 잠깐, 동작 그만!&n계좌에 입금 내역 아직 안 찍혔는데…?

1001408414.english: No matter how much I rave about how my urine is good for blood circulation and liver recovery, you wouldn't readily accept and drink it, right? It's the same thing. First, you have to show me something for me to believe you.
1001408414.korean: 내가 내 오줌이 혈액순환과 간기능 회복에&n좋다고 암만 떠들어대도 선뜻&n내 오줌 받아 마시지 않을 거잖아? 똑같은 거야.&n우선 뭘 보여줘야 내가 믿음을 가질 수 있지.

1001408415.english: Whoa! This isn't... a lump of protein forced into my mouth just to maintain my bodily functions... Hey! Can't we talk to the cook in charge of the Orca Resistance and ask him to make some meatballs too? Huh? Huh? Huh? Please!
1001408415.korean: 우와아! 이건… 생리현상을 유지하기 위해&n입에 억지로 집어넣어진&n단백질 덩어리가 아니야…&n있지! 오르카 저항군&n관할 요리사한테 말해서&n미트볼도 만들어달라 하면 안 될까?&n응? 응응? 응응응? 제~발~

1001408416.english: Strikers? Just... out of all the guys here, they're the coolest-looking, and their actions are cool too. Especially Mina; considering she defied fate, she's really earning her keep... Wow, seriously, she's totally awesome. Plus, she's kind of crazy about coins, so we really click in a lot. Maybe I should save up some money and get myself a custom shield...
1001408416.korean: 스트라이커즈?&n그냥, 여기 있는 애들 중에 생긴 것도&n제일 쿨한데 하는 짓까지 쿨하잖아.&n특히 미나라는 애는 운명을 거스른 주제에&n밥값은 톡톡히 하고 있다는 게…&n캬~ 진짜 간지 작살이야.&n게다가 걔도 은근 동전에 환장하는 게&n여러모로 나랑 잘 통한다니까?&n이참에 나도 돈 모아서&n전용 방패 하나 장만할까…

1001408417.english: I would never do something like deceiving others with lies. I’ve been put through it so miserably for so long that it’s unbelievable. So I’m just blurting things out as they come to mind. I don’t mean any harm...
1001408417.korean: 난 거짓말로 남을 속이는 짓&n같은 건 절대 하지 않아.&n그동안 말도 안 될 만큼&n지긋지긋하게 당해왔거든.&n그러니까 그냥 되는대로&n내뱉는 거야. 악의는 없다고…

1001408418.english: Someone like you should be grateful that you can be with a stunning, busty beauty like me! Why… why are you laughing?! Why are you laughing! Am I funny?! Hey! S-stop laughing…!
1001408418.korean: 너 따위가 나같이 잘빠진 거유 미인과&n함께할 수 있음에 감사하라구!&n왜… 왜 웃어?! 왜 웃는데! 내가 웃겨?!&n야! 그, 그만 웃어…!

1001408419.english: The word 'colleague' just feels a bit cringey... You and the kids here taught me. I'm not a failure. I'm going to trample on those who take pleasure in others' misfortunes and mock them right in front of them.
1001408419.korean: 동료라는 말은 아무래도 오글거려서…&n너와 여기 있는 애들이 알려줬어.&n난 실패작이 아니야.&n남의 불행으로 행복해하는 것들을&n짓밟고 보란듯이 비웃어줄거야.

1001408420.english: If you love me, give me the money!

1001408421.english: The spear you held pierced me… ♡

1001408422.english: We're connected by something sticky… Woohoo…

1001408423.english: This sword? If I piece it together like this… Snip! Ahaha… You were surprised…?
1001408423.korean: 이 검이요?&n이걸 이렇게 해서 이어 붙이면…&n싹뚝! 아하하… 놀라셨어요…?

1001408424.english: I couldn't sleep well last night because of the feeling of falling out of bed… What? A sign that I'm growing taller…? Wow, I feel so refreshed! I don't think I've ever slept this well since coming here!
1001408424.korean: 어젯밤 침대에서 떨어지는&n느낌 때문에 잠을 설쳤어요…&n네? 키가 크려는 징조…? 와, 완전 개운해요!&n여기 와서 오늘처럼 잘 잔 적이 없던 것 같아요!

1001408425.english: Sister Iris? What's wrong? Suddenly looking at me like that... Oh, Oppa! This older sister is scary...! Please help me...!
1001408425.korean: 이리스 언니? 왜 그러세요?&n갑자기 그런 눈으로 저를…&n오, 오빠! 이 언니 무서워요…!&n도와주세요…!

1001408426.english: I think being with my brother like this isn't bad either.
1001408426.korean: 이렇게 오빠와 함께 있는 것도&n나쁘지 않은 것 같아요.

1001408427.english: Hey, please stop petting me unconsciously like that... It's not that I don't like it... but someone might see and get a strange misunderstanding!
1001408427.korean: 저기,&n그렇게 계속 무의식적으로&n쓰다듬지 말아주세요… 싫은건 아니지만…&n누가 보고 이상한 오해를 할 수도 있으니까요!

1001408428.english: The place I was in was a world that wasn't reality... Being with you now... it's not a lie, it's the real thing, right?
1001408428.korean: 제가 있던 곳은 현실이 아닌 세상이었어요…&n오빠와 같이 있는 지금은…&n거짓이 아닌 진짜겠죠?

1001408430.english: I'm not a child who will let it slide with just a head pat! Because even if you keep doing it... nothing changes...!
1001408430.korean: 저는 머리 쓰다듬기로 넘어가 줄 정도로&n어린애가 아니에요!&n계속… 해줘도 달라지는 건 없으니까요…!

1001408431.english: It would be nice if you grew just a little more… I was talking about height!
1001408431.korean: 조금만 더 성장하면 좋을 텐데…&n신장을 말한 거예요!

1001408432.english: Oppa, I like you!…? Oppa…? Whoa...! Oppa fainted while standing!
1001408432.korean: 오빠, 좋아해요!&n…? 오빠…? 와앗...!&n오빠가 선 채로 기절했어요!

1001408433.english: Something I like? It's, it's a secret...

1001408434.english: Oppa, may I stand beside you for a moment? Hehehe, it doesn't mean anything special. I just hope I can stay by your side like this forever...
1001408434.korean: 오빠, 잠깐 옆에 서 있어도 될까요?&n에헤헤, 특별한 의미가 있는 건 아니에요.&n이대로 계속 옆에 있을 수 있기를…

1001408435.english: Oppa… is this perhaps something naughty…? Naughty things aren't allowed.
1001408435.korean: 오빠… 혹시 야한 건가요…?&n야한 건 안 돼요.

1001408436.english: We were supposed to talk about how to deal with my brother... but I don't know what that has to do with these clothes.
1001408436.korean: 오빠를 상대하는 법에 대해서&n이야기 하기로 했는데…&n그게 이 옷이랑&n무슨 연관이 있는 건지 모르겠어요.

1001408437.english: It seems like Merope has some kind of complaint against Alcyone... Yeah... I think I know what it is...
1001408437.korean: 메로페는 알키오네 언니에게&n무슨 불만이 있는 것 같아요…&n응… 무슨 불만인지 알 것 같기도…

1001408438.english: Rize is really good at sharpening scissors. She often calls them 'pests'... I guess she gets a lot of pests?
1001408438.korean: 리제 언니는 가위 손질을 정말 잘해요.&n'해충'이라고 자주 말하는데…&n해충이 많이 나오는 편인가봐요?

1001408439.english: Um... so... ... I heard you'd like it if I acted like this, so lame♥... What do you think...?
1001408439.korean: 저기… 그러니까…… 허~접♥&n이러면 오빠가 좋아할 거라고 들었는데…&n어때요…?

1001408440.english: These bunny ears are really cute. I asked them to make them for me. Do I look like a bunny?
1001408440.korean: 이 토끼귀 정말 귀여워요.&n제가 만들어 달라고 했는데&n토끼처럼 보이나요?

1001408441.english: You're asking what sound rabbits make...? Ah... uh... hop... hop... Ahaha... I guess this isn't it...?
1001408441.korean: 토끼는 어떤 소리로 우냐고요…?&n아… 그… 깡총… 깡총… 아하하…&n역시 이건 아니겠죠…?

1001408442.english: Please do not touch it as it is sensitive.

1001408443.english: Oh, Oppa!? Th-that place… you said the tail is cute…? Ah, yeah, thank you…
1001408443.korean: 오, 오빠!?&n거, 거기는… 꼬리가 귀엽다고…?&n아, 응, 고마워요…

1001408444.english: They say rabbits die if they are lonely. So you have to make sure your brother isn't lonely.
1001408444.korean: 토끼는 외로우면 죽는다고 해요.&n그러니까 오빠가 외롭지 않게 해주셔야 해요.

1001408463.english: Hunyaaaa~ Orca's seat is soft and smells nice~

1001408464.english: You ask if I react to small moving objects? Even though I'm a cat, there's no way I'd be swayed by such primal instincts... Meow! Nyaa! Gotcha!
1001408464.korean: 움직이는 작은 물체에 반응하냐고?&n내가 고양이라지만 아무리 그래도&n그런 원초적인 본능에 휘둘릴 리가…&n냐아! 냥! 잡았다!

1001408465.english: I heard that people buy and sell things with canned tuna here. Hehehe, people must have finally realized the greatness of canned tuna!
1001408465.korean: 여기서는 참치캔으로&n물건을 사고 판다고 들었어.&n우후후, 드디어 사람들이&n참치캔의 위대함을 깨달은 게 분명해!

1001408466.english: Pero is a quiet and pretty white cat! He's really good to me, but I think he doesn't like being touched. Just recently, I hugged him from behind and got scolded really hard...
1001408466.korean: 페로는 얌전하고 예쁜 흰 고양이야!&n나한테도 엄청 잘해주는데&n누가 만지는 건 싫어하나 봐.&n얼마 전에도 뒤에서 끌어안았다가&n엄청 혼났어…

1001408467.english: Poi is active… active… and a unique black cat. Also, it seems like it really likes it when the Commander pets it. I wonder how that is different from me petting it?
1001408467.korean: 포이는 활발하고… 활발한…&n특이한 검정 고양이야.&n또 사령관이 만져주면&n엄청 좋아하는 것 같아.&n내가 만지는 거랑 뭐가 다른 걸까?​

1001408468.english: Hmm... Commander, I'll borrow your hand for a moment. Hmm... I feel like I know, and I don't know... Ah, it's nothing!
1001408468.korean: 음……… 사령관,&n그 손 잠깐만 빌릴게.&n으음……&n뭔가 알 것 같기도 모를 것 같기도…&n아, 아무것도 아니야!​

1001408470.english: That suspicious hand movement… You’re trying to tickle me again, aren’t you! It’s not that I dislike it, but…
1001408470.korean: 그 수상한 손놀림…&n또 간지럽히려는 거지!&n그렇게 싫은 건 아니지만…

1001408471.english: "Are you asking if we're holding hands again today?" "Why...? Do you perhaps not want to...?" "No, right?" "Yeah! Then I'll hold hands again today! Meow~!"
1001408471.korean: 오늘도 손잡고 있을 거냐고?&n왜…? 혹시 싫어…? ​아니지? 응!&n그럼 오늘도 손잡고 있을래! 냥냥~!​

1001408472.english: Sniff, sniff, sniff. The Commander smells like another cat. Shhh! Shhh! Shhh! Shhh! That's it. Now you can only smell me, right?
1001408472.korean: 킁킁킁,&n사령관의 몸에서 다른 고양이의 냄새가 나.&n샥! 샥! 샥! 샥! 이제 됐다.&n이제 내 냄새밖에 안 나지?

1001408473.english: I want to lie in a warm place all day today… What are you doing on my lap? Didn't I just say I wanted to lie in a warm place? Hunya-nyan~ It's warm~
1001408473.korean: 오늘은 하루 종일&n따뜻한 곳에 누워 있고 싶은데…&n무릎 위에서 뭐 하냐고?&n내가 방금까지 따뜻한 곳에&n누워 있고 싶다고 말했잖아?&n후냐냥~ 따뜻해~

1001408474.english: I said I wasn't sure, but now I think I understand a little bit what it means to be together. Holding hands like this gives me that warm feeling I used to have. Yeah... but you know, maybe it's a slightly different kind of warmth...?
1001408474.korean: 잘 모르겠다고 말했지만,&n지금은 함께 있다는 게 뭔지 조금 알 것 같아.&n이렇게 손을 잡고 있으면&n옛날에 느꼈던 따뜻한 기분이 들어.&n응… 그래도 말이지,&n뭔가 조금은 다른 따뜻함 일지도…?

1001408475.english: Uh...? Why are you touching here...? Meow... I'm shy...

1001408476.english: Sowon and Audrey, Aurora and Olivia, and Taylor all made clothes for me!
1001408476.korean: 소완과 오드리,&n아우로라와 올리비아 그리고 테일러&n모두가 나를 위해서 옷을 만들어 줬어!

1001408477.english: I'm hungry, but they said I have to wait until filming is over... but they said it's okay to eat until I'm full once it's all finished!
1001408477.korean: 배고픈데 촬영이 끝날 때까지&n기다려야 한대…&n대신 전부 끝나면 배불리 먹어도&n괜찮다고 했어!

1001408478.english: The people of Orca all like canned tuna. Hah…! Could it be that they are actually all cats just like me?
1001408478.korean: 오르카의 사람들은&n모두 참치캔을 좋아해.&n핫…! 혹시 사실은&n모두 나랑 같은 고양이인 건가?

1001408479.english: Commander! Look! How do you like this outfit? You say it looks delicious? What does that mean?
1001408479.korean: 사령관! 봐봐!&n이 옷 어때?&n맛있어 보인다고?&n그게 무슨 뜻이야?

1001408480.english: Since the Commander is the most amazing person in Orca... that means he has the most tuna cans, right? Huh? No? Hunya... My incredible plan...
1001408480.korean: 사령관은 오르카에서&n가장 대단한 사람이니까.&n참치캔을 제일 많이&n가지고 있다는 거겠지?&n어? 아니야?&n후냥… 내 엄청난 계획이…

1001408481.english: Ferro is shrimp, Poi is mackerel, and I'm tuna! Which one do you like best, Commander? I like them all!
1001408481.korean: 페로는 새우,&n포이는 고등어,&n나는 참치야!&n사령관은 어떤 게 제일 좋아?&n나는 전부 좋아해!

1001408482.english: Commander… did you wash your hands properly?

1001408483.english: You're asking where the tastiest part of this outfit is? Uh... I mean... the tastiest part... all of it...?
1001408483.korean: 이 옷에서&n제일 맛있는 부위가 어디냐고?&n어… 그러니까…&n제일 맛있는 부위… 전부…?

1001408484.english: Taylor said that if I wore this outfit, I should say, "Please enjoy the meal." But I'm the one enjoying the meal... Why is she asking me to eat it?
1001408484.korean: 테일러가 이 옷을 입었으면&n‘맛있게 먹어주세요’라고&n말해야 한다고 했어.&n맛있게 먹는 건 난데…&n왜 먹어달라고 하는 거지?​

1001408485.english: What is today's mission? I will check the efficient route in advance.
1001408485.korean: 오늘의 임무는 어떻게 되십니까?&n제가 효율적인 동선을 미리 확인해두겠습니다.

1001408486.english: Please assign the next mission. Unnecessary waiting time leads to a waste of power.
1001408486.korean: 다음 임무를 지시 부탁드립니다.&n불필요한 대기 시간은 전력 낭비로 이어집니다.

1001408487.english: There are no unusual circumstances at the moment. Please give us an order at any time if you require further reporting. We will be on standby 24 hours a day.
1001408487.korean: 현재 특이사항은 없습니다.&n추가적인 보고가 필요하시면 언제든 명령해주십시오.&n24시간 대기하고 있겠습니다.

1001408488.english: Rest… you mean? But I’m not sure what to do… just follow my heart… Understood. Then, just as I feel, I will stand by your side, Commander, awaiting the next mission.
1001408488.korean: 휴식… 말입니까?&n하지만 뭘 어떻게 하면 좋을지…&n마음 가는 대로… 알겠습니다.&n그럼 마음 가는 대로 사령관님의 곁에서&n다음 임무를 대기하겠습니다.

1001408489.english: We are analyzing your preferences, Commander. What are your preferred foods or activities? Providing this information will allow for more efficient support.
1001408489.korean: 사령관님의 취향을 분석 중입니다.&n선호하는 음식이나… 활동은 무엇입니까?&n정보가 있다면 더욱 효율적인 지원이 가능합니다.

1001408490.english: I would appreciate it if you could let me know what I can prepare for you, Commander. Even something trivial is fine. Even if it is a not-so-trivial order... that is fine.
1001408490.korean: 제가…&n사령관님을 위해 준비할 수 있는 게&n뭔지 알려주셨으면 합니다.&n사소한 것이라도 좋습니다.&n사소하지 않은 명령이여도… 좋습니다.

1001408491.english: Commander...? This... isn't it not an order...?

1001408492.english: Such contact is… deemed an unnecessary… action. However… if it is you, Commander…

1001408493.english: see. I used to think all of this was meaningless and unnecessary. But now I think I understand. Still... I am still ashamed.
1001408493.korean: 그렇군요.&n이런건 전부 무의미하고&n불필요한 행동이라고만 생각했는데.&n이제는 알 것 같습니다.&n그래도… 아직은 부끄럽습니다.

1001408494.english: Being with the Commander is… my top priority. Where would you like to go?
1001408494.korean: 사령관님과 함께하는 것이…&n저의 최우선 임무입니다.&n어디로 가시겠습니까?

1001408495.english: Checking on a superior's health is also a subordinate's duty. Commander? Would you please take a rest?
1001408495.korean: 상관의 건강을 체크하는 것도 부하의 임무.&n사령관님?&n휴식을 취해주시겠습니까?

1001408496.english: Confirmation of functional decline due to repetitive physical activity... . It is necessary to replenish calories. In other words, combat rationing is required.
1001408496.korean: 반복적인 신체의 활동으로 기능의 저하를 확인….&n열량을 보충할 필요가 있습니다.&n즉, 전투 취식을 해야합니다.

1001408497.english: May I consider this... contact... as an assignment of a new mission? If so, I will begin the mission now.
1001408497.korean: 이... 접촉은…&n새로운 임무를 명하신거라 판단해도 괜찮습니까?&n그렇다면 지금부터 임무를 개시합니다.

1001408498.english: I was surprised by the training intensity being higher than expected. However, compared to my time in boot camp, it is no problem.
1001408498.korean: 예상보다 높은&n훈련 강도에 놀랐습니다.&n하지만 훈련소 시절에&n비하면 문제없습니다.

1001408499.english: heard that this is Steel Line's summer combat uniform. Indeed... it is a suit that is comfortable to move in and capable of handling sweltering weather.
1001408499.korean: 이게 스틸라인의&n하계 전투복이라고 들었습니다.&n과연… 움직이기 편하고&n무더운 날씨에 대응할 수 있는&n복장입니다.

1001408500.english: Corporal Silky gave me this, saying it was Steel Line's latest combat ration, but it's a form I've never seen before. A heating pack? Pull it and it's ready in 15 minutes? I can't understand it.
1001408500.korean: 실키 상병이 스틸라인&n최신 전투 식량이라며 주었는데&n처음 보는 형태입니다.&n발열팩? 당기고 15분이면 완성?&n이해 불능입니다.

1001408501.english: I received the new revised edition of Steel Line FM. If I just do as it says here, I should be able to become an excellent soldier, right?
1001408501.korean: 스틸라인 FM 신개정판을 받았습니다.&n여기에 적혀있는 대로만 하면&n훌륭한 병사가 될 수 있는 거겠죠?

1001408502.english: I received a lot of help from the Leprechaun squad leader. However, I was told to be careful of Private Brownie. What does that mean?
1001408502.korean: 레프리콘 분대장에게는&n많은 도움을 받았습니다.&n그런데 브라우니 일병을&n조심하라고 들었는데 무슨 뜻일까요?

1001408503.english: used to think that combat rations were just for filling the stomach and that there was no need to eat with anyone. However, after participating in summer combat training and finishing the training, the combat rations I ate with everyone tasted completely different from usual. It is a strange thing.
1001408503.korean: 전투 취식은 그저&n배를 채울 뿐이고 누군가와 함께&n먹을 필요는 없다고 생각했습니다.&n그런데 하계 전투 훈련에 참가해서&n훈련을 마치고 모두와 먹는 전투 취식은&n평소와는 전혀 다른 맛이 났습니다.&n신기한 일입니다.

1001408504.english: Exercising after a meal is not good for your body.

1001408505.english: So you mean to overcome the heat with even greater heat. I understand. Then, could you please explain step-by-step what I need to do?
1001408505.korean: 더위는 더 큰 더위로&n이겨내라는 뜻이군요.&n알겠습니다.&n그럼 제가 어떻게 해야 하는지&n차근차근 알려주시겠어요?

1001408506.english: Today's combat meal is a little special...

1001408825.english: Nya ha~ Orangi! Orangi Orangi Orangi! Oraoraora!

1001500007.english: Hot Spring Overlooking the Snowy Mountains

1001500008.english: A familiar command room. The front observation window is sturdy, so don't worry.
1001500008.korean: 익숙한 사령실입니다. 전면 관측창은 튼튼하니 걱정하지 마세요.

1001500009.english: A beach filled with memories. Hopefully, you can visit it again someday?
1001500009.korean: 추억이 깃든 해변가입니다. 다음에도 다시 와볼 수 있겠죠?

1001500010.english: A seemingly ordinary forest path. But beware of Orca unit ambushes!
1001500010.korean: 언뜻 평범해 보이는 숲길입니다. 그렇지만 오르카 대원의 매복에는 주의하세요!

1001500011.english: The very place where everything began. It’s worth taking a look at least once.
1001500011.korean: 모든 것이 시작된 바로 그곳입니다. 한 번쯤 둘러보는 것도 좋겠네요.

1001500012.english: A simply set-up two-person campsite. The aurora adds a romantic atmosphere.
1001500012.korean: 간단히 설치한 2인용 캠핑장입니다. 마침 오로라가 로맨틱한 분위기를 연출해주는군요.

1001500013.english: An endless snowfield. How about leaving footprints in the untouched snow?
1001500013.korean: 끝없이 펼쳐진 설원입니다. 아무도 밟지 않은 눈밭에 발자국을 남겨보는 것은 어떨까요?

1001500014.english: The captain’s room decorated by the crew for the year-end. Just looking at it feels cozy.
1001500014.korean: 연말을 맞아 대원들이 꾸며준 함장실입니다. 보기만 해도 포근해 보이네요.

1001500015.english: A hot spring prepared by the doctor despite being busy. Relax with your precious squad members—but be careful of peeping!
1001500015.korean: 닥터가 바쁜 와중에도 준비해준 온천입니다. 소중한 대원들과 함께 몸을 담그며 피로를 풀어보세요. 단, 엿보기는 주의하셔야 합니다.

1001500016.english: A bedroom adorned with soft lighting, roses, and luxurious bedding. Spend a blissful time with your beloved, free from any interruptions.
1001500016.korean: 은은한 조명과 장미, 고급스러운 침구로 꾸며진 침실입니다. 누구에게도 방해받지 않고 사랑하는 그녀와 행복한 시간을 보내보세요.

1001500024.english: Room for Four to Lie Down (OR Condition 2)

1001500031.english: This is the background music for the Orca Ship Lobby.

1001500036.english: Griffon, Lindwurm, and Black Hound unit!

1001500039.english: "Unlocked by gifting the skin&nProject Orca: Griffon (for Griffon)"
1001500039.korean: 스킨 선물하면 개방&n그리폰 용 "프로젝트 오르카: 그리폰"

1001500040.english: "Unlocked by gifting the skin&nProject Orca: Lindwurm (for Lindwurm)"
1001500040.korean: 스킨 선물하면 개방&n린트블룸 용 "프로젝트 오르카: 린트블룸"

1001500041.english: "Unlocked by gifting the skin&nProject Orca: Black Hound (for Black Hound)"
1001500041.korean: 스킨 선물하면 개방&n블랙 하운드 용 "프로젝트 오르카: 블랙 하운드"

1001500042.english: "Unlocked by gifting all skins&nProject Orca: Griffon (for Griffon)"&nProject Orca: Lindwurm (for Lindwurm)"&nProject Orca: Black Hound (for Black Hound)"
1001500042.korean: 스킨 모두 선물하면 개방&n그리폰 용 "프로젝트 오르카: 그리폰"&n린트블룸 용 "프로젝트 오르카: 린트블룸"&n블랙 하운드 용 "프로젝트 오르카: 블랙 하운드"

1001500044.english: This is the Sky Knights' dormitory filled with a lived-in atmosphere. You can tell at a glance who owns each bed.
1001500044.korean: 생활감이 느껴지는 스카이나이츠의 숙소입니다. 침상의 주인이 누군지 한눈에 보이네요.

1001500051.english: Feel the emotion of the stage created together as one again! Music start!
1001500051.korean: 모두가 하나되어 만들었던 무대의 감동을 다시 느껴보세요! 뮤직 스타트!

1001500052.english: Feel the emotion of the stage created together as one again! Music start!
1001500052.korean: 모두가 하나되어 만들었던 무대의 감동을 다시 느껴보세요! 뮤직 스타트!

1001500053.english: Feel the emotion of the stage created together as one again! Music start!
1001500053.korean: 모두가 하나되어 만들었던 무대의 감동을 다시 느껴보세요! 뮤직 스타트!

1001500054.english: Feel the emotion of the stage created together as one! Music start!
1001500054.korean: 모두가 하나되어 만들었던 무대의 감동을 다시 느껴보세요! 뮤직 스타트!

1001500055.english: Feel the emotion of the stage created together as one! Music start!
1001500055.korean: 모두가 하나되어 만들었던 무대의 감동을 다시 느껴보세요! 뮤직 스타트!

1001500056.english: Feel the emotion of the stage created together as one! Music start!
1001500056.korean: 모두가 하나되어 만들었던 무대의 감동을 다시 느껴보세요! 뮤직 스타트!

1001500060.english: Song of the Lonely Star (Starlight) (Blooming Heart)

1001500067.english: Unlocked by gifting the skin&nProject Orca: Hraesvelgr (for Hraesvelgr)"
1001500067.korean: 스킨 선물 하면 개방&n흐레스벨그 용 "프로젝트 오르카: 흐레스벨그"

1001500068.english: Unlocked by gifting the skin&nProject Orca: Harpyia (for Harpyia)"
1001500068.korean: 스킨 선물 하면 개방&n하르페이아 용 "프로젝트 오르카: 하르페이아"

1001500069.english: Unlocked by gifting the skin&nProject Orca: Sleipnir (for Sleipnir)"
1001500069.korean: 스킨 선물 하면 개방&n슬레이프니르 용 "프로젝트 오르카: 슬레이프니르"

1001500070.english: Unlocked by gifting all skins&nProject Orca: Hraesvelgr (for Hraesvelgr)"&nProject Orca: Harpyia (for Harpyia)"&nProject Orca: Sleipnir (for Sleipnir)"
1001500070.korean: 스킨 모두 선물 하면 개방&n흐레스벨그 용 "프로젝트 오르카: 흐레스벨그"&n하르페이아 용 "프로젝트 오르카: 하르페이아"&n슬레이프니르 용 "프로젝트 오르카: 슬레이프니르"
